English: XP Gain: Kills in Winter and Desert
Tchinese: XP 增益：在冬季和沙漠中擊殺
每次使用的降解：採礦工具

English:
Light armor does not restrict movement and weighs almost nothing.

Movement speed increased by [DECEA3]10%[-].
Overall heat resistance increased by [DECEA3]10%[-] and cold resistance decreased by [DECEA3]5%[-].
Tchinese:
輕甲不限制移動，幾乎沒有重量。 

移動速度增加[DECEA3]10%[-]。 
整體耐熱性增加[DECEA3]10%[-]，耐寒性減少[DECEA3]5%[-]。

English:
Medium armor is ideal for actively fighting infected enemies.

Ranged weapon damage increased by [DECEA3]10%[-].
Overall temperature resistance increased by [DECEA3]5%[-].
Tchinese:
中型護甲非常適合主動對抗受感染的敵人。 

遠程武器傷害提高 [DECEA3]10%[-]。 
整體耐溫性提高 [DECEA3]5%[-]。

English:
Heavy armor makes you much more resistant to damage taken. And in melee combat, you deal enhanced blows.

You gain [DECEA3]30[-] health.
Melee weapon damage increased by [DECEA3]10%[-].
Overall cold resistance increased by [DECEA3]10%[-] and heat resistance decreased by [DECEA3]5%[-].
Tchinese:
重甲使你更能抵抗受的傷害。在近戰戰鬥中，你會造成更強的打擊。 

你獲得 [DECEA3]30[-] 生命值。 
近戰武器傷害提高 [DECEA3]10%[-]。 
整體耐寒性提高 [DECEA3]10%[-]，耐熱性降低 [DECEA3]5%[-]。

English:
Light Armor
Birds and wasps are your friends. You can find more honey by cutting down trees.

Full Set Bonus: Increases wood harvest.
Tchinese:
輕甲
鳥類和黃蜂是你的朋友。你可以透過砍伐樹木來找到更多蜂蜜。 

全套獎勵：增加木材收成。

English:
Light Armor
With a vest full of pockets, you will have room for everything. Reduces encumbrance.

Full Set Bonus: Increases wood harvest.
Tchinese:
輕甲
有了裝滿口袋的背心，你就有足夠的空間容納所有東西。減少負擔。 

全套獎勵：增加木材收穫。

English:
Light Armor
Forget about calluses. Strong leather holds the ax handle well. Reduces stamina consumption when using axes.

Full Set Bonus: Increases wood harvest.
Tchinese:
輕甲
忘記老繭吧。堅固的皮革可以很好地固定斧柄。減少使用斧頭時的耐力消耗。 

全套獎勵：增加木材收穫。

English:
Light Armor
Comfortable shoes for maintaining balance when swinging axes. Increases damage with axes against blocks.

Full Set Bonus: Increases wood harvest.
Tchinese:
輕甲
舒適的鞋子，可在擺動軸時保持平衡。增加斧頭對物塊的傷害。 

全套獎勵：增加木材收穫。
伐木工半套裝獎金活躍

English: Professional lumberjack equipment allows you to harvest timber more efficiently.\n\nWood production increased by {cvar(.armorLumberjackFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 專業伐木工人設備可讓您更有效率地採伐木材。 \n\n木材產量增加 {cvar(.armorLumberjackFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Even an incomplete set of the Lumberjack allows you to harvest wood more efficiently.\n\nWood production increased by {cvar(.armorSemiLumberjackFSBDisplay01:0)}%
Tchinese: 即使一套不完整的伐木工人也能讓您更有效地採伐木材。 \n\n木材產量增加 {cvar(.armorSemiLumberjackFSBDisplay01:0)}%

English:
Light Armor
The Preacher's positive reputation is highly respected in the trading community. Receive a discount on purchased items.

Full Set Bonus: Increases wasteland experience gained and provides resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect.
Tchinese:
輕甲
傳教士的良好聲譽在貿易界受到高度尊重。購買物品可享折扣。 

全套獎勵：增加所獲得的荒地經驗並提供對 [DECEA3]1[-] 輻射效應的抵抗力。

English:
Light Armor
Blessed by the Lord, these threads will keep you protected from evil. Reduces incoming damage.

Full Set Bonus: Increases wasteland experience gained and provides resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect.
Tchinese:
輕甲
受到主的祝福，這些線將保護你免受邪惡的侵害。減少傳入傷害。 

全套獎勵：增加所獲得的荒地經驗並提供對 [DECEA3]1[-] 輻射效果的抵抗力。

English:
Light Armor
Smite thy enemy. Increases damage dealt to the undead.

Full Set Bonus: Increases wasteland experience gained and provides resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect.
Tchinese:
輕甲
打擊你的敵人。增加對不死生物造成的傷害。 

全套獎勵：增加所獲得的荒地經驗並提供對 [DECEA3]1[-] 輻射效果的抵抗力。

English:
Light Armor
You can't do anything if you're dead. Reduces healing time for abrasions and fractures.

Full Set Bonus: Increases wasteland experience gained and provides resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect.
Tchinese:
輕甲
如果你死了，你就什麼也做不了。減少擦傷和骨折的癒合時間。 

全套獎勵：增加所獲得的荒地經驗並提供對 [DECEA3]1[-] 輻射效應的抵抗力。
傳道人半套裝獎金活躍

English:
You will be filled with faith in the wasteland.

Experience gained increased by {cvar(.armorPreacherFSBDisplay:0)}% in the wasteland.
Grants resistance to one active radiation effect.
Tchinese:
你將對荒地充滿信心。 

荒地中獲得的經驗增加 {cvar(.armorPreacherFSBDisplay:0)}%。 
賦予對一種主動輻射效果的抵抗力。

English: Even with an incomplete Preacher set, you will be filled with faith in the wasteland.\n\nExperience gained is increased by {cvar(.armorSemiPreacherFSBDisplay:0)}% in the wasteland.
Tchinese: 即使傳道者套裝不完整，你也會對荒地充滿信心。 \n\n荒地中所獲得的經驗增加 {cvar(.armorSemiPreacherFSBDisplay:0)}%。

English:
Light Armor
A true rogue always recognizes loot. You find more banknotes and dukes in loot.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage of bows and crossbows.
Tchinese:
輕甲
真正的盜賊總是能認出戰利品。你會在戰利品中找到更多的鈔票和公爵。 

全套獎勵：增加弓和十字弓的傷害。

English:
Light Armor
Wounds heal like a dog's. Increases the healing rate of critical wounds.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage of bows and crossbows.
Tchinese:
輕甲
傷口像狗一樣癒合。提高嚴重傷口的治癒率。 

全套獎勵：提高弓和十字弓的傷害。

English:
Light Armor
Arrows and bolts do not slip out of your hands at the wrong moment. Increases reload speed of bows and crossbows.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage of bows and crossbows.
Tchinese:
輕甲
箭頭和螺栓不會在錯誤的時刻從你手中滑落。提高弓和弩的装填速度。 

全套奖励：提高弓和弩的伤害。

English:
Light Armor
Almost a ninja. Less noise and faster movement in stealth.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage of bows and crossbows.
Tchinese:
轻甲
几乎是忍者。隱身時噪音更小，移動速度更快。 

全套獎勵：增加弓和十字弓的傷害。

English: Even with an incomplete Rogue set, you are an excellent archer.\n\nBow and crossbow damage increased by {cvar(.armorSemiRogueFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 即使盜賊套裝不完整，您也是個出色的弓箭手。 \n\n弓箭和十字弓傷害增加 {cvar(.armorSemiRogueFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: You are a master of archery.\n\nDamage of bows and crossbows increased by {cvar(.armorRogueFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 你是射箭大師。 \n\n弓箭和十字弓的傷害增加 {cvar(.armorRogueFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Light Armor
Save some food and water for the marathon. Reduced water and food consumption.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all experience gained.
Tchinese:
輕甲
為馬拉松節省一些食物和水。減少水和食物消耗。 

全套獎勵：增加所有獲得的經驗。

English:
Light Armor
Sportsman's clothing on a slender body. Increases the amount of health.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all experience gained.
Tchinese:
輕甲
修長的身體上的運動員服裝。增加生命值。 

全套獎勵：增加所有獲得的經驗。

English:
Light Armor
Comfortable gloves for quick work with any weapon. Increases reload speed.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all experience gained.
Tchinese:
輕甲
舒適的手套，可快速使用任何武器。提高裝填速度。 

全套獎勵：增加所有獲得的經驗。

English:
Light Armor
Comfortable shoes for jogging. Increases the speed of stamina regeneration when running.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all experience gained.
Tchinese:
轻甲
舒适的慢跑鞋。提高跑步时耐力恢复的速度。 

全套獎勵：增加所有獲得的經驗。

English: Even with an incomplete Athletic set, you can develop your skills.\n\nAll experience gained is increased by {cvar(.armorSemiAthleticFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 即使運動套裝不完整，您也可以發展自己的技能。 \n\n所獲得的所有經驗都會增加 {cvar(.armorSemiAthleticFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: A healthy body means a healthy spirit.\n\nAll experience gained is increased by {cvar(.armorAthleticFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 健康的身体意味着健康的精神。 \n\n所獲得的所有經驗都會增加 {cvar(.armorAthleticFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Light Armor
With such a hat you can always negotiate a good price for your product. Increases selling price.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the damage of the Gunslinger ability.
Tchinese:
輕甲
有了這樣一頂帽子，您總是可以為您的產品討價還價。提高售價。 

全套獎勵：提升槍手能力的傷害。

English:
Light Armor
Stylish and lightweight materials mean you can withstand any impact. Increases resistance to critical injuries.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the damage of the Gunslinger ability.
Tchinese:
輕甲
時尚輕質的材質意味著您可以承受任何衝擊。提高對嚴重傷害的抵抗力。 

全套獎勵：提升槍手能力的傷害。

English:
Light Armor
These gloves were worn back in the days of the Wild West. Increases the reload speed of SMGs and pistols.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the damage of the Gunslinger ability.
Tchinese:
輕甲
這些手套是在狂野西部時代佩戴的。提高衝鋒槍和手槍的裝填速度。 

全套獎勵：提升槍手能力的傷害。

English:
Light Armor
These shoes will not soon become unusable. Increases stamina.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the damage of the Gunslinger ability.
Tchinese:
輕甲
這些鞋子不會很快變得無法使用。增加耐力。 

全套獎勵：增加槍手能力的傷害。
強制執行者半套裝獎勵激活

English: Even with an incomplete Enforcer set, pistols are your best friends.\n\nDamage from SMGs and pistols increased by {cvar(.armorSemiEnforcerFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 即使執法者套裝不完整，手槍也是你最好的朋友。 \n\n衝鋒槍和手槍造成的傷害增加 {cvar(.armorSemiEnforcerFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Your best friends are pistols.\n\nGunslinger ability damage increased by {cvar(.armorEnforcerFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 你最好的朋友是手枪。 \n\n槍手技能傷害提高 {cvar(.armorEnforcerFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Medium Armor
Keep the sun out of your eyes and on the prize. Increases the chance to find seeds in loot.

Full Set Bonus: Adds a chance to harvest an extra crop.
Tchinese:
中型裝甲
避免陽光照射到你的眼睛和獎品。增加在戰利品中找到種子的機會。 

全套獎勵：增加收穫額外作物的機會。

English:
Medium Armor
Farmers recover faster with food because they know how to get it. Increases the recovery of health and stamina from food, as well as your lifting capacity.

Full Set Bonus: Adds a chance to harvest an extra crop.
Tchinese:
中型護甲
農民透過食物恢復得更快，因為他們知道如何獲取食物。增加食物的健康和耐力恢復，以及舉重能力。 

全套獎勵：增加收穫額外農作物的機會。

English:
Medium Armor
Only a real farmer knows how to harvest quickly. Increases the attack speed of knives and machetes.

Full Set Bonus: Adds a chance to harvest an extra crop.
Tchinese:
中甲
只有真正的農民才知道如何快速收割。提高刀和砍刀的攻擊速度。 

全套獎勵：增加收穫額外農作物的機會。

English:
Medium Armor
Nothing beats a comfortable pair of boots out in the field. Adds a chance to gain a seed when harvesting.

Full Set Bonus: Adds a chance to harvest an extra crop.
Tchinese:
中型護甲
在野外沒有什麼比一雙舒適的靴子更好的了。增加收穫時獲得種子的機會。 

全套獎勵：增加收穫額外作物的機會。

English: A real farmer knows how to harvest the crop correctly without damaging it.\n\nMakes it possible to collect an additional {cvar(.armorFarmerFSBDisplay:0)}% of the harvest
Tchinese: 真正的農民知​​道如何正確收割農作物而不損壞農作物。 \n\n可以額外收集 {cvar(.armorFarmerFSBDisplay:0)}% 的收成

English: Even with an incomplete Farmer's kit, you know how to properly harvest crops without damaging them.\n\nGives you the opportunity to additionally harvest {cvar(.armorSemiFarmerFSBDisplay:0)}% of the crop.
Tchinese: 即使農夫工具包不完整，您也知道如何正確收割農作物而不損壞它們。 \n\n讓您有機會額外收割 {cvar(.armorSemiFarmerFSBDisplay:0)}% 的農作物。

English:
Medium Armor
You always easily adapt to new areas. Increases all experience gained in desert and winter biomes.

Full Set Bonus: Additional experience for killing ferals and radiated zombies.
Tchinese:
中型護甲
你總是可以輕鬆適應新區域。增加在沙漠和冬季生物群落中獲得的所有經驗。 

全套獎勵：殺死野生動物和輻射殭屍的額外經驗。

English:
Medium Armor
You can easily put your face under attack. Increases the number of health points.

Full Set Bonus: Additional experience for killing ferals and radiated zombies.
Tchinese:
中型護甲
你的臉很容易受到攻擊。增加生命值。 

全套獎勵：殺死野生動物和輻射殭屍的額外經驗。

English:
Medium Armor
Don't fight back - so what? Increases the attack speed of clubs and sledgehammers.

Full Set Bonus: Additional experience for killing ferals and radiated zombies.
Tchinese:
中型裝甲
不反擊 - 那又怎樣？提高棍棒和大槌的攻擊速度。 

全套獎勵：殺死野生動物和輻射殭屍的額外經驗。

English:
Medium Armor
Without transportation, it's like having no hands. Reduces vehicle fuel consumption.

Full Set Bonus: Additional experience for killing ferals and radiated zombies.
Tchinese:
中甲
沒有交通工具，就像沒有雙手一樣。減少車輛燃油消耗。 

全套獎勵：殺死野生動物和輻射殭屍的額外經驗。
騎自行車的人半套裝獎金活躍

English: Lover of stronger opponents.\n\nExperience for killing ferals and radiated zombies increased by {cvar(.armorBikerFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 喜歡更強大的對手。 \n\n殺死野生動物和輻射殭屍的經驗增加 {cvar(.armorBikerFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Even with an incomplete Biker set, you are a fan of stronger opponents.\n\nExperience for killing wild and infected zombies increased by {cvar(.armorSemiBikerFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 即使騎車人套裝不完整，您也會喜歡更強大的對手。 \n\n殺死野生和受感染殭屍的經驗增加 {cvar(.armorSemiBikerFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Medium Armor
You never know what you can do till you try. Increases the salvaging speed, the number of items received, and your carrying capacity.

Full Set Bonus: Find better quality loot.
Tchinese:
中型護甲
不嘗試，你永遠不知道自己能做什麼。提高打撈速度、收到的物品數量以及你的攜帶能力。 

全套獎勵：找到品質更好的戰利品。
清道夫半套裝獎金活躍

English: Even with an incomplete Scavenger set, you have a keen eye for finding valuable resources that would escape the gaze of others.\n\nYou find loot that is {cvar(.armorSemiScavengerFSBDisplay:0)}% higher in quality
Tchinese: 即使拾荒者套裝不完整，您也能敏銳地發現那些能逃脫他人目光的寶貴資源。 \n\n您會發現品質高出 {cvar(.armorSemiScavengerFSBDisplay:0)}% 的戰利品

English:
Medium Armor
Rangers are ruthless negotiators, especially while wearing a well crafted hat. Increases bartering.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all damage dealt and provides resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect
Tchinese:
中型護甲
遊騎兵是無情的談判者，尤其是戴著精心製作的帽子時。增加以物易物貿易。 

全套獎勵：增加造成的所有傷害並提供對 [DECEA3]1[-] 輻射效果的抵抗力

English:
Medium Armor
Nature has taught strength not only of the spirit, but also of the body. Increases the number of health points.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all damage dealt and provides resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect
Tchinese:
中甲
大自然不僅教會了精神的力量，也教會了身體的力量。增加生命值。 

全套獎勵：增加造成的所有傷害並提供對 [DECEA3]1[-] 輻射效果的抵抗力

English:
Medium Armor
These comfortable gloves allow you to quickly handle any weapon. Increases weapon reload speed.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all damage dealt and provides resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect
Tchinese:
中型護甲
這些舒適的手套讓您可以快速操作任何武器。提高武器裝填速度。 

全套獎勵：提高造成的所有傷害並提供對 [DECEA3]1[-] 輻射效果的抵抗力

English:
Medium Armor
Endurance is the key to successful survival in the wild. Increases stamina.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all damage dealt and provides resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect
Tchinese:
中甲
耐力是野外成功生存的關鍵。增加耐力。 

全套獎勵：增加造成的所有傷害並提供對 [DECEA3]1[-] 輻射效果的抵抗力

English:
The ability to survive in any conditions allows you to deal increased damage with any weapon and in any weather.

All ranged damage increased by {cvar(.armorRangerFSBDisplay:0)}%
Grants resistance to one active radiation effect.
Tchinese:
在任何條件下生存的能力使您能夠在任何天氣下使用任何武器造成更大的傷害。 

所有遠程傷害增加 {cvar(.armorRangerFSBDisplay:0)}%
對一種主動輻射效果具有抵抗力。

English: Even with an incomplete Ranger set, you deal increased damage with any weapon and in any weather.\n\nAll ranged damage increased by {cvar(.armorSemiRangerFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 即使遊俠套裝不完整，您在任何天氣下使用任何武器都會造成更高的傷害。 \n\n所有遠程傷害都會增加 {cvar(.armorSemiRangerFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Medium Armor
Hard training and injuries were not in vain. Everything heals on you like it does on a dog.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by automatic weapons.
Tchinese:
中甲
艱苦的訓練和受傷沒有白費。一切都會像對待狗一樣治癒你。 

全套獎勵：增加自動武器造成的傷害。

English:
Medium Armor
True commandos endure without flinching. Faster critical injury recovery.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by automatic weapons.
Tchinese:
中甲
真正的突擊隊員堅忍不退。更快的重傷恢復。 

全套獎勵：增加自動武器造成的傷害。

English:
Medium Armor
A good shooter disassembles and reassembles his weapon with ease, and has perfected the reloading process. Increases the reload speed of automatic weapons.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by automatic weapons.
Tchinese:
中型裝甲
優秀的射手可以輕鬆地拆卸和重新組裝他的武器，並完善重新裝填過程。提高自動武器的裝填速度。 

全套獎勵：提高自動武器造成的傷害。

English:
Medium Armor
These shoes are suitable for the most challenging obstacle courses. Increases safe fall height.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by automatic weapons.
Tchinese:
中型裝甲
這些鞋適合最具挑戰性的障礙訓練場。增加安全墜落高度。 

全套獎勵：增加自動武器造成的傷害。
突擊隊半套裝獎勵激活

English: Your weapons are machine guns and submachine guns. You can do wonders with them.\n\nDamage dealt by automatic weapons increased by {cvar(.armorCommandoFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 你的武器是機關槍和衝鋒槍。你可以用它們創造奇蹟。 \n\n自動武器造成的傷害增加 {cvar(.armorCommandoFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Even in an incomplete Commando set, your weapons are machine guns and assault rifles. With them you can work wonders.\n\nDamage dealt by automatic weapons is increased by {cvar(.armorSemiCommandoFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 即使在不完整的突擊隊套裝中，你的武器也是機關槍和突擊步槍。有了它們，你可以創造奇蹟。 \n\n自動武器造成的傷害增加 {cvar(.armorSemiCommandoFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Medium Armor
They'll never see it coming. Deal more damage when sneaking.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by sniper rifles.
Tchinese:
中型裝甲
他們永遠不會預見它的到來。潛行時造成更多傷害。 

全套獎勵：增加狙擊步槍造成的傷害。

English:
Medium Armor
Move unseen, unheard, and unharmed. Increases sneak effectiveness.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by sniper rifles.
Tchinese:
中型護甲
移動時看不見、聽不見、不受傷害。提高潛行效率。 

全套獎勵：提高狙擊步槍造成的傷害。

English:
Medium Armor
Silently - but very quickly. Increases the rate of fire and reload speed of sniper rifles.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by sniper rifles.
Tchinese:
中型裝甲
悄無聲息 - 但速度非常快。提高狙擊步槍的射速和裝填速度。 

全套獎勵：提高狙擊步槍造成的傷害。

English:
Medium Armor
Silent, but deadly. Sprinting while sneaking makes no extra sound.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by sniper rifles.
Tchinese:
中甲
沉默，但致命。潛行時衝刺不會產生額外的聲音。 

全套獎勵：增加狙擊步槍造成的傷害。

English: The hidden killer can easily find and eliminate his target. You have no equal in this.\n\nDamage dealt by sniper rifles increased by {cvar(.armorAssassinFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 隱藏的殺手可以輕鬆找到並消滅他的目標。在這方面你無與倫比。 \n\n狙擊步槍造成的傷害增加 {cvar(.armorAssassinFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Even with an incomplete set, the assassin can easily find and eliminate his target. You have no equal in this.\n\nDamage dealt by sniper rifles is increased by {cvar(.armorSemiAssassinFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 即使裝備不完整，刺客也可以輕易找到並消滅他的目標。在這方面你無與倫比。 \n\n狙擊步槍造成的傷害增加 {cvar(.armorSemiAssassinFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Heavy Armor
The main thing when you climb into a mine is to remember the way back. Increases experience gained when mining ore.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the amount of ore mined.
Tchinese:
重甲
爬進礦坑時最重要的是記住回來的路。增加開採礦石時所獲得的經驗。 

全套獎勵：增加開採的礦石量。

English:
Heavy Armor
You can always quickly repair the tool. That is why it does not break down so often.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the amount of ore mined.
Tchinese:
重甲
你總是可以快速修復工具。這就是為什麼它不會經常損壞的原因。 

全套獎勵：增加開採的礦石量。

English:
Heavy Armor
A chip here, a chip there, and any vein will give in. Increases block damage for mining tools.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the amount of ore mined.
Tchinese:
重甲
這裡有一個缺口，那裡有一個缺口，任何礦脈都會屈服。增加採礦工具的方塊傷害。 

全套獎勵：增加開採的礦石量。

English:
Heavy Armor
With such equipment, stones underfoot are not a problem. Reduces stamina consumption when using a pickaxe.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the amount of ore mined.
Tchinese:
重甲
有了這樣的裝備，腳下的石頭都不是問題。減少使用鎬時的體力消耗。 

全套獎勵：增加開採的礦石量。

English: An experienced miner knows how to get a little more ore.\n\nThe amount of ore mined has been increased by {cvar(.armorMinerFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 經驗豐富的礦工知道如何獲得更多礦石。 \n\n開採的礦石量增加了 {cvar(.armorMinerFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Even with an incomplete Miner set, you know how to mine a little more ore.\n\nThe amount of ore mined has been increased by {cvar(.armorSemiMinerFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 即使礦工套裝不完整，您也知道如何開採更多礦石。 \n\n開採的礦石量增加 {cvar(.armorSemiMinerFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Heavy Armor
Guarded against the severe conditions of the wasteland, this headgear enables the Nomad to wander further. Reduces food and water consumption.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the damage dealt by shotguns and gives resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect.
Tchinese:
重甲
這款安全帽可以抵禦荒地的惡劣條件，讓遊牧者能夠走得更遠。減少食物和水的消耗。 

全套獎勵：增加霰彈槍造成的傷害並抵抗 [DECEA3]1[-] 輻射效果。

English:
Heavy Armor
Anything can happen on any journey. The main thing is the ability to quickly recover and move on. Faster critical injury recovery.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the damage done by shotguns and gives resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect.
Tchinese:
重甲
任何旅程中任何事情都可能發生。最重要的是能夠快速恢復並繼續前進。更快的重傷恢復。 

全套獎勵：增加霰彈槍造成的傷害並抵抗 [DECEA3]1[-] 輻射效果。

English:
Heavy Armor
If you go into a house to spend the night, there is definitely someone there. Increases the rate of fire and reload speed of shotguns.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the damage done by shotguns and gives resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect.
Tchinese:
重甲
如果你進屋過夜，那裡一定有人。提高霰彈槍的射速和裝填速度。 

全套獎勵：提高霰彈槍造成的傷害並抵抗 [DECEA3]1[-] 輻射效果。

English:
Heavy Armor
When crawling through the mountains, it is better not to look down. Increases safe fall height.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the damage done by shotguns and gives resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect.
Tchinese:
重甲
在山中爬行時，最好不要低頭。增加安全墜落高度。 

全套獎勵：增加霰彈槍造成的傷害並抵抗 [DECEA3]1[-] 輻射效果。

English:
This is the best that can be offered to guests outside the tent.

Damage dealt by shotguns increased by {cvar(.armorNomadFSBDisplay:0)}%
Grants resistance to one active radiation effect.
Tchinese:
這是可以為帳篷外的客人提供的最好的。 

霰彈槍造成的傷害增加 {cvar(.armorNomadFSBDisplay:0)}%
賦予對一種主動輻射效果的抵抗力。

English: Even without a full set, you know what you can offer to guests outside the tent.\n\nDamage dealt by shotguns increased by {cvar(.armorSemiNomadFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 即使沒有全套，您也知道可以為帳篷外的客人提供什麼。 \n\n霰彈槍造成的傷害增加 {cvar(.armorSemiNomadFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Heavy Armor
You might not be invited on any dates, but you will hone your skills. Increases experience gain.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage from the [DECEA3]«Intelligence»[-] attribute.
Tchinese:
重甲
你可能不會被邀請參加任何約會，但你會磨練你的技能。增加經驗增益。 

全套獎勵：增加[DECEA3]《智力》[-] 屬性的傷害。

English:
Heavy Armor
Your lack of fashion sense gives you the ability to focus on your inventions. Adds a chance to gain two crafting skill points when reading magazines.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage from the [DECEA3]«Intelligence»[-] attribute.
Tchinese:
重甲
你缺乏時尚感，卻讓你能專注於你的發明。閱讀雜誌時有機會獲得兩個製作技能點數。 

全套獎勵：增加[DECEA3]《智力》[-] 屬性的傷害。

English:
Heavy Armor
Protect your delicate hands from the cold and become an intellectual badass. Increases attack speed with intellect-based weapons.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage from the [DECEA3]«Intelligence»[-] attribute.
Tchinese:
重甲
保護你嬌嫩的雙手免受寒冷，成為一個聰明的壞蛋。提高基於智力的武器的攻擊速度。 

全套獎勵：提高[DECEA3]《智力》[-] 屬性的傷害。

English:
Heavy Armor
Those distant school years were not in vain. You definitely learned how to run away. Increases running speed.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage from the [DECEA3]«Intelligence»[-] attribute.
Tchinese:
重甲
那些遙遠的學年沒有白費。你肯定學會如何逃跑。提高跑步速度。 

全套獎勵：提高[DECEA3]《智力》[-] 屬性的傷害。
書呆子半套裝獎金活躍

English: Robots are not only valuable fur...\n\nDamage from the [DECEA3]«Intelligence»[-] attribute increased by {cvar(.armorNerdFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 機器人不僅是有價值的毛皮...\n\n[DECEA3]«智力»[-] 屬性造成的傷害增加 {cvar(.armorNerdFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Even in an incomplete Nerd set, robots are not only valuable fur...\n\nDamage dealt by the [DECEA3]«Intelligence»[-] attribute is increased by {cvar(.armorSemiNerdFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 即使在不完整的書呆子套裝中，機器人也不僅僅是有價值的毛皮...\n\n[DECEA3]«智力»[-] 屬性造成的傷害增加 {cvar(.armorSemiNerdFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Heavy Armor
Grandma's ointments work wonders. Increases the speed of healing received.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all melee damage.
Tchinese:
重甲
奶奶的藥膏有奇效。提高收到的治療速度。 

全套獎勵：提高所有近戰傷害。

English:
Heavy Armor
Oops. I didn’t immediately notice that my arm was broken. Increases the recovery rate of critical wounds.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all melee damage.
Tchinese:
重甲
糟糕。我沒有立即註意到我的手臂骨折了。提高嚴重傷害的恢復率。 

全套獎勵：提高所有近戰傷害。

English:
Heavy Armor
Well, come one at a time. There's enough for everyone. Increases melee attack speed.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all melee damage.
Tchinese:
重甲
好吧，一次來一個。每個人都夠了。提高近戰攻擊速度。 

全套獎勵：提高所有近戰傷害。

English:
Heavy Armor
Step right, step left. You easily dodge enemy attacks and spend less stamina.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all melee damage.
Tchinese:
重甲
向右走，向左走。您可以輕鬆躲避敵人的攻擊並消耗更少的耐力。 

全套獎勵：增加所有近戰傷害。
襲擊者半套裝獎勵活躍

English: You are invincible in close combat.\n\nMelee damage increased by {cvar(.armorRaiderFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 你在近戰中是無敵的。 \n\n近戰傷害增加 {cvar(.armorRaiderFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Even with an incomplete Raider set, you are unbeatable in melee combat.\n\nMelee damage increased by {cvar(.armorSemiRaiderFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 即使沒有完整的掠奪者套裝，您在近戰中也將是無與倫比的。 \n\n近戰傷害增加 {cvar(.armorSemiRaiderFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: A «Boost» for Gatherer armor. Installed in body armor.\n\nThe amount of wood harvested has been increased by [DECEA3]25%[-].
Tchinese: A «Boost» for Gatherer armor.安裝在防彈衣中。 \n\n砍伐的木材量增加了[DECEA3]25%[-]。

English: A «Boost» for Gatherer armor. Installed in body armor.\n\nThe amount of iron and lead mined has been increased by [DECEA3]25%[-].
Tchinese: A «Boost» for Gatherer armor.安裝在防彈衣中。 \n\n開採的鐵和鉛的數量增加了[DECEA3]25%[-]。

English: A «Boost» for Gatherer armor. Installed in body armor.\n\nThe amount of shale, coal, and potassium nitrate extracted has been increased by [DECEA3]25%[-].
Tchinese: 收集者盔甲的「增強」。安裝在防彈衣中。 \n\n萃取的頁岩、煤和硝酸鉀的量增加了[DECEA3]25%[-]。

English: A «Boost» for Gatherer armor. Installed in body armor.\n\nThe amount of clay mined has been increased by [DECEA3]25%[-].
Tchinese: A «Boost» for Gatherer armor.安裝在防彈衣中。 \n\n開採的黏土量增加了[DECEA3]25%[-]。

English: Enhancement for improved armor. Installed in gloves.\n\nGrants a bonus to spear proficiency when wearing a full set of improved armor.
Tchinese: Enhancement for improved armor.安裝在手套中。 \n\n穿著全套改良的盔甲時，可以獲得長矛熟練度加成。

English: Enhancement for improved armor. Installed in gloves.\n\nGrants a bonus to club proficiency when wearing a full set of improved armor.
Tchinese: Enhancement for improved armor.安裝在手套中。 \n\n穿著全套改良的盔甲時，可以提高俱樂部的熟練度。

English: Enhancement for improved armor. Installed in gloves.\n\nGrants a bonus to sledgehammer proficiency when wearing a full set of improved armor.
Tchinese: Enhancement for improved armor.安裝在手套中。 \n\n穿著全套改良的盔甲時，可提高大槌熟練度。

English: Enhancement for improved armor. Installed in gloves.\n\nGrants a bonus to knuckle proficiency when wearing a full set of improved armor.
Tchinese: Enhancement for improved armor.安裝在手套中。 \n\n穿著全套改良的盔甲時，可提高指關節熟練度。

English: Enhancement for improved armor. Installed in gloves.\n\nGives a bonus to knife and machete proficiency when wearing a full set of improved armor.
Tchinese: Enhancement for improved armor.安裝在手套中。 \n\n穿著全套改良的盔甲時，可以提高刀具和砍刀的熟練程度。

English: Enhancement for improved armor. Installed in gloves.\n\nGrants a bonus to stun baton proficiency when wearing a full set of improved armor.
Tchinese: 增強裝甲以改善裝甲。安裝在手套中。 \n\n穿著全套改良的盔甲時，可獲得電擊棒熟練度加成。

English:
Light Armor
An improved version of the Rogue Hood. A true rogue always recognizes loot. You find more banknotes and dukes in loot. You are now better trained in combat.

Full Set Bonus: Available [FF6666]Melee Weapon Boost[-] (installed in gloves). Increases damage dealt with bows and crossbows.

[DECEA3]Repair requires repair kit (improved).[-]
Tchinese:
輕甲
盜賊兜帽的改良版。真正的盜賊總是能認出戰利品。你會在戰利品中找到更多的鈔票和公爵。您現在在戰鬥中得到了更好的訓練。 

全套獎勵：可用[FF6666]近戰武器增強[-]（安裝在手套中）。增加弓箭和十字弓造成的傷害。 

[DECEA3]修復需要修復套件（改進）。 [-]

English:
Light Armor
An improved version of the Rogue's outfit. Heals wounds like a dog. Increases the speed of critical wound healing. You can now carry more.

Full Set Bonus: Available [FF6666]Melee Weapon Boost[-] (installed in gloves). Increases damage dealt by bows and crossbows.

[DECEA3]Repair requires repair kit (improved).[-]
Tchinese:
輕甲
盜賊服裝的改良版。像狗一樣治癒傷口。提高關鍵傷口的癒合速度。您現在可以攜帶更多。 

全套獎勵：可用[FF6666]近戰武器增強[-]（安裝在手套中）。增加弓和弩造成的傷害。 

[DECEA3]修復需要修復套件（改進）。 [-]

English:
Light Armor
An improved version of the Rogue Gloves. Arrows and bolts do not slip out of your hands at an inopportune moment. Increased reload speed of bows and crossbows. You can install a boost to increase the attack speed of melee weapons.

Full Set Bonus: Available [FF6666]Melee Weapon Boost[-] (installed in gloves). Increases damage dealt by bows and crossbows.

[DECEA3]Repair requires repair kit (improved).[-]
Tchinese:
輕甲
盜賊手套的改良版。箭和螺栓不會在不合時宜的時刻從你手中滑落。提高弓和十字弓的裝填速度。您可以安裝助推器來提高近戰武器的攻擊速度。 

全套獎勵：可用[FF6666]近戰武器助推器[-]（安裝在手套中）。增加弓和弩造成的傷害。 

[DECEA3]修復需要修復套件（改進）。 [-]

English:
Light Armor
An improved version of the Rogue's Boots. Almost ninja-like. Less noise and faster movement in stealth. Much easier to maintain balance during melee attacks.

Full Set Bonus: Available [FF6666]Melee Weapon Boost[-] (installed in gloves). Increases damage dealt by bows and crossbows.

[DECEA3]Repair requires repair kit (improved).[-]
Tchinese:
輕甲
盜賊靴子的改良版。幾乎像忍者。隱身時噪音更小，移動速度更快。在近戰攻擊中更容易保持平衡。 

全套獎勵：可用[FF6666]近戰武器增強[-]（安裝在手套中）。增加弓和弩造成的傷害。 

[DECEA3]修復需要修復套件（改進）。 [-]

English: You are affected by the improved Rogue armor bonus.
Tchinese: 你受到改進的盜賊護甲加成的影響。

English: You have equipped a full set of [8692FF]«Rogue»[-] improved armor.\nBow and crossbow damage increased by [DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRogueImpFSBDisplay:0)}%[-]. When enhancing melee weapons: damage increased by [DECEA3]{cvar(.armorEnhancedDamageRogueImpFSBDisplay:0)}%[-], attack speed increased by [DECEA3]{cvar(.armorEnhancedSpeedRogueImpFSBDisplay:0)}%[-], stamina consumption reduced by [DECEA3]{cvar(.armorEnhancedStaminaRogueImpFSBDisplay:0)}%[-].
Tchinese: 您已裝備了一整套 [8692FF]《盜賊》[-] 改良護甲。 \n弓箭和十字弓傷害增加 [DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRogueImpFSBDisplay:0)}%[-]。強化近戰武器時：傷害增加 [DECEA3]{cvar(.armorEnhancedDamageRogueImpFSBDisplay:0)}%[-]，攻擊速度增加[DECEA3]{cvar(.armorEnhancedSpeedRogueImpFSBDisplay:0)}%[-]，體力消耗減少[DECEA3]{cvar(.armorEnhancedStaminaRogueImpFSBDisplay:0)}%[-].

English:
Light Armor
An improved version of the Enforcer Sunglasses. With these glasses, you can always negotiate a good price for your product. This increases the selling price. You are now better trained in combat.

Full Set Bonus: Available [FF6666]Melee Weapon Boost[-] (installed in gloves). Increases the damage of the Gunslinger ability.

[DECEA3]Repair requires repair kit (improved).[-]
Tchinese:
輕甲
執法者太陽眼鏡的改良版。有了這些眼鏡，您始終可以為您的產品討價還價。這增加了銷售價格。您現在在戰鬥中得到了更好的訓練。 

全套獎勵：可用[FF6666]近戰武器增強[-]（安裝在手套中）。增加槍手能力的傷害。 

[DECEA3]修復需要修復套件（改進）。 [-]

English:
Light Armor
An improved version of the Enforcer Outfit. Stylish and lightweight materials mean you can withstand any impact. Increases resistance to critical injuries. Now you can carry more.

Full Set Bonus: Available [FF6666]Melee Weapon Boost[-] (installed in gloves). Increases the damage of the Gunslinger ability.

[DECEA3]Repair requires repair kit (improved).[-]
Tchinese:
輕甲
執法者服裝的改良版。時尚輕質的材質意味著您可以承受任何衝擊。提高對嚴重傷害的抵抗力。現在您可以攜帶更多。 

全套獎勵：可用[FF6666]近戰武器增強[-]（安裝在手套中）。增加槍手能力的傷害。 

[DECEA3]修復需要修復套件（改進）。 [-]

English:
Light Armor
An improved version of the Enforcer Gloves. Gloves like these were worn back in the days of the Wild West. Increases reload speed for SMGs and pistols. You can install a boost to increase melee weapon attack speed.

Full Set Bonus: Available [FF6666]Melee Weapon Boost[-] (installed in gloves). Increases damage dealt by the Gunslinger ability.

[DECEA3]Repair requires repair kit (improved).[-]
Tchinese:
輕甲
執法者手套的改良版。像這樣的手套在狂野西部時代就被戴過。提高衝鋒槍和手槍的裝填速度。您可以安裝助推器來提高近戰武器的攻擊速度。 

全套獎勵：可用[FF6666]近戰武器助推器[-]（安裝在手套中）。增加槍手能力造成的傷害。 

[DECEA3]修復需要修復套件（改進）。 [-]

English:
Light Armor
An improved version of the Enforcer Shoes.
These shoes will not soon become unusable. Increases stamina. It is much easier for you to maintain your balance during melee attacks.

Full Set Bonus: Available [FF6666]Melee Weapon Boost[-] (installed in gloves). Increases the damage of the Gunslinger ability.

[DECEA3]Repair requires repair kit (improved).[-]
Tchinese:
輕甲
執法者鞋子的改良版。

English:
Heavy Armor
An improved version of the Nerd Goggles. This headgear allows the nerd to learn significantly faster. You now gain more experience from trap kills.

English:
Heavy Armor
An improved version of the Raider Helmet. This headgear allows the Raider to regenerate health faster from healing received. You are now better trained in combat with melee weapons.

Melee damage significantly increased. Additionally, the damage of any ranged weapon is increased.

掠奪者頭盔的改良版。該頭飾可以讓襲擊者從接受的治療中更快地恢復生命值。現在您在使用近戰武器進行戰鬥方面得到了更好的訓練。

English:
Heavy Armor
An improved version of the Raider Outfit. If you're too close to zombies, they'll eventually deal damage. The key is to quickly recover and move on. Accelerates recovery from critical injuries. Increased health.

[DECEA3]Full Set Bonus:[-]
Melee damage significantly increased. Additionally, the damage of any ranged weapon is increased.

[DECEA3]The «Boost» modification is not installed on this set.

掠奪者服裝的改良版。如果你距離殭屍太近，它們最終會造成傷害。關鍵是要快速恢復並繼續前進。加速從嚴重傷害中恢復。生命值增加。 

[DECEA3]全套獎勵：[-]
近戰傷害顯著增加。此外，任何遠程武器的傷害都會增加。

Heavy Armor
An improved version of the Raider Gloves. These gloves make it easy to wield any weapon. Increases weapon reload speed and significantly increases melee attack speed.

[DECEA3]Full Set Bonus:[-]
Melee damage significantly increased. Additionally, the damage of any ranged weapon is increased.

[DECEA3]The «Boost» modification is not installed on this set.

Heavy Armor
An improved version of the Raider Boots. When crawling through mountains, it's best not to look down. Increases your safe fall height. It makes it much easier to maintain your balance during melee attacks.

[DECEA3]Full Set Bonus:[-]
Melee damage significantly increased. Additionally, the damage of any ranged weapon is increased.

[DECEA3]The «Boost» modification is not installed on this set.

Tchinese: 中號套裝 [DECEA3]3[-] 隨機製作技能雜誌。 \n包括每本雜誌的 [DECEA3]4[-] 份副本。

Tchinese: 一大捆[DECEA3]《家庭烹飪週刊》[-] 雜誌。它還包括食物和水。

Tchinese: 迷你自行車的零件之一。

English: One of the parts of the motorcycle.
One of the parts of the 4x4 truck.
One of the parts of the gyrocopter.

A commander is still a commander. Even after turning, he still supports his soldiers.

[FFB800]SPECIAL STATE:[-]
While the major is alive, damage to his squad is reduced by [DECEA3]25%[-]. When his health drops below [DECEA3]50%[-], the commander will go into a rage, increasing his subordinates' defense to [DECEA3]50%[-], and their damage and attack speed by [DECEA3]25%[-].

Focus on taking him down first.
Tchinese:
指揮官仍然是指揮官。即使在轉身後，他仍然支持他的士兵。 

[FFB800]特殊狀態：[-]
當少校還活著時，他的小隊受到的傷害會減少[DECEA3]25%[-]。當他的生命值低於[DECEA3]50%[-]時，指揮官會暴怒，將部下的防禦力提高到[DECEA3]50%[-]，傷害和攻擊速度提高[DECEA3]25%[-]。 

集中精力先打倒他。

English:
Everyone who loves building also loves breaking. And with a good foreman, you can break anything.

[FFB800]SPECIAL STATE:[-]
While the foreman is alive, his team deals [DECEA3]50%[-] more damage to blocks. If the foreman's health drops below half, he will go into a rage — and his builders' damage doubles.

Your main task is to take him out first.
Tchinese:
每個熱愛建造的人也都喜歡破壞。有了一個好的工頭，你可以破壞任何東西。 

[FFB800]特殊狀態：[-]
當工頭還活著時，他的團隊對物塊造成的傷害增加 [DECEA3]50%[-]。如果工頭的生命值低於一半，他就會暴怒──而他的建造者的傷害就會加倍。 

你的主要任務是先把他幹掉。

English:
Turning into a zombie is not a valid excuse for shirking work, especially when the boss is nearby. Any office worker knows that perfectly well.

[FFB800]SPECIAL STATE:[-]
While the boss is alive, all office workers move [DECEA3]25%[-] faster. If the boss's health drops below half, he will go into a rage and double his subordinates' mobility.

Your task is to carry out unscheduled layoffs, starting with him.
Tchinese:
變成殭屍並不是逃避工作的有效藉口，尤其是當老闆在附近時。任何辦公室工作人員都非常清楚這一點。 

[FFB800]特殊狀態：[-]
當老闆還活著時，所有辦公室工作人員的移動速度[DECEA3]25%[-]快。如果老闆的生命值低於一半，他就會暴怒，並使下屬的行動力加倍。 

你的任務是進行計劃外裁員，從他開始。

English:
A ruthless killer whose cruelty was not softened even by turning into a zombie. Even after death, the prisoners unconsciously obey him.

[FFB800]SPECIAL STATE:[-]
While the Authority is alive, all prisoners deal [DECEA3]25%[-] more damage. If the Authority's health drops below half, he will go into a rage and increase the prisoners' damage by [DECEA3]50%[-].

Take him out first.
Tchinese:
殘忍的殺手，即使變成殭屍，其殘忍程度也沒有減弱。即使死後，囚犯們也會無意識地服從他。 

[FFB800]特殊狀態：[-]
當權力機構還活著時，所有囚犯都會造成[DECEA3]25%[-]更多傷害。如果管理局的生命值低於一半，他會暴怒並使囚犯的傷害增加[DECEA3]50%[-]。 

先幹掉他。

English:
Even the smartest ones did not escape the fate of becoming infected. But, apparently, this specimen not only retained its intelligence but also developed a telepathic connection with its colleagues.

[FFB800]PASSIVE EFFECT:[-]
While the professor is alive, all scientists and researchers deal [DECEA3]10%[-] more damage and take [DECEA3]10%[-] less damage. Furthermore, if the professor's health is above [DECEA3]50%[-], you receive only half the experience for kills.

[FFB800]SPECIAL STATE:[-]
When the professor's health drops below [DECEA3]50%[-], he goes into a rage, increasing his subordinates' damage and defense by [DECEA3]25%[-].

Eliminating him will not only weaken the squad but also allow you to gain full experience again.
Tchinese:
即使是最聰明的人也難逃被感染的命運。但是，顯然，這個樣本不僅保留了它的智力，而且還與同事建立了心靈感應聯繫。 

[FFB800]被動效果：[-]
當教授還活著時，所有科學家和研究人員造成的傷害增加[DECEA3]10%[-]，受到的傷害減少[DECEA3]10%[-]。此外，如果教授的生命值高於[DECEA3]50%[-]，你只會獲得一半的擊殺經驗。 

[FFB800]特殊狀態：[-]
當教授的生命值低於[DECEA3]50%[-]時，他會暴怒，使下屬的傷害和防禦增加[DECEA3]25%[-]。 

消滅他不僅會削弱能力組隊的同時也能讓你再次獲得充分的經驗。

English:
This is the body of a stalker. He has been buried and mourned many times, but each time he returned — alive, but battered. This time, it seems, everything is different... Or is it?

[FFB800]SPECIAL PROPERTIES:[-]
He is unaffected by terrain slowdowns. He never liked to share, and now he will not give up his loot so easily ([DECEA3]50%[-] chance to get loot).

[FFB800]SPECIAL STATE:[-]
When his health drops below [DECEA3]50%[-], there is a [DECEA3]50%[-] chance he will summon his shadow — a particularly vile and annoying creature.
Be careful!
Tchinese:
這是跟蹤者的屍體。他曾多次被埋葬和哀悼，但每次他回來時都活著，但都受到了重創。這一次，似乎一切都不同了……還是嗎？ 

[FFB800]特殊屬性：[-]
他不受地形減速的影響。他從來不喜歡分享，現在他不會輕易放棄他的戰利品（[DECEA3]50%[-]機會獲得戰利品）。 

[FFB800]特殊狀態：[-]
當他的生命值低於[DECEA3]50%[-]時，他有[DECEA3]50%[-]機會召喚他的影子－一種特別邪惡和煩人的生物。 
小心！

English:
He is a living legend of these lands. Perhaps the only one, but what a legend! Others learn to survive and win by his example.

[FFB800]SPECIAL PROPERTIES:[-]
He is unaffected by terrain slowdowns, and he grants slowdown resistance to all nearby zombies. Each attack from his gang restores [DECEA3]150[-] health to them. They do love to eat.

[FFB800]SPECIAL STATE:[-]
When his health drops below [DECEA3]50%[-], he increases the movement speed of all zombies by [DECEA3]20%[-], and their health restoration from attacks rises to [DECEA3]250[-]

A particularly dangerous and annoying creature. Be careful!
Tchinese:
他是這片土地上活生生的傳奇人物。也許是唯一的一個，但這是多麼傳奇啊！其他人以他為榜樣，學習如何生存並獲勝。 

[FFB800]特殊屬性：[-]
他不受地形減速的影響，並且對附近所有殭屍具有減速抵抗力。他的幫派的每次攻擊都會為他們恢復 [DECEA3]150[-] 生命值。他們確實喜歡吃東西。 

[FFB800]特殊狀態：[-]
當他的生命值下降到 [DECEA3]50%[-] 以下時，他會將所有殭屍的移動速度提高 [DECEA3]20%[-]，並且攻擊後的生命恢復值上升到 [DECEA3]250[-]


的一種特別危險和煩人的生物。當心！

English: The Devourer is on the hunt

You have heard of him in the nightmares of experienced wanderers. Now he is here. The very sight of this creature chills the soul and paralyzes the will. If you are not ready to face this horror face to face — LEAVE!

[FFB800]SPECIAL PROPERTIES:[-]
This creature never walks alone and is able to summon its minions in times of danger.
Additional weak sanity drain every second while you are nearby.

Your vision goes dark and everything starts spinning. But you can still RUN!!!
Tchinese:
你在經驗豐富的流浪者的惡夢中聽說過他。現在他來了。看到這種生物就讓人心寒、意志麻痺。如果你還沒準備好面對面面對這個恐怖－離開！ 

[FFB800]特殊屬性：[-]
這個生物從不獨行，能夠在危險時召喚它的爪牙。 
當你在附近時，每秒鐘都會有額外的弱理智消耗。 

你的視野變暗，一切都開始旋轉。但你還是可以跑！

English: Bear Daddy is on the hunt

You have heard of him in the nightmares of experienced wanderers. Now he is here. The very sight of this creature terrifies you. If you are not ready to face this horror face to face — LEAVE!

[FFB800]SPECIAL PROPERTIES:[-]
Bear Daddy never walks alone. If he senses danger, he can call minions.
Additional weak sanity drain every second while you are nearby.

RUN!!! While your legs still remember how to move.
Tchinese:
你在經驗豐富的流浪者的惡夢中聽說過他。現在他來了。看到這種生物就會讓你感到恐懼。如果你還沒準備好面對面面對這個恐怖－離開！ 

[FFB800]特殊屬性：[-]
熊爸爸永遠不會獨行。如果他感覺到危險，他可以召喚小兵。 
當你在附近時，每秒鐘都會消耗額外的弱理智。 

快跑！ ！ ！當你的腿仍然記得如何移動。

English:
They whispered about him around the campfires. Now he is here. His claws cast long shadows, and his breath smells of rotting lungs. You feel your mind betraying you — your heart pounds in your throat, your fingers go numb, and only one thought hammers in your temples...
RUN. BEFORE IT'S TOO LATE.

[FFB800]SPECIAL PROPERTIES:[-]
Gargul never flies alone. In danger, he calls others.
Near him, you slowly go insane: sanity drains away with every second.

RUN. While your legs still obey.
Tchinese:
他們圍著篝火低聲議論著他。現在他來了。他的爪子投下長長的影子，他的呼吸充滿了腐爛的肺部的味道。你感覺你的思想背叛了你－你的心跳到了喉嚨，你的手指變得麻木，只有一個念頭敲打著你的太陽穴…
跑。在為時已晚之前。 

[FFB800]特殊屬性：[-]
Gargul 永遠不會單獨飛行。在危險中，他呼叫其他人。 
在他身邊，你會慢慢變得瘋狂：理智每一秒都在消失。 

奔跑。當你的腿仍然服從。

English: The Venom is on the hunt

Everyone thinks that truly large snakes are only found in the tropics. How wrong they are. It's hard to tell whether this is one snake or a cluster of several, but it's better not to look too closely. The very sight of this creature chills the soul and paralyzes the will. If you are not ready to face this horror face to face — LEAVE!

[FFB800]SPECIAL PROPERTIES:[-]
This creature never walks alone and is able to summon its minions in times of danger.
Additional weak sanity drain every second while you are nearby.

Your vision goes dark and everything starts spinning. But you can still RUN!!!
Tchinese:
每個人都認為真正的大蛇只存在於熱帶地區。他們是多麼錯誤。很難判斷這是一條蛇還是一群蛇，但最好不要看得太近。看到這種生物就讓人心寒、意志麻痺。如果你還沒準備好面對面面對這個恐怖－離開！ 

[FFB800]特殊屬性：[-]
這個生物從不獨行，能夠在危險時召喚它的爪牙。 
當你在附近時，每秒鐘都會有額外的弱理智消耗。 

你的視野變暗，一切都開始旋轉。但你還是可以跑！

English:
This woman in a torn wedding dress knows no peace. Even zombies avoid her. And now she is looking right at you.

[FFB800]SPECIAL PROPERTIES:[-]
When taking damage, she flies into a hysteria, becoming even more dangerous.
Additional weak sanity drain every second while you are nearby.

The air turns icy, a wedding march rings in your ears. Don't look her in the eyes — RUN while your heart is still beating.
Tchinese:
這個穿著撕破婚紗的女人不得安寧。連殭屍都會避開她。現在她正看著你。 

[FFB800]特殊屬性：[-]
受到傷害時，她會陷入歇斯底里，變得更加危險。 
當你在附近時，每秒鐘都會有額外的微弱理智流失。 

空氣變得冰冷，婚禮進行曲在你耳邊響起。不要看她的眼睛－趁你的心臟還在跳動時跑。

English: Burning Flesh is on the hunt

No one knows what hides inside this blazing creature and why the flame never goes out. Anything that approaches it gets charred in its infernal heat. If you are not ready to face it, you'd better run.

[FFB800]SPECIAL PROPERTIES:[-]
When taking damage, it may ignite everything around it.
Additional weak sanity drain every second while you are nearby.

The air melts from the heat, metal smokes. Your skin blisters, and your consciousness clouds with pain. RUN while your flesh has not yet begun to smolder!
Tchinese:
沒有人知道這個燃燒的生物體內隱藏著什麼，也沒有人知道為什麼火焰永遠不會熄滅。任何接近它的東西都會被它的地獄般的熱氣燒焦。如果你還沒準備好面對它，你最好逃跑。 

[FFB800]特殊屬性：[-]
受到傷害時，它可能會點燃周圍的一切。 
當你在附近時，每秒鐘都會有額外的弱理智流失。 

空氣因熱而融化，金屬冒煙。你的皮膚起水泡，你的意識因疼痛而變得模糊。趁你的肉體還沒開始悶燒的時候跑吧！

English:
This body is not just a zombie. It is a walking incubator of a deadly strain, the concentration of the virus that changed the world.

[FFB800]SPECIAL PROPERTIES:[-]
Radiation levels around the creature are significantly elevated. All nearby zombies gain increased resistance to physical damage.
Additional weak sanity drain every second while you are nearby.

The air thickens, instruments go off the scale. You feel radiation eating away at your body, and your consciousness clouds. RUN before your cells begin to mutate!
Tchinese:
這個身體不只是殭屍。它是致命病毒株的行走孵化器，這種病毒的濃度改變了世界。 

[FFB800]特殊屬性：[-]
該生物周圍的輻射量顯著升高。附近所有殭屍對物理傷害的抵抗力都會增強。 
當你在附近時，每秒鐘都會有額外的弱理智消耗。 

空氣變得黏稠，儀器失靈。你感覺到輻射正在侵蝕你的身體，你的意識也變得模糊。在你的細胞開始變異之前奔跑吧！

English:
Hunters told legends about him around campfires. Now those legends have become your nightmare. His skin writhes, forming a liquid armor with each wound. Bullets bounce off like peas from a wall, but steel... steel he still remembers.

[FFB800]SPECIAL PROPERTIES:[-]
Each wound strengthens the protective layer, making the creature immune to bullets. It is better to use melee weapons to kill this creature.
Additional weak sanity drain every second while you are nearby.

If you do not have a sharp blade and nerves of steel — RUN before the beast starts charging at you with the fury of a wounded animal.
Tchinese:
獵人們在營火旁講述關於他的傳說。現在那些傳說已經成為你的惡夢。他的皮膚扭動著，每一道傷口都形成了一層液體鎧甲。子彈像豌豆從牆上彈開一樣彈開，但鋼…鋼他還是記得。 

[FFB800]特殊屬性：[-]
每個傷口都會強化保護層，使該生物免疫子彈。最好使用近戰武器來殺死這個生物。 
當你在附近時，每秒鐘都會消耗額外的微弱理智。 

如果你沒有鋒利的刀片和鋼鐵般的意志——在野獸開始以受傷動物的憤怒向你衝鋒之前逃跑。

English:
What do you get when you cross a strongman with a bull? Now you see the answer before you — and it is a nightmare of flesh and fury. This creature knows no fatigue, and its strikes flatten any fortifications. One direct hit — and you're done. Think three times before engaging in battle.

[FFB800]SPECIAL PROPERTIES:[-]
When the boss takes damage, he goes into a frenzy. Its movements speed up by [DECEA3]50%[-], attacks become [DECEA3]60%[-] more frequent, and each hit knocks you down. However, in this state, its damage resistance is reduced by [DECEA3]30%[-].
Periodically, the boss enters a full defense mode, creating a dangerous radiation zone around itself. In this state, it is completely invulnerable to any type of attack.

The lights go out, reality distorts. But survival instinct screams one thing: SAVE YOURSELF! While your bones are still intact!
Tchinese:
當強人和公牛相遇時，你會得到什麼？現在你看到了答案──這是一場血肉與憤怒的惡夢。這種生物不知疲倦，它的攻擊可以摧毀任何防禦工事。直接一擊——你就完成了。戰鬥前三思而後行。 

[FFB800]特殊屬性：[-]
當boss受到傷害時，他會陷入瘋狂。它的移動速度加快 [DECEA3]50%[-]，攻擊更頻繁 [DECEA3]60%[-]，每次攻擊都會將你擊倒。然而，在這種狀態下，它的傷害抗性會降低[DECEA3]30%[-]。 
Boss會定期進入全面防禦模式，在其周圍形成一個危險的輻射區域。在這種狀態下，它完全不受任何類型的攻擊。 

燈光熄滅，現實扭曲。但生存本能呼喚一件事：拯救自己！趁你的骨頭還完好無損！

English:
What happens if you connect an irradiated zombie to the grid? Apparently, someone decided to conduct this insane experiment! Now this creature emits deadly discharges. Even a brief approach to it threatens imminent death.

[FFB800]SPECIAL PROPERTIES:[-]
When the boss takes damage, he goes into a frenzy. Its movements speed up by [DECEA3]50%[-], attacks become [DECEA3]60%[-] more frequent, and each hit knocks you down. However, in this state, its damage resistance is reduced by [DECEA3]30%[-], opening a window for counterattack.
Periodically, the boss enters a full defense mode, creating a dangerous radiation zone around itself. In this state, it is completely invulnerable to any type of attack.

The air crackles with static, your hair stands on end, and your body convulses. RETREAT before your heart stops from the discharge!
Tchinese:
如果將受輻射的殭屍連接到電網會發生什麼事？顯然，有人決定進行這個瘋狂的實驗！現在這個生物會發出致命的放電。即使是短暫的接近它也會有迫在眉睫的死亡威脅。 

[FFB800]特殊屬性：[-]
當 Boss 受到傷害時，他會陷入瘋狂。它的移動速度加快 [DECEA3]50%[-]，攻擊更頻繁 [DECEA3]60%[-]，每次攻擊都會將你擊倒。然而，在這種狀態下，它的傷害抗性會降低[DECEA3]30%[-]，打開反擊的視窗。 
Boss會定期進入全面防禦模式，在其周圍形成危險的輻射區。在這種狀態下，它完全不受任何類型的攻擊。 

空氣中充滿靜電，你的頭髮豎起來，你的身體抽搐。在您的心臟因放電而停止跳動之前撤退！

English:
This creature once belonged to an elite unit. Beer and the virus did their job, but could not kill the combat instincts. Do not underestimate someone who spent decades honing their killing skills — even in this form. The brotherhood in arms turned out to be stronger than death, and now he is not alone.

[FFB800]SPECIAL PROPERTIES:[-]
Approaching him is dangerous — with a precise strike, he can knock the weapon out of your hands, discarding it like useless junk. Your weapon degrades twice as fast under his influence.
Periodically, the Boss calls in the brotherhood in arms! For its duration, all enemies within a [DECEA3]20[-] meter radius gain: [DECEA3]+25%[-] mobility and [DECEA3]-50%[-] incoming damage.
At the same time, physical damage resistance is reduced by [DECEA3]25%[-].
Additional weak sanity drain every second while you are nearby.

It smells of death and war. In your head — the echo of foreign commands. RUN AWAY while you still hold your weapon.
Tchinese:
這種生物曾經屬於一個精英部隊。啤酒和病毒發揮了作用，但無法消滅戰鬥本能。不要低估一個花了幾十年時間磨練殺戮技巧的人——即使是以這種形式。事實證明，兄弟情誼比死亡更強大，現在他並不孤單。 

[FFB800]特殊屬性：[-]
接近他是危險的－透過精確的打擊，他可以將武器從你手中擊落，像無用的垃圾一樣丟棄。在他的影響下，你的武器退化速度會加快兩倍。 
Boss 會定期召集武裝兄弟會！在此期間，[DECEA3]20[-]公尺半徑內的所有敵人獲得：[DECEA3]+25%[-]移動力和[DECEA3]-50%[-]傳入傷害。 
同時，物理傷害抗性降低[DECEA3]25%[-]。 
當你在附近時，每秒鐘都會有額外的微弱理智消耗。 

充滿死亡和戰爭的味道。在你的腦海中——外國命令的迴響。趁你還拿著武器逃跑。

English: Ancient Yeti is on the hunt

The existence of these creatures is still considered fiction. If the virus can distort ordinary people and animals, then what has it done to this creature? Even from a distance, you feel the piercing cold emanating from it.

[FFB800]SPECIAL PROPERTIES:[-]
When the boss takes damage, he goes into a frenzy. Its movements speed up by [DECEA3]50%[-], attacks become [DECEA3]60%[-] more frequent, and each hit knocks you down. However, in this state, its damage resistance is reduced by [DECEA3]30%[-].
Periodically, the boss calls for backup. For its duration, all enemies within a [DECEA3]20[-] meter radius gain: [DECEA3]+25%[-] mobility and [DECEA3]-75%[-] incoming damage.
At the same time, physical damage resistance is reduced by [DECEA3]25%[-], and damage to the boss himself is increased by [DECEA3]25%[-]. Additional weak sanity drain every second while you are nearby.

The air freezes your lungs, the cold eats away at your soul. RUN before your body becomes an icy monument!
Tchinese:
這些生物的存在仍然被認為是虛構的。如果病毒能夠扭曲普通人和動物，那麼它對這個生物造成了什麼影響呢？即使距離很遠，你也能感受到它散發出的刺骨寒冷。 

[FFB800]特殊屬性：[-]
當 Boss 受到傷害時，他會陷入瘋狂。它的移動速度加快 [DECEA3]50%[-]，攻擊更頻繁 [DECEA3]60%[-]，每次攻擊都會將你擊倒。然而，在這種狀態下，它的傷害抗性會降低[DECEA3]30%[-]。 
Boss會定期呼叫支援。在此期間，[DECEA3]20[-]公尺半徑內的所有敵人獲得：[DECEA3]+25%[-]移動力和[DECEA3]-75%[-]傳入傷害。 
同時，物理傷害抗性降低[DECEA3]25%[-]，對 Boss 本身的傷害提高[DECEA3]25%[-]。當你在附近時，每秒都會消耗額外的微弱理智。 

空氣凍結你的肺部，寒冷吞噬你的靈魂。在你的身體變成冰冷的紀念碑之前跑吧！

English: Your body gradually freezes from the terrible cold. Your mobility and weapon reload speed decrease every second until you freeze in place. Also, every second you lose [DECEA3]18[-] stamina and significantly drain your overall reserves.
Tchinese: 你的身體逐漸因嚴寒而結冰。你的機動性和武器裝填速度每秒都會降低，直到你僵在原地。此外，每一秒你都會失去 [DECEA3]18[-] 耐力並顯著耗盡你的整體儲備。

English:
In the most dangerous radiation zones, there lives a creature best avoided.
But if you see it — assume the encounter has already begun.

This creature never hunts alone: it draws other rare creatures to itself.
An enemy of the highest threat level.
Getting hit by it is almost guaranteed death.
Think twice before engaging it in battle.
Radiation levels nearby are significantly elevated.

Its very sight terrifies you.
Every second nearby drains your sanity.
Your vision darkens, the world starts to blur…
BUT YOU CAN STILL RUN!!!
Tchinese:
在最危險的輻射區域中，生活著一種生物，最好避免。 
但如果你看到它 - 假設遭遇已經開始。 

這種生物從不單獨捕獵：它會吸引其他稀有生物到自己身邊。 
威脅等級最高的敵人。 
被它擊中幾乎肯定會死亡。 
在與它戰鬥之前三思而後行。 
附近的輻射量顯著升高。 

它的景象讓你感到恐懼。 
附近的每一秒都會耗盡你的能量理智。 
你的視野變暗，世界開始模糊......
但你還是可以跑！

English:
You've driven the Boss into a rage. Better run away!
His movement speed is increased by [DECEA3]50%[-], his attack speed is increased by [DECEA3]60%[-], and any of his attacks will knock you down.

However, his damage resistance is reduced by [DECEA3]30%[-].
Tchinese:
你已經把老闆惹怒了。最好逃走！ 
他的移動速度提高[DECEA3]50%[-]，攻擊速度提高[DECEA3]60%[-]，他的任何攻擊都會將你擊倒。 

但是，他的傷害抗性降低[DECEA3]30%[-]。

English: The Boss has gone into deep defense. He emits strong radiation, be careful!\nIt's better not to hit him for now. He is invulnerable to any type of damage.
Tchinese: Boss 已進入深度防禦。他會發出很強的輻射，小心！ \n暫時不要打他。他不會受到任何類型的傷害。

English: The carrier is reinforced by a defender. He neutralizes all damage.\nIt's better not to hit him for now. Kill the defender so you can deal damage.
Tchinese: 航母由防御者增援。他抵消了所有傷害。 \n現在最好不要打他。殺死防守者，這樣你就可以造成傷害。

English: The Carrier activated. Its movement speed and damage are significantly increased.\nKill the activator to deactivate it.
Tchinese: 運營商已啟動。它的移動速度和傷害顯著提高。 \n殺死啟動器以將其停用。

English: The boss feeds on your adrenaline. You take damage over time and are slowed down. Try to wait it out and stay alive.
Tchinese: 老闆以你的腎上腺素為食。隨著時間的推移，你會受到傷害並且速度會減慢。嘗試等待並保持活力。

English: The boss calls for a brotherhood in arms

The boss summons a brotherhood of arms. For the duration of the ability, all enemies within 20 meters of the boss receive a mobility bonus of [DECEA3]25%[-], and all damage taken by them is reduced by [DECEA3]50%[-]. In addition, your resistance to physical damage is reduced by [FFB800]25%[-].\nTry to wait it out and stay alive.
Tchinese: 老闆召集了兄弟會。在該技能持續時間內，boss周圍20公尺範圍內的所有敵人都會獲得[DECEA3]25%[-]的移動力加成，並且受到的所有傷害都會降低[DECEA3]50%[-]。此外，你對物理傷害的抵抗力會降低 [FFB800]25%[-]。 \n嘗試等待並保持活力。

English: The boss calls for reinforcements. For the duration of the ability, all ice claws within 20 meters of the boss receive a mobility bonus of [DECEA3]25%[-], and all damage to them is reduced by [DECEA3]75%[-]. However, damage to the boss itself is increased by [DECEA3]25%[-]. In addition, resistance to physical damage is reduced by [FFB800]25%[-].\nTry to wait it out and stay alive.
Tchinese: 老闆呼叫增援。在該能力持續時間內，Boss周圍20公尺範圍內的所有冰爪都會獲得[DECEA3]25%[-]的移動加成，並且對它們造成的所有傷害都會降低[DECEA3]75%[-]。然而，對 Boss 本身的傷害增加 [DECEA3]25%[-]。此外，對物理傷害的抵抗力會降低 [FFB800]25%[-]。 \n嘗試等待並保持活力。

English: You have opened up a nasty wound. You take periodic damage from blood loss.\nYour health is reduced by [FFB800]25[-] and your mobility is reduced by [FFB800]20%[-].
Tchinese: 你已經打開了一個討厭的傷口。你會因失血而受到週期性傷害。 \n你的生命值降低 [FFB800]25[-]，你的移動能力降低 [FFB800]20%[-]。

English: The bitch always knows where to hit.\nYour physical damage defense is reduced by [FFB800]50%[-].
Tchinese: 母狗總是知道該打哪裡。 \n你的物理傷害防禦力降低 [FFB800]50%[-]。

English: Your weapon has been knocked out of your hands
Tchinese: 你的武器已從你手中掉落

English: Veteran disarmed you.\nBreakage speed increased by [DECEA3]2x[-].
Tchinese: 老兵解除了你的武裝。 \n破壞速度提高了 [DECEA3]2x[-]。

English: You are being exposed to a strong radiation surge
Tchinese: 您正暴露在強烈的輻射浪中

English: The carrier emits critical radiation.\nWhile you are under the effect of the emission, you accumulate radiation every second. Your mobility is reduced by [DECEA3]30%[-]. Weapon spread is significantly increased.
Tchinese: 載體會發出臨界輻射。 \n當你受到輻射的影響時，你每秒鐘都會累積輻射。你的行動力降低[DECEA3]30%[-]。武器擴散顯著增加。
您感到中等程度的發燒

English: You feel a moderate heat. Your body is covered with small burns. Do not come closer or the burns will become more severe.
Tchinese: 您會感到適度的熱量。你的身體佈滿了小燒傷。不要靠近，否則燒傷會更加嚴重。

English: You feel a strong heat. Your body is covered with strong burns. Do not come closer or the burns will become more severe.
Tchinese: 你感到一股強烈的熱量。你的身體被嚴重燒傷。不要靠近，否則燒傷會更加嚴重。

English: You feel the heat of hell
Tchinese: 你感受到地獄般的熱度

English: You feel the heat of hell. Your body is covered with critical burns. Run away from the source of heat or you will burn.
Tchinese: 你感受到地獄般的熱度。你的身體被嚴重燒傷。遠離熱源，否則你會被燒傷。

English: Moderate gust of wind slows you down
Tchinese: 中等強度的風會減慢你的速度

English: Moderate gusts of wind slow you down.\nFind shelter so you can move.
Tchinese: 中度陣風會減慢你的速度。 \n尋找庇護所以便可以移動。

English: A strong gust of wind slows you down significantly
Tchinese: 一陣強風會讓你的速度明顯減慢

English: Strong gusts of wind slow you down considerably.\nFind shelter so you can move.
Tchinese: 強風會大大減慢你的速度。 \n尋找庇護所以便可以移動。

English: Unbearable impulse knocks you off your feet
Tchinese: 難以忍受的衝動讓你站不住腳

English: An unbearable gust of wind almost completely immobilizes you.\nYou cannot resist it for long; if you do not find shelter, it will knock you off your feet.
Tchinese: 一陣難以忍受的狂風幾乎讓你完全動彈不得。 \n你無法長時間抵抗它；你無法抵抗它。如果你找不到庇護所，它會讓你不知所措。

English: You are exposed to moderate radiation

English: When using a melee weapon, there is a chance to trigger a combo. Completing it grants a random bonus based on the combo's difficulty. The harder the combo, the greater the bonus.
Tchinese: 使用近戰武器時，有一定幾率觸發連擊。完成它會根據組合的難度給予隨機獎勵。如果連擊觸發，則有 [DECEA3]50%[-] 幾率晉級；如果這個機會成功，還有額外的 [DECEA3]50%[-] 機會，這將是困難的。組合越難，獎金越大。

English:
This item is handed over after completing the corresponding contract.

English: «Greetings survivor. There are a couple of extra parts from a minibike, but I'm not going to give them away so easily. Kill some [DECEA3]Janitors[-] and [DECEA3]Businessmen[-] and report this to any trader; he will give you a reward»\n\n[DECEA3]- Bob[-]
Tchinese: «問候倖存者。迷你自行車有一些額外的零件，但我不會輕易放棄它們。殺死一些[DECEA3]看門人[-]和[DECEA3]商人[-]並將此事報告給任何商人；他會給你獎勵»\n\n[DECEA3]- Bob[-]

English: «Greetings survivor. There are a couple of extra parts from a motorcycle, but I'm not going to give them away so easily. Kill some [DECEA3]Janitors[-] and [DECEA3]Bikers[-] and report this to any trader; he will give you a reward»\n\n[DECEA3]- Bob[-]
Tchinese: «問候倖存者。摩托車上有一些額外的零件，但我不會輕易放棄它們。殺死一些[DECEA3]看門人[-]和[DECEA3]騎車人[-]並將此報告給任何商人；他會給你獎勵»\n\n[DECEA3]- Bob[-]

English: «Greetings survivor. There are a couple of extra parts from a truck 4x4, but I'm not going to give them away so easily. Kill some [DECEA3]Janitors[-], [DECEA3]Moes[-] and [DECEA3]Tourists[-] and report this to any trader; he will give you a reward»\n\n[DECEA3]- Bob[-]
Tchinese: «問候倖存者。 4x4 卡車上有一些額外的零件，但我不會輕易放棄它們。殺死一些[DECEA3]看門人[-]、[DECEA3]莫斯[-]和[DECEA3]遊客[-]並將此報告給任何商人；他會給你獎勵»\n\n[DECEA3]- Bob[-]

English: «Greetings survivor. There are a couple of extra parts from a gyrocopter, but I'm not going to give them away so easily. Kill some [DECEA3]Janitors[-], [DECEA3]Soldiers[-], [DECEA3]Cops[-] and [DECEA3]Demolishers[-] and report this to any trader; he will give you a reward»\n\n[DECEA3]- Bob[-]
Tchinese: «問候倖存者。旋翼機還有一些額外的零件，但我不會輕易放棄它們。殺死一些[DECEA3]看門人[-]、[DECEA3]士兵[-]、[DECEA3]警察[-]和[DECEA3]破壞者[-]並向任何商人報告此事；他會給你獎勵»\n\n[DECEA3]- Bob[-]

English: «If you haven't died of hunger yet, then you will soon die of disease or worse. Well, in any case, any merchant can prepare drinking water and some food, of course, not for free. Collect the necessary ingredients and come when you are ready.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Rect[-]
Tchinese: «如果你還沒有死於飢餓，那麼你很快就會死於疾病或更糟的情況。好吧，不管怎樣，任何一個商家都可以準備飲用水和一些食物，當然，不是免費的。收集必要的原料，準備好後就來。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- 矩形[-]

English: «If you haven't died of hunger yet, then you will soon die of disease or worse. Well, in any case, any merchant can make a tasty drink and hearty food, of course, not for free. And if you're not hungry, you can learn a few useful recipes. Collect the necessary ingredients and come when you're ready.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Rect[-]
Tchinese: «如果你還沒有死於飢餓，那麼你很快就會死於疾病或更糟的情況。好吧，無論如何，任何商人都可以製作美味的飲料和豐盛的食物，當然，不是免費的。如果您不餓，您可以學習一些有用的食譜。收集必要的原料，準備好後就來。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- 矩形[-]

English: «If you haven't died of hunger yet, then you will soon die of disease or worse. Well, in any case, any merchant can make mineral water and a delicious soup, of course, not for free. And if you're not hungry, you can learn a few useful recipes. Collect the necessary ingredients and come when you're ready.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Rect[-]
Tchinese: «如果你還沒有死於飢餓，那麼你很快就會死於疾病或更糟的情況。好吧，無論如何，任何商家都可以製作礦泉水和美味的湯，當然，不是免費的。如果您不餓，您可以學習一些有用的食譜。收集必要的原料，準備好後就來。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- 矩形[-]

English: «If you haven't died of hunger yet, then you will soon die of disease or worse. Well, in any case, any merchant can make smoothies and homemade food, of course, not for free. And if you're not hungry, you can learn a few useful recipes. Collect the necessary ingredients and come when you're ready.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Rect[-]
Tchinese: «如果你還沒有死於飢餓，那麼你很快就會死於疾病或更糟的情況。好吧，無論如何，任何商家都可以製作冰沙和自製食品，當然，不是免費的。如果您不餓，您可以學習一些有用的食譜。收集必要的原料，準備好後就來。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- 矩形[-]

English: «I'm glad your health is okay. Or is it? Either way, I know how you can improve it. If you can kill a few [DECEA3]Nurses[-], examine their bodies carefully. They may have useful medicines on them. Let me know when you've managed to sort this out.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Jen[-]
Tchinese: «我很高興你的健康狀況良好。或者是嗎？不管怎樣，我知道你可以如何改進它。如果你能殺死一些[DECEA3]護士[-]，請仔細檢查他們的屍體。他們身上可能有有用的藥物。當你設法解決這個問題時請告訴我。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- Jen[-]

English: «I'm glad you're healthy. Or are you? Either way, I know how you can fix it. If you can kill a few [DECEA3]Nurses[-] and [DECEA3]Hazmat[-], examine their bodies carefully. They might have useful medicines on them. Let me know when you've managed to sort this out. If you wish, I can share a couple of useful medical journals.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Jen[-]
Tchinese: «我很高興你身體健康。或者你是？不管怎樣，我知道你該如何解決它。如果你能殺死一些[DECEA3]護士[-]和[DECEA3]危險品[-]，請仔細檢查他們的屍體。他們身上可能有有用的藥物。當你設法解決這個問題時請告訴我。如果您願意，我可以分享一些有用的醫學期刊。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- Jen[-]

English: «I'm glad you're healthy. Or are you? Either way, I know how you can improve it. If you can kill a few [DECEA3]Nurses[-], [DECEA3]Hazmat[-], and [DECEA3]Mutated[-], examine their bodies carefully. They may have useful medicines on them. Let me know when you've managed to sort this out. If you wish, I can share a couple of useful medical journals.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Jen[-]
Tchinese: «我很高興你身體健康。或者你是？不管怎樣，我知道你可以如何改進它。如果你能殺死一些[DECEA3]護士[-]、[DECEA3]危險品[-]和[DECEA3]變異[-]，請仔細檢查他們的屍體。他們身上可能有有用的藥物。當你設法解決這個問題時請告訴我。如果您願意，我可以分享一些有用的醫學期刊。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- Jen[-]

English: «A strong structure never hurt anyone. Build a frame and strengthen it with wood, and I will help you with everything you need for construction. When you are done, tell any trader that you are from me, they will give you resources. If you want, I can share notes on how to build better.»\n\n[DECEA3]- da Vinci[-]
Tchinese: «堅固的結構永遠不會傷害任何人。建造一個框架並用木頭加固它，我會幫助你完成建造所需的一切。當你完成後，告訴任何交易者你是我的，他們會給你資源。如果您願意，我可以分享有關如何建立更好的筆記。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- 達文西[-]

English: «This is already more like a construction. Strengthen your structure with cobblestones, and I will help you with everything you need for construction. When you finish, tell any trader that you are from me, they will give you resources. If you want, I can share notes on how to build better.»\n\n[DECEA3]- da Vinci[-]
Tchinese: «這已經更像是一棟建築了。用鵝卵石加固你的結構，我會幫助你完成建造所需的一切。當你完成後，告訴任何交易者你是我的，他們會給你資源。如果您願意，我可以分享有關如何建立更好的筆記。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- 達文西[-]
[71FFE7]合約：[-] 經驗豐富的建造者

English: «It looks solid, but there is room for improvement. Strengthen your structure with cement, and I will help you with everything you need for construction. When you are done, tell any trader that you are from me, they will give you resources. If you want, I can share notes on how to build better.»\n\n[DECEA3]- da Vinci[-]
Tchinese: 「看起來很可靠，但還有改進的空間。用水泥加固您的結構，我將幫助您完成施工所需的一切。當你完成後，告訴任何交易者你是我的，他們會給你資源。如果您願意，我可以分享有關如何構建更好的筆記。»\n\n[DECEA3]- 達文西[-]

English: «You can never have too much water. I improved the standard dew collector, and now it gathers much more water. If you collect enough resources, I'm ready to share my invention.»\n\n[DECEA3]- da Vinci[-]
Tchinese: «水永遠不嫌多。我改進了標準露水收集器，現在它可以收集更多的水。如果您收集了足夠的資源，我就準備好分享我的發明。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- 達文西[-]

English: «To build anything more complex than a stone shovel, you'll need a comfortable workbench. If you gather enough resources, I'm willing to share one of my workbenches. If you want, I can share notes on creating workstations.»\n\n[DECEA3]- da Vinci[-]
Tchinese: «要建造比石鏟更複雜的東西，您需要一個舒適的工作台。如果您收集了足夠的資源，我願意分享我的一個工作台。如果您願意，我可以分享有關建立工作站的筆記。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- 達文西[-]

English: «Any large construction requires a lot of cement, I know this from my own experience. And the garden also needs fertilizer. I slightly modified the regular cement mixer and now it works much faster. If you collect enough resources, I am ready to share one of these.»\n\n[DECEA3]- da Vinci[-]
Tchinese: 「任何大型建築都需要大量水泥，我從自己的經驗中知道這一點。花園也需要肥料。我稍微修改了普通水泥攪拌機，現在它的工作速度更快了。如果您收集了足夠的資源，我準備分享其中之一。»\n\n[DECEA3]- 達文西[-]

English: «A good blacksmith has always been in demand. But it takes more than skill alone — you also need a proper forge. First, let's see what your hands are really capable of. If you collect enough resources, I'm ready to share one of my forges.»\n\n[DECEA3]- da Vinci[-]
Tchinese: 「一直以來都需要優秀的鐵匠。但這不僅僅需要技巧——你還需要適當的鍛造。首先，讓我們看看你的雙手到底能做什麼。如果您收集了足夠的資源，我就準備分享我的鍛造廠之一。»\n\n[DECEA3]- 達文西[-]

English: «A good chemist can cobble together a bomb out of almost anything. An experienced chemist also knows that a proper chemistry station matters. I recently upgraded one of mine. If you collect enough resources, I'm ready to share the invention.»\n\n[DECEA3]- da Vinci[-]
Tchinese: 「一個優秀的化學家幾乎可以用任何東西拼湊出炸彈。經驗豐富的化學家也知道合適的化學站很重要。我最近升級了我的一台。如果您收集了足夠的資源，我就準備分享這項發明。»\n\n[DECEA3]- 達文西[-]

English: «By killing zombies you can get not only valuable items, but also useful knowledge. Kill a few [DECEA3]any zombies[-] and [DECEA3]Businessmen[-] and come back to me when you're done. I think I can find some useful literature for you.»\n\n[DECEA3]- da Vinci[-]
Tchinese: «殺死殭屍你不僅可以獲得有價值的物品，還可以獲得有用的知識。殺死一些[DECEA3]任何殭屍[-]和[DECEA3]商人[-]，完成後回來找我。我想我可以找到一些對你有用的文獻。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- 達文西[-]

English: «If you want good armor, be prepared to gather resources for it. Kill some [DECEA3]Rabbits[-] or [DECEA3]Snakes[-] and butcher their bodies. Gather the necessary resources and come back when you're ready. You'll be rewarded with a supply of thread and useful resources. If you'd like, I can share a couple of useful magazines about types of ammunition and armor.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Hugh[-]
Tchinese: «如果你想要好的盔甲，就準備好為其收集資源。殺死一些[DECEA3]兔子[-]或[DECEA3]蛇[-]並屠宰他們的屍體。收集必要的資源，準備好後再回來。您將獲得大量線索和有用資源作為獎勵。如果您願意，我可以分享一些有關彈藥和裝甲類型的有用雜誌。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- Hugh[-]

English: «For strong armor, you need better resources. Kill some [DECEA3]Wolves[-], [DECEA3]Coyotes[-] or [DECEA3]Boars[-] and butcher their bodies. Collect the necessary resources and come back when you're ready. As a reward, you'll get a supply of armor crafting kits and useful resources. If you'd like, I can share a couple of useful magazines about types of ammunition and armor.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Hugh[-]
Tchinese: «為了獲得堅固的盔甲，你需要更好的資源。殺死一些[DECEA3]狼[-]、[DECEA3]土狼[-]或[DECEA3]野豬[-]並屠宰他們的屍體。收集必要的資源，準備好後再回來。作為獎勵，您將獲得一批盔甲製作套件和有用的資源。如果您願意，我可以分享一些有關彈藥和裝甲類型的有用雜誌。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- Hugh[-]

English: «Rare armor requires a lot of rare resources. Kill a few [DECEA3]Bears[-] or [DECEA3]Mountain Lions[-] and butcher their bodies. Collect the necessary resources and come back when you're ready. You'll be rewarded with a supply of improved armor kits and useful resources. If you'd like, I can share a couple of useful magazines about types of gear and armor.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Hugh[-]
Tchinese: «稀有盔甲需要大量稀有資源。殺死一些[DECEA3]熊[-]或[DECEA3]山獅[-]並屠宰他們的屍體。收集必要的資源，準備好後再回來。您將獲得一系列改進的裝甲套件和有用的資源作為獎勵。如果您願意，我可以分享一些有關裝備和裝甲類型的有用雜誌。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- 休[-]

English: «Even the simplest repair can extend the life of any equipment. Kill a few [DECEA3]any zombies[-] to find repair parts. Collect the necessary resources and come back when you are ready. As a reward, you will receive a stock of repair kits and useful resources. If you wish, I can share a couple of useful magazines about types of ammunition and armor.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Hugh[-]
Tchinese: «即使是最簡單的維修也可以延長任何設備的使用壽命。殺死一些[DECEA3]任何殭屍[-]以找到修復零件。收集必要的資源，準備好後再回來。作為獎勵，您將收到大量維修套件和有用的資源。如果您願意，我可以分享一些有關彈藥和裝甲類型的有用雜誌。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- 休[-]

English: «A good repair can extend the life of any gear. Kill a few [DECEA3]any zombies[-] to find repair parts. Collect the necessary resources and come back when you are ready. As a reward, you will receive a stock of improved repair kits, legendary parts or useful resources. If you want, I can share a couple of useful magazines about types of ammunition and armor.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Hugh[-]
Tchinese: «良好的維修可以延長任何齒輪的使用壽命。殺死一些[DECEA3]任何殭屍[-]以找到修復零件。收集必要的資源，準備好後再回來。作為獎勵，您將收到大量改進的維修套件、傳奇零件或有用的資源。如果您願意，我可以分享一些有關彈藥和裝甲類型的有用雜誌。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- 休[-]

English: «Overhaul can extend the life of any gear. Kill a few [DECEA3]any zombies[-] to find parts for repairs. Collect the necessary resources and come back when you are ready. As a reward, you will receive a stock of legendary repair kits, legendary parts or useful resources. If you want, I can share a couple of useful magazines about types of ammunition and armor.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Hugh[-]
Tchinese: «大修可以延長任何齒輪的壽命。殺死一些[DECEA3]任何殭屍[-]來尋找維修零件。收集必要的資源，準備好後再回來。作為獎勵，您將收到大量傳奇維修套件、傳奇零件或有用資源。如果您願意，我可以分享一些有關彈藥和裝甲類型的有用雜誌。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- 休[-]

English: «I see saving ammo is not your strong point. Kill a few [DECEA3]any zombies[-] using automatic weapons. If you succeed, I will gladly share automatic weapon parts and give you some interesting magazines.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Joel[-]
Tchinese: «我發現節省彈藥不是你的強項。使用自動武器殺死一些[DECEA3]任何殭屍[-]。如果你成功了，我很樂意分享自動武器零件並給你一些有趣的雜誌。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- 喬爾[-]

English: «The sight of flying body parts probably doesn't bother you at all. Kill a few [DECEA3]any zombies[-] using shotguns. If you succeed, I'll be happy to share shotgun parts and give you some interesting magazines.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Joel[-]
Tchinese: «看到飛行的身體部位可能根本不會打擾你。使用霰彈槍殺死一些[DECEA3]任何殭屍[-]。如果你成功了，我很樂意分享獵槍零件並給你一些有趣的雜誌。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- 喬爾[-]

English: «Someone once said, Accuracy is the courtesy of kings. Let's see how steady your hands really are. Kill a few [DECEA3]any zombies[-] using rifles. If you succeed, I will gladly share rifle parts and give you some interesting magazines.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Joel[-]
Tchinese: 「有人曾經說過，準確是國王的禮貌。讓我們看看你的手到底有多穩。使用步槍殺死一些[DECEA3]任何殭屍[-]。如果你成功了，我很樂意分享步槍零件並給你一些有趣的雜誌。»\n\n[DECEA3]-喬爾[-]

English: «In the Wild West, a good shot was worth his weight in gold, and times haven't improved since then. Kill a few [DECEA3]any zombies[-] using pistols. If you succeed, I will gladly share pistol parts and give you some interesting magazines.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Joel[-]
Tchinese: 「在狂野的西部，一記好槍的價值相當於黃金，從那時起，情況就沒有改善。使用手槍殺死一些[DECEA3]任何殭屍[-]。如果你成功了，我很樂意分享手槍零件並給你一些有趣的雜誌。»\n\n[DECEA3]- Joel[-]

English: «Even mammoths couldn't resist the power of the spear, let alone the common undead. Kill a few [DECEA3]any zombies[-] using the spear. If you succeed, I'll be happy to share the spear parts and give you some interesting magazines.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Joel[-]
Tchinese: 「連猛獁像都無法抵擋長矛的力量，更何況是普通的不死者。使用長矛殺死一些[DECEA3]任何殭屍[-]。如果你成功了，我很樂意分享矛部件並給你一些有趣的雜誌。»\n\n[DECEA3]- 喬爾[-]

English: «A good club can calm any rowdy. Kill a few [DECEA3]any zombies[-] using a club. If you succeed, I will gladly share the parts of the club and give you some interesting magazines.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Joel[-]
Tchinese: «一個好的俱樂部可以讓任何吵鬧的人平靜下來。使用棍棒殺死一些[DECEA3]任何殭屍[-]。如果你成功了，我很樂意分享俱樂部的各個部分，並給你一些有趣的雜誌。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- 喬爾[-]

English: «This weapon is scary to look at, and it takes a lot of strength to lift it. Kill a few [DECEA3]any zombies[-] using the sledgehammer. If you succeed, I will gladly share the parts of the sledgehammer and give you some interesting magazines.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Joel[-]
Tchinese: «這件武器看起來很嚇人，需要很大的力氣才能舉起來。使用大鐵鎚殺死一些[DECEA3]任何殭屍[-]。如果你成功了，我很樂意分享大錘的部件並給你一些有趣的雜誌。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- Joel[-]

English: «It doesn't look that dangerous. Well, let the enemies tell you about it in the afterlife. Kill a few [DECEA3]any zombies[-] using brass knuckles. If you succeed, I'll be happy to share parts of the brass knuckles and give you a few interesting magazines.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Joel[-]
Tchinese: 「看起來沒那麼危險。好吧，讓敵人在來世告訴你吧。使用指節銅套殺死一些[DECEA3]任何殭屍[-]。如果你成功了，我很樂意分享指節銅套的部分內容，並給你一些有趣的雜誌。»\n\n[DECEA3]- Joel[-]

English: «A good old knife is one of the basics of survival. Kill a few [DECEA3]any zombies[-] using knives. If you succeed, I will gladly share machete parts and give you some interesting magazines.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Joel[-]
Tchinese: «一把好舊刀是生存的基礎之一。使用刀殺死一些[DECEA3]任何殭屍[-]。如果你成功了，我很樂意分享砍刀零件並給你一些有趣的雜誌。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- Joel[-]

English: «A hit from one of these batons can do more than just cauterize — it can fry too. Kill several [DECEA3]any zombies[-] using stun batons. If you succeed, I will gladly share parts of a stun baton and give you some interesting magazines.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Joel[-]
Tchinese: 「用這些警棍擊中它不僅可以燒灼，還可以炸傷。使用電擊棒殺死數個[DECEA3]任何殭屍[-]。如果你成功了，我很樂意分享電擊棒的一部分，並給你一些有趣的雜誌。»\n\n[DECEA3]- 喬爾[-]

English: «Without ammo in the wasteland, you are not a hunter, but game. Kill some [DECEA3]Soldiers[-] and [DECEA3]Feral Zombies[-]. If you succeed, I will give you a supply of gunpowder and some ammunition of the required caliber.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Joel[-]
Tchinese: 「荒原裡沒有彈藥，你就不是獵人，而是遊戲。殺死一些[DECEA3]士兵[-]和[DECEA3]野生殭屍[-]。如果你成功了，我會給你提供火藥和一些所需口徑的彈藥。»\n\n[DECEA3]- 喬爾[-]

English: «You can never have too many bullets. Kill some [DECEA3]Soldiers[-] and [DECEA3]Radioactive Zombies[-]. If you succeed, I'll give you enough gunpowder and ammunition of the right caliber.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Joel[-]
Tchinese: «你的子彈永遠不嫌多。殺死一些[DECEA3]士兵[-]和[DECEA3]放射性殭屍[-]。如果你成功了，我會給你足夠的火藥和合適口徑的彈藥。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- 喬爾[-]

English: «If you want to find a lot of useful resources, prepare for a large horde, which means a lot of ammunition. Kill some [DECEA3]Soldiers[-] and [DECEA3]Elite zombies[-]. If you succeed, I will give you a large supply of gunpowder and ammunition of the required caliber.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Joel[-]
Tchinese: «如果你想找到大量有用的資源，就準備好一大群人，這意味著大量的彈藥。殺死一些[DECEA3]士兵[-]和[DECEA3]精英殭屍[-]。如果你成功了，我會給你大量所需口徑的火藥和彈藥。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- 喬爾[-]

English: «Not all bullets can hurt the big beasts. I know what will definitely work for difficult targets. Kill some [DECEA3]Soldiers[-], [DECEA3]Elite Zombies[-], and [DECEA3]Demolishers[-]. If you succeed, I will give you a huge supply of gunpowder and experimental ammunition of the required caliber.»\n\n[DECEA3]- Joel[-]
Tchinese: «並不是所有的子彈都能傷害大型野獸。我知道什麼對於困難的目標肯定有效。殺死一些[DECEA3]士兵[-]、[DECEA3]精英殭屍[-]和[DECEA3]破壞者[-]。如果你成功了，我會給你大量所需口徑的火藥和實驗彈藥。 »\n\n[DECEA3]- 喬爾[-]

English: [FF8000]Stupid Bet:[-] At grandma's in the village
Tchinese: [FF8000]愚蠢的賭注：[-]在村裡的奶奶家

English:
«I remember when I was a kid, I tried some of my grandfather's moonshine. It was just awful, what happened to my head in the morning. I don't remember anything, but for some reason my grandmother was very angry. After that, they stopped taking me to them on weekends. It turned out that I spent half the night chasing chickens in her henhouse with a shovel - and caught up with almost all of them. I tell everyone, no one believes me. I bet you won't be able to catch even a couple of chickens.»

[DECEA3]- Drunken Master[-]

[DECEA3]Kill 6 chickens with a stone shovel. Be under the influence of Skull Crusher candies.[-]
Tchinese: 「我記得當我還是個孩子的時候，我嚐過一些祖父的私酒。早上我腦子裡發生的事情真是太可怕了。我什麼都不記得了，但不知為何，我的祖母非常生氣。從那以後，他們週末就不再帶我去看他們了。醉拳[-]\n\n[DECEA3]用石鏟殺死 6 隻雞。

English:
«When it all just started, the first problem was with food. Going into the city was not an option, and the forest seemed to be dead. But if you look up, flocks of vultures were circling around. They ate meat indiscriminately, so they themselves quickly became infected. But they did not change their habits. As they say: «There is no such thing as bad meat, only a bad cook.» It was much later, when everything had calmed down, that edible game began to appear in the forest, so now it has become much easier with food.
I bet you won't even be able to hit a vulture with a bow. If you manage to show that you can, I am ready to reward you generously.»

[DECEA3]- Drunken Master[-]

[DECEA3]Kill 8 vultures with a primitive bow. Located in the forest biome.[-]
Tchinese:
「當一切剛開始時，第一個問題是食物。進城是不可能的，森林也似乎死了。但抬頭一看，卻發現成群的禿鷹在周圍盤旋。他們亂吃肉，所以他們自己很快就被感染了。但他們並沒有改變自己的習慣。正如他們所說：「沒有廚師不好的肉，只有廚師不好的。 「很久以後，當一切都平靜下來時，那種可食用的遊戲開始出現在森林裡，所以現在有了食物就變得容易多了。
我敢打賭你甚至無法用弓射中禿鷹。如果你能證明你可以，我準備好慷慨地獎勵你。»

[DECEA3]- 醉大師[-]n
 [DEA3] 原始生物群落中。

English:
«I remember when it all just started, we had a reunion of graduates in a bar. I can't say that I was happy to see them all. However, in any case, I left early. A couple of hours later, the first wave of infection began in this area. I'm sure they all continued communicating as zombies. And who among us is a «loser» now?
Any fool can kill them all, I bet you can't kill them all with an axe.
In general, I am ready to generously reward you if you succeed.»

[DECEA3]- Drunken Master[-]

[DECEA3]Kill 2 Marlene, 2 Darlene, 2 Joe, 2 Steve, 2 Yo using an axe. Be under the influence of beer.[-]
Tchinese: 「我記得一切剛剛開始的時候，我們在酒吧里舉行了一次畢業生聚會。我不能說我很高興見到他們所有人。不過，無論如何，我還是提前離開了。幾個小時後，第一波感染在該地區開始。我確信他們都像殭屍一樣繼續交流。現在我們當中誰是「失敗者」？\n任何傻瓜都可以殺死他們所有人，我敢打賭你不可能用斧頭把他們全部殺死。

English: [FF8000]Stupid Bet:[-] Incident in a strip club
Tchinese: [FF8000]愚蠢的賭注：[-]脫衣舞俱樂部事件

English:
«I always said: - People need strip clubs no less than medicine or the police. I remember when I was young, I wandered into one of those. Well, the chicks there were something special. I drank a little, and decided to dance with them. And so I undress and hit on one of them, and even in the heat of the moment I notice that one of them has a huge apparatus at the ready. It turned out that these are Vietnamese «students» on an exchange, working part-time... terrible. Well, in general, the local security quickly threw me out into the street as I was.
That club is in the very center of the contaminated zone, but these creatures have long since dispersed around the area. In general, I bet you won't want to watch their show. Kill whoever you find, and I will not remain in debt.»

[DECEA3]- Drunken Master[-]

[DECEA3]Kill 8 strippers and 2 bikers with melee weapons. The character must not have any equipment.[-]
Tchinese:
«我總是說：-人們需要脫衣舞俱樂部，就像需要藥物或警察一樣。我記得當我年輕的時候，我曾經走進其中一個。嗯，那裡的小雞們有些特別。我喝了一點，決定和他們跳舞。於是我脫掉衣服，搭訕其中一個，甚至在一時激動的​​時候，我注意到其中一個已經準備好了一個巨大的裝置。事實證明，這些是交換生的越南“學生”，兼職工作……太糟糕了。好吧，總的來說，當地的保全很快就把我扔到了街上。 
那個俱樂部位於污染區的正中心，但這些生物早已分散在該地區周圍。一般來說，我敢打賭你不會想看他們的節目。殺了你找到的任何人，我就不會欠債了。 »

[DECEA3]- 醉大師[-]

[DECEA3]用近戰武器殺死 8 個脫衣舞孃和 2 個騎自行車的人。該角色不得擁有任何裝備。 [-]
[FF8000]愚蠢的賭注：[-] 浴室周圍的痕跡

English:
«We went to a friend's forest house to hunt. It was winter outside, freezing. We drank a little and decided to heat up the bathhouse and warm up first. I went to the bathhouse and saw tracks around it. And in the deep snow you can't see whose they were, so I went to see what kind of guests we had. As a result, I go to the corner, and there is a huge bear rubbing against a tree. There was no point in running, they are aggressive in winter. Well, it was lucky that I took a machete with me to chop wood for shavings. We cut him up right there. No matter who I tell, no one believes me. I bet you would have immediately run away from such a guest.»

[DECEA3]- Drunken Master[-]

[DECEA3]Kill [DECEA3]5[-] bears in winter in the snow, with a melee weapon. The character must not have shoes.[-]
Tchinese:
«我們去朋友的森林小屋打獵。外面是冬天，冰冷。我們喝了一點，決定先把澡堂暖和起來。我去了澡堂，看到澡堂周圍有腳印。在厚厚的積雪中你看不清他們是誰，所以我去看看我們有什麼樣的客人。結果，我走到角落裡，發現一隻巨大的熊在樹上摩擦。跑步是沒有意義的，他們在冬天很有攻擊性。幸好我隨身帶著砍刀，可以砍木頭刨花。我們當場把他砍了。不管我告訴誰，沒有人相信我。我打賭你會立即逃離這樣的客人。 »
