Tchinese: 這樣可以擦掉臉上和手上的一點污垢和血跡。總比沒有好。 \n\n[DECEA3]與水體相互作用可以製作濕紙巾。 [-]

English: This won't replace a good shower or bath, but it will still allow you to remove dirt from your body and equipment.\n\n[DECEA3]It is possible to clean dirt from other players.[-]
Tchinese: 這不會取代良好的淋浴或浴缸，但它仍然可以讓你清除身體和裝備上的污垢。 \n\n[DECEA3]可以清除其他玩家的污垢。 [-]

English: Steroids decrease encumbrance, allowing you to carry more items, and allow you to run faster. They also allow you to move and perform actions normally when you have a sprained or broken limb. They also reduce reserve of strength consumption by 50%.
Tchinese: 類固醇可以減少負擔，讓你攜帶更多物品，讓你跑得更快。當您的肢體扭傷或骨折時，它們還可以讓您正常移動和執行動作。他們還將體力消耗儲備減少了 50%。

English: You are resting on a sleeping bag
Sure, a camp bed is not always comfortable, but it is still better than sleeping on bare asphalt.\nYou restore a small amount of Strength Reserve and Stress Resistance.
Tchinese: 當然，行軍床並不總是舒適，但它仍然比睡在裸露的瀝青上要好。 \n你可以恢復少量的力量儲備和抗壓能力。

English: You are resting on a comfortable mattress
Tchinese: 您正躺在舒適的床墊上休息

English: On a comfortable mattress, sleep comes much easier. Just do not sleep through the horde.\nYou restore an average amount of Strength Reserve and Stress Resistance.
Tchinese: 在舒適的床墊上，睡眠變得更加容易。只是不要在部落中睡覺。 \n你會恢復平均數量的力量儲備和壓力抵抗力。

English: You are resting on a comfortable bed
Tchinese: 你正躺在舒適的床上休息

English: A good night's sleep in a comfortable bed can solve almost any problem. At the very least, it helps you forget about them for a while.\nYou restore a large amount of Strength Reserve and Stress Resistance.
Tchinese: 在舒適的床上睡個好覺幾乎可以解決任何問題。至少，它可以幫助你暫時忘記它們。 \n你恢復大量的力量儲備和抗壓能力。

English: There is no XP penalty on death. Also, Strength Reserve and Stress Resistance are consumed [DECEA3]2 times[-] more slowly, while their recovery rate is increased.\n\nThis protection gradually fades and disappears at [DECEA3]10[-] level.
Tchinese: 死亡時沒有 XP 懲罰。此外，力量儲備和壓力抗性的消耗速度會變慢[DECEA3]2倍[-]，但恢復速度會增加。 \n\n這種保護會在[DECEA3]10[-]級時逐漸減弱並消失。
死亡 XP 懲戒保護

English:
Your recent activities have affected your Strength Reserve. You are feeling slightly fatigued.
Your stamina regeneration and mobility have been reduced by [DECEA3]5%[-]. Your carrying capacity has also been reduced by [DECEA3]3[-].

Stay put and get some rest. Resting on a sleeping bag or bed, as well as food and water regeneration effects, significantly increases your Strength Reserve regeneration.
Tchinese:
您最近的活動影響了您的力量儲備。你覺得有點疲勞。 
你的體力恢復和活動能力已降低[DECEA3]5%[-]。你的承載力也減少了[DECEA3]3[-]。 

留在原地並休息一下。在睡袋或床上休息，以及食物和水的再生效果，可以顯著增加您的力量儲備再生。

English:
Your Strength Reserve has been significantly reduced. You are feeling moderately fatigued.
Your stamina regeneration and mobility have been reduced by [DECEA3]10%[-]. Your carrying capacity has also been reduced by [DECEA3]6[-].

Stay put and get some rest. Resting on a sleeping bag or bed, as well as food and water regeneration effects, significantly increases your Strength Reserve regeneration.
Tchinese:
你的力量儲備已顯著減少。您感到中度疲勞。 
您的耐力恢復和活動能力已降低 [DECEA3]10%[-]。你的承載力也減少了[DECEA3]6[-]。 

留在原地並休息一下。在睡袋或床上休息，以及食物和水的再生效果，可以顯著增加您的力量儲備再生。

English:
There is almost no Strength Reserve left, and you are literally collapsing from exhaustion. You are feeling severely fatigued.
Your stamina regeneration and mobility have been reduced by [DECEA3]20%[-]. Your carrying capacity has also been reduced by [DECEA3]9[-].

Stay put and get some rest. Resting on a sleeping bag or bed, as well as food and water regeneration effects, significantly increases your Strength Reserve regeneration.

Be careful: if your Strength Reserve drops below [DECEA3]5%[-], jumping or trying to run can knock you off your feet.
Tchinese:
體力儲備幾乎所剩無幾，你幾乎已經精疲力盡了。你感到嚴重疲勞。 
你的體力恢復和活動能力已降低[DECEA3]20%[-]。你的承載力也減少了[DECEA3]9[-]。 

留在原地並休息一下。在睡袋或床上休息，以及食物和水的再生效果，可以顯著增加你的力量儲備再生。 

請小心：如果你的力量儲備低於 [DECEA3]5%[-]，跳躍或試圖奔跑可能會讓你摔倒。

English:
The atmosphere around you affects your psyche. You experience mild stress.
Damage dealt to enemies in melee combat and loot quality are reduced by [DECEA3]10%[-]. Also, weapon spread and food and water consumption increase by [DECEA3]10%[-].

The indicator decreases at night and is restored during the day. If there are no enemies within a radius of [DECEA3]25[-] meters, you will be able to restore your Stress Resistance. Drinking any alcohol or eating candy, as well as killing zombies, increases this indicator. Also, being on a sleeping bag or bed significantly increases the amount restored.
Tchinese:
你周圍的氣氛會影響你的心理。你會感受到輕微的壓力。 
近戰中對敵人造成的傷害和戰利品質量降低 [DECEA3]10%[-]。此外，武器擴散以及食物和水的消耗增加[DECEA3]10%[-]。 

此指標在夜間減少，在白天恢復。如果[DECEA3]25[-]公尺半徑內沒有敵人，你將能夠恢復你的抗壓能力。喝任何酒精或吃糖果以及殺死殭屍都會增加該指標。此外，睡在睡袋或床上會顯著增加恢復量。

You experience moderate stress.

English:
You are experiencing a panic attack and are under severe stress.
Damage dealt to enemies in melee combat and loot quality are reduced by [DECEA3]50%[-]. Also, weapon spread and food and water consumption increase by [DECEA3]50%[-].

The indicator decreases at night and is restored during the day. If there are no enemies within a radius of [DECEA3]25[-] meters, you will be able to restore your Stress Resistance. Drinking any alcohol or eating candy, as well as killing zombies, increases this indicator. Also, being on a sleeping bag or bed significantly increases the amount restored.

Be careful: if your Stress Resistance drops below [DECEA3]5%[-], there is a chance every second that you will lose control.
Tchinese:
您正在經歷恐慌發作，承受著巨大的壓力。 
近戰中對敵人造成的傷害和戰利品質量降低 [DECEA3]50%[-]。此外，武器擴散以及食物和水的消耗增加[DECEA3]50%[-]。 

此指標在夜間減少，在白天恢復。如果[DECEA3]25[-]公尺半徑內沒有敵人，你將能夠恢復你的抗壓能力。喝任何酒精或吃糖果以及殺死殭屍都會增加該指標。此外，睡在睡袋或床上會顯著增加恢復量。 

請注意：如果您的抗壓性下降到 [DECEA3]5%[-] 以下，您每秒都有可能失去控制。

English: Your hygiene is lower than usual
Tchinese: 你的衛生狀況比平常差

English:
You seem a little dirty. Your hygiene is lower than usual.
The recovery rate of critical wounds and the duration of positive effects have been reduced by [DECEA3]5%[-]. Also, the chance of becoming infected when attacked by zombies or animals has been increased by [DECEA3]15%[-]. This slightly reduces your stress tolerance.

[DECEA3]Wash yourself in a body of water or take a bath. Using wipes or wet wipes will also help restore hygiene.[-]

[DECEA3]用水清洗自己或洗澡。使用濕紙巾或濕紙巾也有助於恢復衛生。 [-]

生命恢復速度（自身和隊伍）

English: Food and medicine in loot (self and party)
Tchinese: 戰利品中的食物和藥品（自己和隊伍）
您正在進行有氧運動訓練

English: A healthy mind in a healthy body. You are doing a cardio workout. Every second you lose Obesity (if you have it) or develop the Athletic Physique skill.
Tchinese: 健康的心靈源自於健康的身體。您正在做有氧運動。每一秒你都會減掉肥胖（如果有的話）或發展運動體質技能。

English: You are doing a training session with loads
You are training with loads. Every second you get rid of Obesity or Dystrophy (if you have them) or develop the Bodybuilder skill.
Tchinese: 你正在負重訓練。每一秒你都會擺脫肥胖或營養不良（如果有的話）或發展健美技能。

English: Injury prevention helps you recover. Every [DECEA3]3 seconds[-] you restore [DECEA3]1 point[-] of health, and your critical wound recovery speed is increased by [DECEA3]50%[-].
Tchinese: 預防傷害可以幫助您康復。每[DECEA3]3秒[-]你恢復[DECEA3]1點[-]生命值，並且你的致命傷口恢復速度提高[DECEA3]50%[-]。

English: Active healing aids your recovery. Every [DECEA3]3 seconds[-] you restore [DECEA3]1 health[-], and your critical wound recovery speed is increased by [DECEA3]50%[-]. You can resist infection.[DECEA3]Install the Medical Crate bonus storage to increase your recovery bonus. The enhanced healing will also help treat infections.[-]
Tchinese: 積極治療有助於您的康復。每[DECEA3]3秒[-]你恢復[DECEA3]1生命值[-]，並且你的臨界傷口恢復速度增加[DECEA3]50%[-]。你可以抵抗感染。 [DECEA3]安裝醫療箱獎勵儲存以增加你的恢復獎勵。增強的癒合能力也有助於治療感染。 [-]

English: Resuscitation will quickly get you back on your feet even after sustaining any damage. Every [DECEA3]3 seconds[-] you restore [DECEA3]6 units[-] of health, and the speed of critical wound recovery is increased by [DECEA3]150%[-]. You are recovering from infection.
Tchinese: 即使遭受任何傷害，復甦也會很快讓您重新站起來。每[DECEA3]3秒[-]你恢復[DECEA3]6單位[-]生命值，並且關鍵傷口恢復速度增加[DECEA3]150%[-]。您正在從感染中恢復。

English:
You are learning.
Every [DECEA3]3[-] seconds you gain a little experience if you hold a book, magazine, or recipe.
The effect is doubled if the «Master of Intelligenceа» skill is level 4 or higher.
Also, the chance to gain an additional skill point when reading magazines is increased by [DECEA3]5%[-].
Tchinese:
你正在學習。 
如果你拿著一本書、雜誌或食譜，每[DECEA3]3[-]秒你會獲得一點經驗。 
如果《情報大師》技能達到4級或更高，效果會加倍。 
此外，閱讀雜誌時獲得額外技能點的機會會增加[DECEA3]5%[-]。

English: You are engaged in advanced learning

You are engaged in advanced learning.
Every [DECEA3]3[-] seconds you gain a little experience if you hold a book, magazine, or recipe.
The effect is doubled if the «Master of Intelligence» skill is level 4 or higher.
Also, the chance to gain an additional skill point when reading magazines is increased by [DECEA3]5%[-].
Tchinese:
你正在進行高級學習。 
如果你拿著一本書、雜誌或食譜，每[DECEA3]3[-]秒你會獲得一點經驗。 
如果《智力大師》技能達到4級或更高，效果加倍。 
此外，閱讀雜誌時獲得額外技能點的機會增加[DECEA3]5%[-]。

English:
Now you can wash away all the stuck-on dirt.
You restore your hygiene and recover from accumulated radiation faster.

[DECEA3]The effect of using regular and wet wipes is doubled.[-]
Tchinese:
現在您可以洗掉所有粘附的污垢。 
您可以恢復衛生並更快地從累積的輻射中恢復。 

[DECEA3]使用一般濕紙巾和濕紙巾的效果加倍。 [-]

English: You are taking a relaxing bath

A good bath during the apocalypse is the best thing that can happen. It not only helps wash away all the dirt but also gets rid of negative thoughts. Your hygiene is restored significantly faster, and you also regain your resistance to stress. You get rid of accumulated radiation faster.[DECEA3]The effect of using regular and wet wipes is doubled. [-]
Tchinese: 在世界末日期間洗個澡是最好的事情。它不僅有助於洗去所有污垢，還可以消除消極想法。您的衛生狀況恢復得更快，而且您也恢復了對壓力的抵抗力。您可以更快地消除累積的輻射。 [DECEA3]使用普通濕紙巾和濕紙巾的效果加倍。 [-]

English: This is the most important thing at any time, even more important than a zombie apocalypse. You can relieve yourself comfortably, but don't forget about hygiene. Dysentery passes much faster and there are no bouts of diarrhea. [DECEA3]Pick up some interesting literature and spend your time productively.[-]
Tchinese: 這在任何時候都是最重要的事情，甚至比殭屍末日還要重要。您可以舒適地大小便，但不要忘記衛生。痢疾消退得更快，而且不會腹瀉。 [DECEA3]挑選一些有趣的文獻並有效率地度過你的時間。 [-]

English: Going to the bathroom is a healthy activity, but it's doubly enjoyable with something interesting to read. You can relieve yourself comfortably. Dysentery passes significantly faster, and there are no bouts of diarrhea. You regain your stress tolerance. [DECEA3]Don't forget to wash your hands.[-]
Tchinese: 上廁所是一項健康的活動，但閱讀有趣的東西會讓它加倍享受。您可以舒舒服服地放鬆一下。痢疾的傳播速度明顯加快，且不會腹瀉。您恢復了壓力承受能力。 [DECEA3]別忘了洗手。 [-]

English: With these herbs, any food will be much tastier. Used to create complex lunches.
Tchinese: 有了這些草藥，任何食物都會變得更美味。用於製作複雜的午餐。

English: During the effect, you cannot be knocked over or stunned.
Tchinese: 效果期間，你不會被擊倒或擊暈。

English: An experimental stimulant that allows you to focus on a target. While active, you are not affected by vision-altering effects.

English: While active, you are not affected by vision-altering effects.

English: The experimental stimulant temporarily protects against any radiation accumulation. It also removes current radiation much faster. After the effect ends, the shell disappears and you immediately receive [DECEA3]25%[-] radiation.
Tchinese: 實驗興奮劑可以暫時防止任何輻射累積。它還可以更快地消除當前輻射。效果結束後，外殼消失，你立即收到[DECEA3]25%[-]輻射。
你已經激活了[DECEA3]興奮劑[-]《輻照貝殼》

English: The experimental stimulant temporarily protects against any radiation accumulation. It also removes current radiation much faster.\n\n[DECEA3]Be extremely careful, as when the effect ends, you will immediately gain[-] [FFB800]25%[-] [DECEA3]radiation[-].
Tchinese: 實驗興奮劑可以暫時防止任何輻射累積。它還可以更快地消除當前輻射。 \n\n[DECEA3]要極度小心，因為當效果結束時，你將立即獲得[-] [FFB800]25%[-] [DECEA3]輻射[-]。

English: These drugs are almost impossible to find in the quarantine zone, but there are stockpiles in warehouses in the outside world. You can request a batch in exchange for support kits. Used to create experimental drugs.
Tchinese: 這些藥品在隔離區幾乎找不到，但外界的倉庫裡卻有庫存。您可以請求一批以換取支援套件。用於製造實驗藥物。

English: This substance is almost unstudied. But some of its properties are clear to an experienced chemist. In experienced hands, it can be used to create experimental drugs.
Tchinese: 這種物質幾乎未被研究過。但經驗豐富的化學家很清楚它的一些特性。在經驗豐富的人手中，它可以用來製造實驗藥物。

English: This is the best medical care you can get in the zone. Increased health restoration and recovery speed. Treats any fractures and abrasions and instantly restores a certain amount (improved by the Medic skill).
Tchinese: 這是您在該地區可以獲得的最好的醫療服務。增加健康恢復和恢復速度。治療任何骨折和擦傷並立即恢復一定量（透過醫療技能改善）。

English:
Rescuer's complete treatment kit.
Adds all treatment effects (first aid kit, bandage, plaster, vitamins, antibiotics) in one use.

Passive ability: [DECEA3]Group Support[-] - If there is a bonus from the full Rescuer's set, all effects will be applied to players within a radius of [DECEA3]20[-] meters. Also, activation removes most negative control effects from players, and the [DECEA3]Rescuer's Protection[-] effect is applied for [DECEA3]5[-] seconds - Increases damage resistance by [DECEA3]50%[-] upon activation, then decreases by [DECEA3]10%[-] each second for the duration of the effect.

English: Significantly increases the chance of finding «Vehicle Adventures» magazines.\n\n[DECEA3]Only one magazine booster can be active at a time. Does not work if all magazines are studied, including mastery.[-]
Tchinese: 顯著增加找到《車輛冒險》雜誌的機會。 \n\n[DECEA3]一次只能啟動一個雜誌補充包。如果研究了所有雜誌，包括精通，則不起作用。 [-]

English:
Improved weapons and tools have increased stats compared to their basic predecessors. However, they are also more difficult to repair.

Used to repair any improved weapons and tools.
Repairs [DECEA3]2000[-] durability points.

Requires skill: [DECEA3]Advanced Engineering Lv.3[-]
Tchinese:
與基本的前身相比，改進的武器和工具增加了統計數據。然而，它們也更難修復。 

用於修復任何改進的武器和工具。 
修復 [DECEA3]2000[-] 耐久點。 

需要技能：[DECEA3]高級工程 Lv.3[-]

English:
Legendary weapons can cause a lot of problems for any enemy. However, repairing such weapons is not a cheap pleasure.

Used to repair any legendary weapon.
Repairs [DECEA3]2000[-] durability points.

Requires skill: [DECEA3]Advanced Engineering Lv.5[-]
Tchinese:
傳奇武器會給任何敵人帶來很多問題。然而，修理這類武器可不是一件廉價的事。 

用於修復任何傳奇武器。 
修理 [DECEA3]2000[-] 點耐久度。 

需要技能：[DECEA3]高級工程 Lv.5[-]

English:
Experimental 7.62 mm [5AFF75]((Depleted Uranium))[-] rounds.
Significantly stronger than regular and improved rounds of this caliber. Ignores armor and penetrates up to [DECEA3]3[-] targets. The ammunition is designed specifically to combat large mutants. When hitting bosses or elite enemies, damage is significantly increased.

Cannot be crafted independently. This type of ammunition can be requested from support or found in boss loot.
Tchinese:
實驗性 7.62 毫米 [5AFF75]((貧鈾))[-] 彈。 
明顯強於該口徑的常規彈和改良彈。忽略裝甲並穿透最多 [DECEA3]3[-] 個目標。該彈藥是專門為對抗大型變種人而設計的。擊中 Boss 或菁英敵人時，傷害顯著增加。 

無法獨立製作。這種類型的彈藥可以向支援人員索取，也可以在 Boss 戰利品中找到。

English:
Experimental .44 Magnum [5AFF75]((Depleted Uranium))[-] rounds.
Significantly stronger than regular and improved rounds of this caliber. Ignores armor and penetrates up to [DECEA3]3[-] targets. The ammunition is designed specifically to combat large mutants. When hitting bosses or elite enemies, damage is significantly increased.

Cannot be crafted independently. This type of ammunition can be requested from support or found in boss loot.
Tchinese:
實驗性 0.44 Magnum [5AFF75]((貧鈾))[-] 彈。 
明顯強於該口徑的常規彈和改良彈。忽略裝甲並穿透最多 [DECEA3]3[-] 個目標。該彈藥是專門為對抗大型變種人而設計的。擊中 Boss 或菁英敵人時，傷害顯著增加。 

無法獨立製作。這種類型的彈藥可以向支援人員索取，也可以在 Boss 戰利品中找到。

English:
Experimental 9 mm [5AFF75](Depleted Uranium)[-] rounds.
Significantly stronger than regular and improved rounds of this caliber. Ignores armor and penetrates up to [DECEA3]3[-] targets. The ammunition is designed specifically to combat large mutants. When hitting bosses or elite enemies, damage is significantly increased.

Cannot be crafted independently. This type of ammunition can be requested from support or found in boss loot.
Tchinese:
實驗性 9 毫米 [5AFF75]（貧鈾）[-] 彈。 
明顯強於該口徑的常規彈和改良彈。忽略裝甲並穿透最多 [DECEA3]3[-] 個目標。該彈藥是專門為對抗大型變種人而設計的。擊中 Boss 或菁英敵人時，傷害顯著增加。 

無法獨立製作。這種類型的彈藥可以向支援人員索取，也可以在 Boss 戰利品中找到。

English:
Experimental shotgun [5AFF75](Depleted Uranium)[-] rounds.
Significantly stronger than regular and improved rounds of this caliber. Ignores armor and penetrates up to [DECEA3]3[-] targets. The ammunition is designed specifically to combat large mutants. When hitting bosses or elite enemies, damage is significantly increased.

Cannot be crafted independently. This type of ammunition can be requested from support or found in boss loot.
Tchinese:
實驗霰彈槍 [5AFF75]（貧鈾）[-] 彈。 
明顯強於該口徑的常規彈和改良彈。忽略裝甲並穿透最多 [DECEA3]3[-] 個目標。該彈藥是專門為對抗大型變種人而設計的。擊中 Boss 或菁英敵人時，傷害顯著增加。 

無法獨立製作。這種類型的彈藥可以向支援人員索取，也可以在 Boss 戰利品中找到。

English:
Experimental [5AFF75](Depleted Uranium)[-] automatic turret ammunition.
Significantly stronger than regular and improved turret ammo. Ignores [DECEA3]60%[-] of the target's armor and penetrates up to [DECEA3]2[-] targets. When used, increases turret degradation speed by [DECEA3]20%[-], and also has a chance to knock down the enemy.

Cannot be crafted. This type of ammunition can be requested from support.
Tchinese:
實驗性 [5AFF75]（貧鈾）[-] 自動砲塔彈藥。 
比常規和改進的砲塔彈藥明顯更強。忽略 [DECEA3]60%[-] 的目標裝甲並穿透最多 [DECEA3]2[-] 個目標。使用時，砲塔退化速度提高[DECEA3]20%[-]，並且有一定幾率擊倒敵人。 

無法製作。可以向支援人員索取此類彈藥。

English:
An extremely vile-looking substance, and an even worse smelling substance. However, it is an extremely sought-after resource in the outside world. Scientists are still guessing how complex mutations occur and what exactly this is connected with. Now they will be able to significantly speed up their research.

In exchange, scientists are ready to supply you with the latest technology they have.

[DECEA3]Use the Radio Station to exchange for experimental ammunition sets.[-]
Tchinese:
一種看起來極度惡毒的物質，而且是一種更難聞的物質。然而，它在外界卻是一種極為搶手的資源。科學家仍在猜測複雜的突變是如何發生的以及這到底與什麼有關。現在他們將能夠顯著加快他們的研究速度。 

作為交換，科學家們準備向您提供他們擁有的最新技術。 

[DECEA3]使用無線電台交換實驗彈藥組。 [-]

English: If packaged well, even the most vile odors can be masked. Contains [DECEA3]100[-] units of mutation samples.\n\nRequires skill: [DECEA3]Physician Lv.3[-]
Tchinese: 如果包裝得當，即使是最難聞的氣味也可以被掩蓋。包含[DECEA3]100[-]單位突變樣本。 \n\n需要技能：[DECEA3]醫師Lv.3[-]

English:
Treated critical injuries heal 50% faster.
Medical healing items restore 100% more health over time.
Gain 500% more XP using bandages, first aid bandages, first aid kits, and splints.
Casts instantly heal broken limbs.
[DECEA3]Mutation sample packs are available for odor neutralization and compact storage.[-]
Tchinese:
治療後的重傷癒合速度加快 50%。 
隨著時間的推移，醫療治療物品可恢復 100% 的生命值。 
使用繃帶、急救繃帶、急救包和夾板使 XP 增加 500%。 
石膏可立即治癒骨折的肢體。 
[DECEA3]突變樣本包可用於中和氣味和緊湊存儲。 [-]

English:
Improved mechanical parts allow you to create more complex items.
Only an advanced engineer can create these.

Requires skill: [DECEA3]Advanced Engineering Lv.5[-]
Tchinese:
改進的機械零件可讓您創建更複雜的物品。 
只有資深工程師才能創造這些物品。 

需要技能：[DECEA3]高級工程 Lv.5[-]

English:
Improved electric parts allow you to create more complex items.
Only an advanced engineer can create these.

Requires skill: [DECEA3]Advanced Engineering Lv.5[-]
Tchinese:
改進的電氣部件可讓您創建更複雜的物品。 
只有資深工程師才能創造這些物品。 

需要技能：[DECEA3]高級工程 Lv.5[-]

English: This is a very convenient water collection tank. You can fill it with dirty water from any body of water or use it to collect water in an improved dew collector.
Tchinese: 這是一個非常方便的集水箱。您可以用任何水體的髒水填充它，或用它在改進的露水收集器中收集水。

English: A huge bottle of dirty water. Unpack it to get the water.
Tchinese: 一大瓶髒水。打開包裝即可取出水。

English: A huge bottle of clean water. Unpack it to get the water.
Tchinese: 一大瓶乾淨的水。打開包裝即可取出水。

English: A small homemade battery with some charge left from a battery pack. Used to charge [FFB800]Reactor[-] tools.
Tchinese: 一顆自製的小型電池，電池組中還剩下一些電力。用於為[FFB800]Reactor[-]工具充電。

English: Experimental energy technology. The most powerful and long-lasting energy source. [DECEA3]Iron Man[-] is resting.\n\nUsed to create reactor tools and operate powerful energy sources.
Tchinese: 實驗能源技術。最強大、最持久的能源。 [DECEA3]鋼鐵人[-]正在休息。 \n\n用於製造反應器工具並操作強大的能源。

English: Used to connect and extend wires between electrical components. Improved alloys make the component significantly lighter and increase its strength.\n\nRepairable with steel.
Tchinese: 用於連接和延長電氣元件之間的電線。改進的合金使部件明顯更輕並提高了強度。 \n\n可用鋼修復。

English: Wire up one of these to trigger events based on the time of day. Improved alloys make the component significantly lighter and increase its strength.\n\nRepairable with steel and electrical parts.
Tchinese: 連接其中一個以根據一天中的時間觸發事件。改進的合金使部件顯著減輕並提高了強度。 \n\n可用鋼和電氣零件修復。

English: Used to trigger electrical events when activated. Improved alloys make the component significantly lighter and increase its strength.\n\nRepairable with steel and electrical parts.
Tchinese: 用於在啟動時觸發電氣事件。改進的合金使部件顯著減輕並提高了強度。 \n\n可用鋼和電氣零件修復。

English: Used to trigger electrical events when motion is detected. Improved alloys make the component significantly lighter and increase its strength. Improved optics also increase the detection radius and range.\n\nRepairable with steel and electrical parts.
Tchinese: 用於在偵測到運動時觸發電氣事件。改進的合金使部件顯著減輕並提高了強度。改進的光學器件還增加了檢測半徑和範圍。 \n\n可用鋼和電氣零件修復。

English: Now that's a real blender. Don't stand next to it, or it's going to splash. The upgrade increases the trap's durability, damage, and explosion resistance by [DECEA3]60%[-].\n\nRepairable with steel.
Tchinese: 現在那是一個真正的攪拌機。不要站在它旁邊，否則它會濺水。升級將陷阱的耐用性、傷害和防爆性提高了 [DECEA3]60%[-]。 \n\n可用鋼修復。

English: It's better to look at it from the side. Turn it on — wait a minute — and see what happens! The upgrade significantly increases the trap's durability, damage, and explosion resistance by [DECEA3]90%[-]. But the energy consumption for this monster is also significant.\n\nRepairable with [E9653B]super-strong alloys[-].
Tchinese: 最好從側面看。打開它——等一下——看看會發生什麼！升級顯著提高了陷阱的耐用性、傷害和防爆能力 [DECEA3]90%[-]。但這個怪物的能量消耗也很大。 \n\n可用[E9653B]超強合金[-]修復。

English:
Connect [DECEA3]2[-] or more parts. High voltage supplied through the wires will throw back anyone who touches them. That's for sure — Don't touch! It will kill!
The upgrade increases the trap's durability, damage, and explosion resistance by [DECEA3]40%[-].

Repairable with electrical parts.
Tchinese:
連接 [DECEA3]2[-] 或更多零件。透過電線提供的高壓會將任何接觸它們的人擊退。這是肯定的－不要碰！它會致命！ 
升級將陷阱的耐用性、傷害和防爆性提高了 [DECEA3]40%[-]。 

可用電氣零件修復。

English:
Connect [DECEA3]2[-] or more parts. Extreme voltage supplied through the wires will not leave a chance for anyone. The main thing is not to accidentally touch it yourself! Zombie barbecue takes on a new meaning.
The upgrade increases the trap's durability, damage, and explosion resistance by [DECEA3]40%[-]. Power consumption is significantly increased.

Repairable with improved electrical parts.
Tchinese:
連接 [DECEA3]2[-] 或更多零件。透過電線提供的極端電壓不會給任何人留下機會。最主要的是自己不要不小心碰到！殭屍燒烤有了新的意義。 
升級將陷阱的耐用性、傷害和爆炸抗性提高了 [DECEA3]40%[-]。功耗顯著增加。 

可透過改良的電氣部件進行修復。

English: A version of the automatic turret adapted for .44 caliber cartridges.\n\nEnemies won't be happy about this upgrade.
Tchinese: 適用於 0.44 口徑彈藥筒的自動砲塔版本。 \n\n敵人不會對此升級感到高興。

English: A version of the automatic turret adapted for 7.62 mm caliber cartridges.\n\nIt's better not to catch her eye, even from afar.
Tchinese: 適用於 7.62 公釐口徑彈藥筒的自動砲塔版本。 \n\n最好不要引起她的注意，即使是從遠處看也是如此。

English: An improved version of the automatic turret for 9 mm ammunition. All firing characteristics have been improved.\n\nEnemies won't be happy about this upgrade.
Tchinese: 9毫米彈藥自動砲塔的改良版本。所有射擊特性都得到了改進。 \n\n敵人不會對此升級感到高興。
[FF6666]實驗[-] 自動砲塔 9 毫米

English: An experimental version of the 9 mm automatic turret, adapted exclusively for [5AFF75](Depleted Uranium)[-] ammunition. All firing characteristics have been significantly improved.\n\nIt's best not to even look.
Tchinese: 9 毫米自動砲塔的實驗版本，專門適用於 [5AFF75]（貧鈾）[-] 彈藥。所有射擊特性都得到了顯著改善。 \n\n最好不要看。

English: An improved version of the automatic turret for .44 ammunition. All firing characteristics have been improved.\n\nEnemies won't be happy about this upgrade.
Tchinese: 用於.44彈藥的自動砲塔的改進版本。所有射擊特性都得到了改進。 \n\n敵人不會對此升級感到高興。

English: An experimental version of the .44 Magnum automatic turret, adapted exclusively for [5AFF75](Depleted Uranium)[-] ammunition. All firing characteristics have been significantly improved.\n\nIt's best not to even look.
Tchinese: .44 Magnum 自動砲塔的實驗版本，專門適用於 [5AFF75]（貧鈾）[-] 彈藥。所有射擊特性都得到了顯著改善。 \n\n最好不要看。
[DECEA3]改良[-] 自動砲塔 7.62 毫米

English: An improved version of the automatic turret for 7.62 mm ammunition. All firing characteristics have been improved.\n\nEnemies won't be happy about this upgrade.
Tchinese: 7.62毫米彈藥自動砲塔的改良版本。所有射擊特性都得到了改進。 \n\n敵人不會對此升級感到高興。
[FF6666]實驗[-] 自動砲塔 7.62 毫米

English: An experimental version of the 7.62 mm automatic turret, adapted exclusively for [5AFF75](Depleted Uranium)[-] ammunition. All firing characteristics have been significantly improved.\n\nIt's best not to even look.
Tchinese: 7.62公厘自動砲塔的實驗版本，專門適用於[5AFF75]（貧鈾）[-]彈藥。所有射擊特性都得到了顯著改善。 \n\n最好不要看。

English: An improved version of the shotgun turret. All firing characteristics have been increased.\n\nEnemies aren't exactly happy about these adaptations.
Tchinese: 霰彈槍砲塔的改良版。所有射擊特性均已增強。 \n\n敵人對這些調整不太滿意。

English: An experimental version of the shotgun turret, adapted exclusively for [5AFF75](Depleted Uranium)[-] ammunition. All firing characteristics have been significantly increased.\n\nIt's best not to even look.
Tchinese: 霰彈槍砲塔的實驗版本，專門適用於[5AFF75]（貧鈾）[-]彈藥。所有射擊特性均已顯著增強。 \n\n最好不要看。

English: This large, improved forge is a great time saver. Improved tools allow you to smelt large amounts of resources much faster.
Tchinese: 這個經過改良的大型鍛造廠可以節省大量時間。改進的工具可以讓你更快冶煉大量資源。

English: This is the best place for chemical experiments. Now you can create much more complex substances, and old recipes are created faster.
Tchinese: 這裡是進行化學實驗的最佳場所。現在您可以創建更複雜的物質，並且舊配方的創建速度更快。

English: You can create almost anything on a regular workbench, but it takes time. The improved version of the workbench allows you to use modifications that speed up item creation and allow you to create complex and unique items.
Tchinese: 您可以在常規工作台上創建幾乎任何東西，但這需要時間。工作台的改進版本可讓您使用修改來加速專案創建並允許您創建複雜且獨特的專案。

English: A universal workstation for dismantling any equipment. Allows you to dismantle any household or industrial equipment and obtain a large amount of resources, as well as extract rare parts or alloys.
Tchinese: 用於拆卸任何設備的通用工作站。可以讓你拆卸任何家用或工業設備並獲得大量資源，以及提取稀有零件或合金。

English: Forget about cooking over a campfire. Now you can cook real home-cooked food.\nAllows you to use kitchen accessories, that increase cooking speed and reduce the amount of resources required.
Tchinese: 忘記在篝火上做飯吧。現在您可以烹飪真正的家常菜。 \n允許您使用廚房配件，從而提高烹飪速度並減少所需的資源量。

English:
Water will no longer be a problem. The improved dew collector allows you to collect dirty water bottles 30% faster.

When a water filter (modification) is installed, it collects clean water in bottles, significantly increasing the amount of water obtained.

Empty bottles are used as fuel.
Tchinese:
水將不再是問題。改良的露水收集器可以讓您收集髒水瓶的速度提高 30%。 

安裝水過濾器（改裝）後，它可以將乾淨的水收集到瓶子中，從而顯著增加獲得的水量。 

空瓶當燃料。

English: Now you can build an entire city.\nResource processing speed has been increased, and recipe costs have been reduced.
Tchinese: 現在您可以建造整個城市。 \n資源處理速度提高了，配方成本也降低了。

English: You can't survive without iron. The autominer allows you to get iron without wasting time mining. Just fill it up and wait a bit. It uses gasoline canisters. For every [DECEA3]1000[-] gasoline, you will receive 6000 iron (excluding modifications).
Tchinese: 沒有鐵你就無法生存。自動採礦機可以讓您在不浪費時間採礦的情況下獲得鐵。只需填滿並稍等一下即可。它使用汽油罐。對於每 [DECEA3]1000[-] 汽油，您將收到 6000 鐵（不包括改裝）。

English: You can't survive without lead. The autominer allows you to get lead without wasting time mining. Just fill it up and wait a bit. It uses gasoline canisters. For every [DECEA3]1000[-] gasoline, you will receive 6000 lead (excluding modifications).
Tchinese: 沒有鉛你就無法生存。自動挖礦機可以讓您在不浪費時間挖礦的情況下獲得領先優勢。只需填滿並稍等一下即可。它使用汽油罐。對於每 [DECEA3]1000[-] 汽油，您將收到 6000 鉛（不包括改裝）。

English: You can't survive without coal. The autominer allows you to get coal without wasting time mining. Just fill it up and wait a bit. It uses gasoline canisters. For every [DECEA3]1000[-] gasoline, you will receive 6000 coal (excluding modifications).
Tchinese: 沒有煤炭你就無法生存。自動採礦機讓您無需浪費時間採礦即可獲得煤炭。只需填滿並稍等一下即可。它使用汽油罐。對於每 [DECEA3]1000[-] 汽油，您將收到 6000 煤炭（不包括改裝）。

English: You can't survive without potassium nitrate. The autominer allows you to get potassium nitrate without wasting time mining. Just fill it up and wait a bit. It uses gasoline canisters. For every [DECEA3]1000[-] gasoline, you will receive 6000 potassium nitrate (excluding modifications).
Tchinese: 沒有硝酸鉀你就無法生存。自動採礦機可以讓您獲得硝酸鉀，而無需浪費時間採礦。只需填滿並稍等一下即可。它使用汽油罐。每 [DECEA3]1000[-] 汽油，您將收到 6000 硝酸鉀（不含改裝）。

English: You can't survive without oil shale. The autominer allows you to get oil shale without wasting time mining. Just fill it up and wait a bit. It uses gasoline canisters. For every [DECEA3]1000[-] gasoline, you will receive 6000 oil shale (excluding modifications).
Tchinese: 沒有油頁岩你就無法生存。自動採礦機可以讓您獲得油頁岩，而無需浪費時間採礦。只需填滿並稍等一下即可。它使用汽油罐。每 [DECEA3]1000[-] 汽油，您將收到 6000 油頁岩（不含改裝）。

English: You can't survive without clay. The autominer allows you to get clay without wasting time mining. Just fill it up and wait a bit. It uses gasoline canisters. For every [DECEA3]1000[-] gasoline, you will receive 12000 clay (excluding modifications).
Tchinese: 沒有黏土你就無法生存。自動採礦機可以讓您獲得黏土，而無需浪費時間採礦。只需填滿並稍等一下即可。它使用汽油罐。對於每 [DECEA3]1000[-] 汽油，您將收到 12000 黏土（不包括修改）。

English: An experimental station for charging portable reactors.\n\n[FF6666]ATTENTION! Requires connection to the power grid for charging.[-]
Tchinese: 用於為便攜式反應器充電的實驗站。 \n\n[FF6666]注意！需連接電網進行充電。 [-]

English: An experimental station for charging reactor augers.\n\n[FF6666]ATTENTION! Requires connection to the power grid for charging.[-]
Tchinese: 用於反應器螺旋輸送器充電的實驗站。 \n\n[FF6666]注意！需連接電網進行充電。 [-]

English: An experimental station for charging reactor Impact Drivers.\n\n[FF6666]ATTENTION! Requires connection to the power grid for charging.[-]
Tchinese: 充電反應器衝擊驅動器實驗站。 \n\n[FF6666]注意！需連接電網進行充電。 [-]

English: An experimental power supply that reveals all the advantages of reactor energy. Uses portable [FFB800]reactors[-] as a power source.
Tchinese: 揭示反應器能源所有優點的實驗電源。使用手提[FFB800]反應器[-]作為電源。

English: A huge industrial engine used in industrial equipment and power engineering.
Tchinese: 用於工業設備和動力工程的巨大工業發動機。

English:
This is the power of production. All large factories use such generators so that production does not stop, even when there is no access to the external power grid.

The fuel tank capacity and the amount of energy generated are significantly increased.

Industrial engines are used for operation.
Tchinese:
這就是生產的力量。所有大型工廠都使用這種發電機，即使沒有外部電網，生產也不會停止。 

油箱容量和發電量顯著增加。 

使用工業引擎進行運轉。

English: An intricate design for creating gunpowder. Significantly speeds up the creation of gunpowder bundles in the improved chemical station.
Tchinese: 用於製造火藥的複雜設計。改良後的化學站顯著加快了火藥束的製造速度。

English: A large barrel for compost processing. Necessary to unlock crafting in the improved chemical station.
Tchinese: 用於堆肥處理的大桶。需要在改進的化學站中解鎖工藝。

English: A set of chemical flasks for a real chemist. Necessary to unlock crafting in the improved chemical station.
Tchinese: 一套適合真正化學家的化學燒瓶。需要在改進的化學站中解鎖工藝。

English: A complete set of spare parts for mining in the autominer. Increases mining speed by [DECEA3]2 times[-].
Tchinese: 用於自動採礦機採礦的全套備件。將採礦速度提高 [DECEA3]2 倍[-]。

English: The packer allows you to quickly gather resources while mining in the autominer. It doubles the amount of resources mined.
Tchinese: 加殼器可以讓您在自動挖礦機中挖礦時快速收集資源。它使開採的資源量翻倍。

English: When activated, it emits a sound that repels uninvited guests. Also repels construction workers.
Tchinese: 當它被激活時，它會發出一種聲音來驅逐不速之客。也排斥建築工人。

English: Blacksmith's bellows for the improved forge. Increases smelting speed by [DECEA3]75%[-].
Tchinese: 用於改良鍛造的鐵匠風箱。冶煉速度提高[DECEA3]75%[-]。

English: Anvil for the improved forge. Increases crafting speed by [DECEA3]75%[-].
Tchinese: 用於改進鍛造的砧座。將製作速度提高 [DECEA3]75%[-]。

English: This is a compact stack of bullet casings. Use this item to open and unpack it.
Tchinese: 這是一疊緊湊的子彈殼。使用此物品打開並拆開包裝。

English: This is a compact stack of shotgun buckshot. Use this item to open and unpack it.
Tchinese: 這是一疊小巧的霰彈槍鉛彈。使用此物品打開並拆開包裝。

English: This is a compact stack of bullet tips. Use this item to open and unpack it.
Tchinese: 這是一疊緊湊的項目符號提示。使用此物品打開並拆開包裝。

English: A Bundle of resources obtained from recycling small household appliances. Use it to unpack it.\n\n[DECEA3]Requires «Salvage Operations» skill level 1 to create.[-]
Tchinese: 透過回收小家電所獲得的一堆資源。用它來解壓縮它。 \n\n[DECEA3]需要《救援行動》技能等級 1 才能創建。 [-]

English: A set of resources obtained from processing small units. Use it to unpack it.\n\n[DECEA3]Requires «Salvage Operations» skill level 1 to create.[-]
Tchinese: 透過處理小單位獲得的一組資源。用它來解壓縮它。 \n\n[DECEA3]需要《救援行動》技能等級 1 才能創建。 [-]

English: A Bundle of resources obtained from recycling medium household appliances. Use it to unpack it.\n\n[DECEA3]Requires «Salvage Operations» skill level 3 to create.[-]
Tchinese: 從回收中型家用電器中獲得的一組資源。用它來解壓縮它。 \n\n[DECEA3]需要《打撈行動》技能等級 3 才能創建。 [-]

English: A Bundle of resources obtained by recycling medium mechanical items. Use to unpack it.[DECEA3]\n\nRequires Scavenging skill level 3 to craft.[-]
Tchinese: 透過回收中型機械物品所獲得的資源包。用於打開它的包裝。 [DECEA3]\n\n需要拾荒技能等級 3 才能製作。 [-]

English: A Bundle of resources obtained by recycling medium mechanical items. Use to unpack it.[DECEA3]\n\nRequires Scavenging skill level 3 to craft.[-]
Tchinese: 透過回收中型機械物品所獲得的資源包。用於打開它的包裝。 [DECEA3]\n\n需要拾荒技能等級 3 才能製作。 [-]

English: A bundle of resources obtained from recycling large household appliances. Use it to unpack it.\n\n[DECEA3]Requires «Salvage Operations» skill level 5 to create.[-]
Tchinese: 回收大型家用電器所獲得的一捆資源。用它來解壓縮它。 \n\n[DECEA3]需要《打撈行動》技能等級 5 才能創建。 [-]

English: A bundle of resources obtained from recycling broken cars. Use it to unpack it.\n\n[DECEA3]Requires «Salvage Operations» skill level 5 to create.[-]
Tchinese: 透過回收破損汽車所獲得的一堆資源。用它來解壓縮它。 \n\n[DECEA3]需要《打撈行動》技能等級 5 才能創建。 [-]

English: A bundle of resources obtained from processing large units. Use it to unpack it.\n\n[DECEA3]Requires «Salvage Operations» skill level 5 to create.[-]
Tchinese: 透過處理大型單位所獲得的一組資源。用它來解壓縮它。 \n\n[DECEA3]需要《打撈行動》技能等級 5 才能創建。 [-]

English: It's good to have bolts and screws on hand. This saves a lot of time. Increases item creation speed by [DECEA3]30%[-].
Tchinese: 手邊有螺栓和螺絲是件好事。這節省了大量時間。將物品創建速度提高 [DECEA3]30%[-]。

English: A good tool is the main thing you need to create complex recipes. Now you can create rare and unique items.
Tchinese: 一個好的工具是創建複雜食譜所需的主要東西。現在您可以創造稀有且獨特的物品。

English: With these tools, you can stock up on food for [DECEA3]100[-] years ahead. Allows you to create preservatives.
Tchinese: 有了這些工具，您可以儲備未來​​ [DECEA3]100[-] 年的食物。允許您創建防腐劑。

English: Good sharp knives are always useful in the kitchen, especially if they were sharpened by [FFB800]Ururu[-]. They help you avoid cut fingers and reduce cooking time.
Tchinese: 好的鋒利的刀在廚房裡總是有用的，特別是如果它們被[FFB800]Ururu[-]磨利的話。它們可以幫助您避免割傷手指並減少烹飪時間。

English: A compact pack of concrete. Requires fewer resources when crafting.\nOpen this pack to get [DECEA3]1000[-] concrete.
Tchinese: 緊湊的混凝土包。製作時需要更少的資源。 \n開啟此包可獲得 [DECEA3]1000[-] 混凝土。

English: Specialized components and tools for creating next-generation armor. They enhance armor stats.\n\n[DECEA3]Used to craft experimental and improved armor.[-]
Tchinese: 用於製造下一代裝甲的專用組件和工具。它們增強裝甲統計數據。 \n\n[DECEA3]用來製作實驗性和改良的裝甲。 [-]

English: You are affected by the Rescuer armor bonus.
Tchinese: 你會受到救援者護甲加值的影響。

English:
You have equipped a full set of experimental [FFB800]Rescuer[-] armor.
Your party members benefit from the following bonuses: food and water consumption decreased by [DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRescuerFoodWaterFSBDisplay:0)}%[-], carrying capacity increased by [DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRescuerCarryCapacityFSBDisplay:0)}[-], health regeneration from healing increased by [DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRescuerRegHealthFSBDisplay:0)}%[-], more food and medicine in loot by [DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRescuerFoodLootFSBDisplay:0)}%[-], and running speed increased by [DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRescuerRunSpeedFSBDisplay:0)}%[-].

[DECEA3]Grants resistance to 1 active radiation effect.[-]
Tchinese:
您已裝備了全套實驗性 [FFB800]Rescuer[-] 盔甲。 
您的小隊成員將獲得以下獎勵：食物和水消耗減少 [DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRescuerFoodWaterFSBDisplay:0)}%[-]，承載能力增加[DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRescuerCarryCapacityFSBDisplay:0)}[-]，治療恢復生命值增加[DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRescuerRegHealthFSBDisplay:0)}%[-]，戰利品中的食物和藥品增加加[DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRescuerFoodLootFSBDisplay:0)}%[-]，運行速度增加[DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRescuerRunSpeedFSBDisplay:0)}%[-].

[FFB800] - 使用[8692FF]超級靈藥[-]和[8692FF]救援者的急救箱[-]會將效果應用於所有隊伍成員。當使用[8692FF]救援者的急救包[-]時，你可以將[FFB800]救援者的防禦[-]效果應用於盟友。 

[DECEA3]賦予對1種主動輻射效果的抵抗力。 [-]

English: You are affected by the Predator armor bonus.
Tchinese: 你會受到掠奪者護甲加值的影響。

English:
You have equipped a full set of experimental [FFB800]Predator[-] armor.
Firearm damage increased by [DECEA3]{cvar(.armorPredatorFSBDisplay:0)}%[-].

[FFB800]Everyone to the hunt![-]
Damage dealt by all members of your party is increased by [DECEA3]10%[-].

[FFB800]Second chance[-]
If you have less than [DECEA3]50[-] HP remaining, the active skill is triggered. You are immune to all damage for [DECEA3]5[-] seconds, and all enemies around you are knocked down. Cooldown: [DECEA3]90[-] seconds.

[DECEA3]Grants resistance to 1 active radiation effect.[-]
Tchinese:
你已經裝備了全套實驗性的 [FFB800]Predator[-] 盔甲。 
槍械傷害增加 [DECEA3]{cvar(.armorPredatorFSBDisplay:0)}%[-]。 

[FFB800]大家一起狩獵！ [-]
你的隊伍中所有成員造成的傷害增加[DECEA3]10%[-]。 

[FFB800]第二次機會[-]
如果你的剩餘生命值少於[DECEA3]50[-]，則觸發主動技能。你在 [DECEA3]5[-] 秒內免疫所有傷害，並且你周圍的所有敵人都會被擊倒。冷卻時間：[DECEA3]90[-] 秒。 

[DECEA3]賦予對 1 種主動輻射效果的抵抗力。 [-]

English: You were given a second chance.

Second chance activated.

You are immune to all damage for [DECEA3]5[-] seconds.
All enemies around you will be knocked to the ground.
Tchinese:
啟動第二次機會。 

你在 [DECEA3]5[-] 秒內免疫所有傷害。 
你周圍的所有敵人都會被擊倒在地。

English: Active ability on cooldown.\n\nWait until it ends to be able to activate it again.
Tchinese: 主動技能有冷卻時間。 \n\n等到它結束才能再次啟動它。

English: You are affected by the Plunderer armor bonus.
Tchinese: 你受到掠奪者護甲加成的影響。

English:
You have equipped a full set of experimental [FFB800]Plunderer[-] armor.
Your loot yield is increased by [DECEA3]{cvar(.armorPlundererFSBDisplay:0)}%[-].

[FFB800]Anger generation[-] - Each subsequent melee strike against an enemy increases your damage and attack speed by [DECEA3]10%[-], stacking up to [DECEA3]5[-] times. Effect duration: [DECEA3]3[-] seconds.

[FFB800]Fast hands[-] - Melee attack speed and reload speed for all party members (within 100m) are increased by [DECEA3]10%[-].

[DECEA3]Grants resistance to 1 active radiation effect.[-]
Tchinese:
您已裝備了全套實驗性 [FFB800]掠奪者[-] 盔甲。 
您的戰利品產量增加 [DECEA3]{cvar(.armorPlundererFSBDisplay:0)}%[-]。 

[FFB800]憤怒生成[-] - 隨後對敵人的每次近戰攻擊都會使您的傷害和攻擊速度增加 [DECEA3]10%[-]，最多可疊加[DECEA3]5[-]次。效果持續時間：[DECEA3]3[-]秒。 

[FFB800]快手[-] - 所有小隊成員（100m內）的近戰攻擊速度和裝彈速度增加[DECEA3]10%[-]。 

[DECEA3]賦予對1種主動輻射效果的抵抗力。 [-]

盟友盔甲套裝獎勵已啟動。

English: Ally has a full set of [FFB800]Plunderer[-] armor.\n\nMelee attack speed and reload speed increased by [DECEA3]10%[-].
Tchinese: 盟友擁有全套[FFB800]掠奪者[-]盔甲。 \n\n近戰攻擊速度和裝彈速度提高[DECEA3]10%[-]。

English: You are covered by a full set of [FFB800]Plunderer[-] armor.\n\nMelee attack speed and damage increased by [DECEA3]{cvar(.AngerGenerationDisplay:0)}%[-].
Tchinese: 你擁有全套 [FFB800]掠奪者[-] 盔甲。 \n\n近戰攻擊速度與傷害提升 [DECEA3]{cvar(.AngerGenerationDisplay:0)}%[-]。

Tchinese: 盟友擁有全套[FFB800]鼠[-]盔甲。 \n\n傷害抗性增加[DECEA3]5%[-]。

English: You have activated the Maus armor.

Shock therapy activated.

All enemies within [DECEA3]10[-] meters of you are under the effect of electric shock.
You lose [FFB800]5[-] HP every second.
Be careful, this can kill you!
Tchinese:
電擊療法已啟動。 

你周圍 [DECEA3]10[-] 公尺內的所有敵人都會受到電擊的影響。 
你每秒失去 [FFB800]5[-] 生命值。 
小心，這會殺死你！

English: You are under the protection of the Rescuer.
You have received complex healing from the Rescuer.\nYour damage resistance has been increased.
Tchinese: 你已經從救援者那裡得到了複雜的治療。 \n你的傷害抵抗力已經提高。

English: You are affected by the Maus armor bonus.
Tchinese: 你會受到鼠族護甲加值的影響。

English:

English:
Experience gained from killing enemies has been increased by [DECEA3]50%[-].
His unique combat tactic allows him to neutralize even powerful opponents: if an enemy withstands a power attack, they will be knocked to the ground, and if they attempt to rise (unless the target is a boss), they will be knocked back down.

When equipped with a full set of [FFB800]«Predator»[-] armor, attack speed increases by [DECEA3]50%[-], and stamina consumption for strikes is reduced by [DECEA3]25%[-]. 當裝備全套[FFB800]《掠奪者》[-]盔甲時，攻擊速度增加[DECEA3]50%[-]，攻擊時體力消耗減少[DECEA3]25%[-]。此外，當你進行強力攻擊時，你對目標造成的任何傷害都會增加 [DECEA3]200%[-]，持續 [DECEA3]6[-] 秒。

English: Experimental model of a reactor auger.\nAll main indicators have been significantly increased, and advanced mods can be installed. Resource extraction has been increased by [DECEA3]100%[-].\nDoes not consume gasoline during operation — the durability of the tool is its charge, which significantly reduces the chance of drawing unwanted attention during extraction. Tchinese: 反應器螺旋鑽的實驗模型。 \n所有主要指標均顯著提高，並且可以安裝高級模組。資源開採量增加了 [DECEA3]100%[-]。 \n操作過程中不消耗汽油 - 工具的耐用性就是它的費用，這大大減少了開採過程中引起不必要注意的機會。它可以在充電站或使用反應器電池恢復。沒有更好的提取工具。

English:
Experimental model of a reactor Impact Driver.
Experience gained from disassembling has been increased by [DECEA3]30%[-]
All main indicators have been significantly increased.
Does not consume gasoline during operation and does not make sounds, which significantly reduces the chance of attracting unnecessary attention during extraction. Now the durability of the tool is its charge. It can be restored at a charging station or using reactor batteries.
Disassembles everything that moves, has moved, or does not move at all.
Tchinese:
反應器衝擊起子實驗模型。

拆卸所有移動的、已經移動的或根本不移動的東西。

放下它並享受大屠殺。

English: In magazines about explosives, you can find short articles about how people independently improve various types of explosives.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you will be able to create new types of explosives and weapons.
Tchinese: 在有關炸藥的雜誌中，你可以找到關於人們如何獨立改進各種類型炸藥的短文。 \n\n收集足夠數量的文章後，你將能夠製造出新型炸藥和武器。

English: In robotics magazines you can find short articles about how people improve different types of turrets on their own.\n\nOnce you have collected enough articles, you will be able to improve turrets and create modifications for them.
Tchinese: 在機器人雜誌中，您可以找到人們如何自行改進不同類型砲塔的簡短文章。 \n\n一旦您收集了足夠的文章，您將能夠改進砲塔並對其進行修改。

English: In magazines about assault weapons, you can find small articles on how people independently improve factory weapons.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you will be able to improve machine guns or create experimental models.
Tchinese: 在有關突擊武器的雜誌中，你可以找到關於人們如何獨立改進工廠武器的小文章。 \n\n收集足夠數量的文章後，你將能夠改進機槍或創建實驗模型。

English: In magazines about shotguns, you can find small articles on how people independently improve factory weapons.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you can improve shotguns or create experimental models.
Tchinese: 在有關霰彈槍的雜誌中，您可以找到有關人們如何獨立改進工廠武器的小文章。 \n\n收集足夠數量的文章後，您可以改進霰彈槍或建立實驗模型。

English: In magazines about the world of rifles, you can find small articles on how people independently improve factory weapons.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you can improve sniper rifles or create experimental models.
Tchinese: 在有關步槍世界的雜誌中，您可以找到有關人們如何獨立改進工廠武器的小文章。 \n\n收集足夠數量的文章後，您可以改進狙擊步槍或建立實驗模型。

English: In magazines about hand weapons, you can find small articles on how people independently improve factory models of weapons.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you can improve automatic pistols or create experimental models.
Tchinese: 在有關手持武器的雜誌中，您可以找到人們如何獨立改進武器工廠模型的小文章。 \n\n收集足夠數量的文章後，您可以改進自動手槍或建立實驗模型。

English: In archery enthusiasts' magazines, you can find small articles on how people improve their weapons on their own.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you can improve your bow and crossbow, or create experimental models.
Tchinese: 在射箭愛好者的雜誌上，你可以找到人們如何自行改進武器的小文章。 \n\n收集到足夠數量的文章後，你可以改進你的弓和弩，或建立實驗模型。

English: You have learned how to create any workstations. But there are articles from experts that tell how to improve them.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you will be able to improve your stations and create useful tools for them.
Tchinese: 您已經學習如何建立任何工作站。但有一些專家的文章講述瞭如何改進它們。 \n\n收集了足夠數量的文章後，您將能夠改進您的網站並為其創建有用的工具。

English:
Learning how to create tools is not that difficult. It is difficult to understand how to improve them. Some magazines have articles on how to do this.

Having collected enough articles, you will be able to improve your tools and create experimental ones.

[DECEA3]Requires Advanced Engineering Lv.5[-]
Tchinese:
學習如何創建工具並不那麼困難。很難理解如何改進它們。一些雜誌上有關於如何執行此操作的文章。 

收集了足夠的文章後，您將能夠改進您的工具並建立實驗性工具。 

[DECEA3]需要高階工程 Lv.5[-]

English: Learn how to create professional construction tools. You will also learn how to create decorative elements of any complexity.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you will be able to add unique design to your buildings.
Tchinese: 了解如何創建專業的施工工具。您還將學習如何創建任何複雜的裝飾元素。 \n\n收集足夠數量的文章後，您將能夠為您的建築物添加獨特的設計。

English:
Professional electricians sometimes leave notes on how to create complex mechanisms with your own hands. There are also notes on experimental energy sources.

Having collected a sufficient number of articles, you will be able to create complex electrical devices and energy sources.

[DECEA3]Requires Advanced Engineering Lv.5[-]
Tchinese:
專業電工有時會留下關於如何用自己的雙手創建複雜機構的註釋。還有關於實驗能源的註解。 

收集了足夠數量的文章後，您將能夠創建複雜的電氣設備和能源。 

[DECEA3]需要高階工程 Lv.5[-]

English:
Professional hunters sometimes leave notes on how to create complex traps with your own hands.

Once you have collected enough articles, you will be able to create complex traps that can hold back any horde.

[DECEA3]Requires Advanced Engineering Lv.5[-]
Tchinese:
職業獵人有時會留下關於如何親手創建複雜陷阱的註釋。 

一旦收集了足夠的物品，您將能夠創建可以阻止任何部落的複雜陷阱。 

[DECEA3]需要高階工程 Lv.5[-]

English: It is not so easy to create a strong weapon for close combat, especially for heavy types. Only a few know the secrets of creating a truly powerful weapon. You can find notes about this in magazines.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you will be able to improve sledgehammers, clubs and spears, or create legendary ones.
Tchinese: 打造一把強大的近戰武器，尤其是重型武器，並不是那麼容易的事。只有少數人知道製造真正強大武器的秘密。您可以在雜誌中找到有關此內容的註釋。 \n\n收集足夠數量的文章後，您將能夠改進大錘、俱樂部和長矛，或創造傳奇的產品。

English: A weapon for killing zombies should not only be light, but also convenient. How to make knives and brass knuckles with maximum balance is sometimes written in thematic magazines. And if you add a little electricity... Try it, and the result will definitely please you. You can find notes about this in magazines.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you will be able to improve brass knuckles, machetes and a stun baton, or create legendary ones.
Tchinese: 殺死殭屍的武器不只要輕便，而且要方便。有時，主題雜誌上會寫到如何以最大平衡製作刀具和指節銅套。如果你加一點電......試試看，結果一定會讓你滿意。您可以在雜誌中找到有關此內容的註釋。 \n\n收集足夠數量的文章後，您將能夠改進指節銅套、砍刀和電擊棒，或創建傳奇物品。

English: How difficult it is when you need to eat and drink a lot of tasty things for one task. And you also need to understand how long it will work. In books about food, you can learn how to create food sets.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you will be able to create new elixirs.
Tchinese: 當你為了一項任務需要吃喝很多美味的東西時，這是多麼困難。而且您還需要了解它可以工作多長時間。在有關食物的書籍中，你可以學習如何製作食物套裝。 \n\n收集到足夠數量的物品後，你將能夠製作新的靈丹妙藥。

English: Not all drugs can cure — some can even kill. In medical journals, you can often find articles about what can and cannot be mixed with what. A huge field for experiments.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you will be able to create new experimental drugs.
Tchinese: 並非所有藥物都能治癒——有些藥物甚至可以致命。在醫學期刊中，您經常可以找到有關什麼可以和什麼不能混合的文章。廣闊的實驗領域。 \n\n收集足夠數量的文章後，您將能夠創建新的實驗藥物。

English:
A good farmer can grow crops in any weather. A master farmer can create new varieties of crops that are not affected by any weather. In books on farming, you can learn how to conduct plant selection and get the perfect variety.

Having collected a sufficient number of articles, you will be able to conduct regular and advanced selection at the farmer's station.

[DECEA3]Unlocks with the Farming and Agriculture skill level 3[-]
Tchinese:
一個好的農民可以在任何天氣下種植農作物。農民大師可以創造出不受任何天氣影響的農作物新品種。在有關農業的書籍中，您可以學習如何進行植物選擇並獲得完美的品種。 

收集足夠數量的文章後，您將能夠在農民站進行常規和高級選擇。 

[DECEA3]以農業技能等級3解鎖[-]

English: Good armor is the key to long-term survival. In books about ammunition, you can learn how to create sets of experimental armor, as well as how to create new, more advanced modifications.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you will be able to create experimental armor and improved modifications.
Tchinese: 好的盔甲是長期生存的關鍵。在有關彈藥的書籍中，您可以學習如何創建實驗裝甲組，以及如何創建新的、更高級的修改。 \n\n收集足夠數量的文章後，您將能夠創建實驗裝甲和改進的修改。

English: Experienced mechanics know how to turn any tin can into a real beast. In books for auto mechanics, you can learn how to create advanced modifications.\n\nHaving collected enough articles, you will be able to create advanced modifications for your vehicle.
Tchinese: 經驗豐富的機械師知道如何將任何錫罐變成真正的野獸。在汽車機械師書籍中，您可以學習如何建立進階修改。 \n\n收集足夠的文章後，您將能夠為您的車輛建立高級修改。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Explosives Lv.100[-] allows you to craft [DECEA3]Master Demolitionist[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines unlocks new types of explosives and an advanced grenade launcher.
Tchinese: 製作技能 [DECEA3]炸藥 Lv.100[-] 可以讓你製作 [DECEA3]爆破大師 [-] 雜誌。 \n閱讀這些雜誌可以解鎖新型炸藥和高級榴彈發射器。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Machine Guns Lv.100[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Machine Gun Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to improve or create unique and rare machine guns, and modifications for them.
Tchinese: 製作技能 [DECEA3] 機槍 Lv.100[-] 可以讓你製作 [DECEA3] 機槍大師 [-] 彈匣。 \n閱讀這些彈匣可以讓你改進或製造獨特且稀有的機槍，並對其進行修改。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Shotguns Lv.100[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Shotgun Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to improve or create unique and rare shotguns, and modifications for them.
Tchinese: 製作技能 [DECEA3] 霰彈槍 Lv.100[-] 可以讓你製作 [DECEA3] 霰彈槍大師 [-] 彈匣。 \n閱讀這些彈匣可以讓你改進或製造獨特且稀有的霰彈槍，並對其進行修改。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Rifles Lv.100[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Rifle Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to improve or create unique and rare rifles, and modifications for them.
Tchinese: 製作技能 [DECEA3]Rifles Lv.100[-] 可讓您建立 [DECEA3]Rifle Master[-] 彈匣。 \n閱讀這些彈匣將允許您改進或創建獨特且稀有的步槍，並對其進行修改。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Pistols Lv.100[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Master of Hand Weapons[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to improve or create unique and rare pistols, and modifications for them.
Tchinese: 製作技能 [DECEA3]手槍 Lv.100[-] 可以讓你製作 [DECEA3]手持武器大師 [-] 雜誌。 \n閱讀這些雜誌可以讓你改進或創造獨特且稀有的手槍，並對其進行修改。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Bows Lv.75[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Archery Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to upgrade or create rare bows and crossbows.
Tchinese: 製作技能 [DECEA3]弓 Lv.75[-] 可以讓你製作 [DECEA3]Archery Master[-] 雜誌。 \n閱讀這些雜誌可以讓你升級或製作稀有的弓和弩。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Robotics Lv.100[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Robotics Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to upgrade your robotic hammer and automated turrets, as well as create modifications for them.
Tchinese: 製作技能 [DECEA3]機器人 Lv.100[-] 可以讓你製作 [DECEA3]機器人大師 [-] 雜誌。 \n閱讀這些雜誌可以讓你升級你的機器人錘和自動砲塔，並為它們進行修改。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Workstations Lv.75[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Workstations Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines unlocks new stations and tools for them.
Tchinese: 製作技能 [DECEA3]Workstations Lv.75[-] 讓您建立 [DECEA3]Workstations Master[-] 雜誌。 \n閱讀這些雜誌可以為其解鎖新的工作站和工具。

English: Any of the crafting skills [DECEA3]Mining Tools Lv.100[-] or [DECEA3]Refining Tools Lv.75[-] will allow you to create [DECEA3]Tools Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to improve or create rare tools and modifications for them.
Tchinese: 任何製作技能[DECEA3]採礦工具Lv.100[-]或[DECEA3]精煉工具Lv.75[-]都可以讓你創建[DECEA3]工具大師[-]雜誌。 \n閱讀這些雜誌可以讓你改進或創建稀有工具並對其進行修改。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Repair Tools Lv.50[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Building Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines unlocks new decorative elements.
Tchinese: 製作技能 [DECEA3]維修工具 Lv.50[-] 可以讓你製作 [DECEA3]建築大師 [-] 雜誌。 \n閱讀這些雜誌可以解鎖新的裝飾元素。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Electrician Lv.100[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Electrician Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to create new items.
Tchinese: 製作技能 [DECEA3]電工 Lv.100[-] 可以讓你製作 [DECEA3]電工大師 [-] 雜誌。 \n閱讀這些雜誌可以讓你製作新物品。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Traps Lv.75[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Traps Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to create new traps.
Tchinese: 製作技能 [DECEA3]Traps Lv.75[-] 可以讓你製作 [DECEA3]Traps Master[-] 雜誌。 \n閱讀這些雜誌可以讓你製作新的陷阱。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Vehicles Lv.100[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Master Mechanic[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to create new modifications for your vehicle.
Tchinese: 製作技能 [DECEA3] 車輛 Lv.100[-] 可讓您建立 [DECEA3] 機械師 [-] 雜誌。 \n閱讀這些雜誌將允許您為您的車輛建立新的修改。

English: Any of the crafting skills [DECEA3]Clubs Lv.75[-], [DECEA3]Sledgehammers Lv.75[-] or [DECEA3]Spears Lv.75[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Master of Heavy Melee Weapons[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to upgrade or create unique and rare heavy melee weapons and modifications for them.
Tchinese: 任何製作技能 [DECEA3]Clubs Lv.75[-]、[DECEA3]Sledgehammers Lv.75[-] 或 [DECEA3]Spears Lv.75[-] 都可以讓你製作 [DECEA3]重型近戰武器大師 [-] 雜誌。 \n閱讀這些雜誌將允許你升級或創建獨特且稀有的重型近戰武器及其改裝。

English: Any of the crafting skills [DECEA3]Blades Lv.75[-] or [DECEA3]Knuckles Lv.75[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Master of Light Melee Weapons[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to upgrade or create unique and rare light melee weapons and modifications for them.
Tchinese: 任何製作技能 [DECEA3]Blades Lv.75[-] 或 [DECEA3]Knuckles Lv.75[-] 都可以讓你製作 [DECEA3]Master of Light Melee Weapons[-] 雜誌。 \n閱讀這些雜誌將允許你升級或創建獨特且稀有的輕型近戰武器及其改裝。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Food Lv.100[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Kitchen Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to create new elixirs, as well as prepare complex meals and baked goods in the stove.
Tchinese: 製作技能 [DECEA3]食物 Lv.100[-] 可以讓你製作 [DECEA3]Kitchen Master[-] 雜誌。 \n閱讀這些雜誌可以讓你製作新的靈丹妙藥，以及在爐子裡準備複雜的膳食和烘焙食品。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Medicines Lv.75[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Master Chemist[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to create new chemicals.
Tchinese: 製作技能 [DECEA3]Medicines Lv.75[-] 允許您創建 [DECEA3]Master Chemist[-] 雜誌。 \n閱讀這些雜誌將允許您創建新的化學物質。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Seeds Lv.50[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Farmer Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to conduct plant selection at the farmer's station.
Tchinese: 製作技能[DECEA3]種子Lv.50[-]可以讓你製作[DECEA3]農民大師[-]雜誌。 \n閱讀這些雜誌可以讓你在農民站進行植物選擇。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Armor Lv.100[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Armor Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines increases the quality of the armor you create. It also unlocks the ability to create advanced modifications.
Tchinese: 製作技能 [DECEA3]Armor Lv.100[-] 允許您建立 [DECEA3]Armor Master[-] 雜誌。 \n閱讀這些雜誌可以提高您創建的盔甲的品質。它還解鎖了創建高級修改的能力。

English: By collecting enough notes, you can get an additional skill point.
Tchinese: 透過收集足夠的筆記，你可以獲得額外的技能點數。

English: When you read it, you will receive [DECEA3]1[-] skill point.
Tchinese: 閱讀後，您將獲得[DECEA3]1[-]個技能點數。

English: You have a good teacher next to you.\nAll experience gained is increased by [DECEA3]5%[-].
Tchinese: 你身邊有一位好老師。 \n所獲得的所有經驗都會增加[DECEA3]5%[-]。

English: Advanced character skill development. Traders recognize you, and you receive bonuses to buying and selling prices.
Tchinese: 高級角色技能發展。交易者認可您，您將獲得買入和賣出價格的獎金。

English: No skill points are required here. The character's personal traits are formed after reading the book Personal Traits.\nYou can improve positive traits or rid the character of negative ones during the game by fulfilling each trait's conditions.
Tchinese: 這裡不需要技能點數。角色的個人特質是在閱讀《個人特質》一書後形成的。 \n您可以在遊戲過程中透過滿足每個特質的條件來改善角色的正面特質或消除負面特質。

English: You are still far from perfect, but everything is in your hands. Purchase prices from merchants have been reduced by [DECEA3]0.5%[-], and sale prices have been increased by [DECEA3]2%[-]. Explore the world and become the king of the wasteland.
Tchinese: 你還遠遠沒有達到完美，但一切都在你的手中。商家的購買價格降低了 [DECEA3]0.5%[-]，銷售價格提高了 [DECEA3]2%[-]。探索世界，成為廢土之王。

English: You are no longer just meat - you are running. Purchase prices from merchants have been reduced by [DECEA3]1%[-], and sale prices have been increased by [DECEA3]4%[-]. Explore the world and become the king of the wasteland.
Tchinese: 你不再只是肉——你在奔跑。商家的購買價格降低了[DECEA3]1%[-]，銷售價格提高了[DECEA3]4%[-]。探索世界，成為廢土之王。

English: You have seen the world and have some experience in survival. Purchase prices from merchants have been reduced by [DECEA3]1.5%[-], and sale prices have been increased by [DECEA3]6%[-]. Explore the world and become the king of the wasteland.
Tchinese: 你見過世面，也有一些生存的經驗。商家的購買價格降低了[DECEA3]1.5%[-]，銷售價格提高了[DECEA3]6%[-]。探索世界，成為廢土之王。

English: You've mastered the basics perfectly; now it's time to delve into the details. Purchase prices from merchants have been reduced by [DECEA3]2%[-], and sale prices have been increased by [DECEA3]8%[-]. Explore the world and become the king of the wasteland.
Tchinese: 您已經完美掌握了基礎知識；現在是時候深入研究細節了。商家的購買價格降低了[DECEA3]2%[-]，銷售價格提高了[DECEA3]8%[-]。探索世界，成為廢土之王。

English: Other survivors have heard about you, and not necessarily only good things. Purchase prices from merchants have been reduced by [DECEA3]2.5%[-], and sale prices have been increased by [DECEA3]10%[-]. Explore the world and become the king of the wasteland.
Tchinese: 其他倖存者都聽過你，而且不一定只是好事。商家的購買價格降低了[DECEA3]2.5%[-]，銷售價格提高了[DECEA3]10%[-]。探索世界，成為廢土之王。

English: You have excellent fighting skills - all that remains is to put them into practice. Purchase prices from merchants have been reduced by [DECEA3]3%[-], and sale prices have been increased by [DECEA3]12%[-]. Explore the world and become the king of the wasteland.
Tchinese: 你擁有出色的戰鬥技巧 - 剩下的就是將它們付諸實踐。商家的購買價格降低了[DECEA3]3%[-]，銷售價格提高了[DECEA3]12%[-]。探索世界，成為廢土之王。

English: You've seen a lot. But don't stop there. Purchase prices from merchants have been reduced by [DECEA3]3.5%[-], and sale prices have been increased by [DECEA3]14%[-]. Explore the world and become the king of the wasteland.
Tchinese: 你已經看過很多了。但不要就此止步。商家的購買價格降低了[DECEA3]3.5%[-]，銷售價格提高了[DECEA3]14%[-]。探索世界，成為廢土之王。

English: You can't be ignored. You're right there in every mess. Purchase prices from merchants have been reduced by [DECEA3]4%[-], and sale prices have been increased by [DECEA3]16%[-]. Explore the world and become the king of the wasteland.
Tchinese: 你不能被忽視。在每一個混亂中你都在那裡。商家的購買價格降低了[DECEA3]4%[-]，銷售價格提高了[DECEA3]16%[-]。探索世界，成為廢土之王。

English: People talk about you with admiration. You are perfect in almost everything. In almost everything. Purchase prices from merchants have been reduced by [DECEA3]4.5%[-], and sale prices have been increased by [DECEA3]18%[-]. Explore the world and become the king of the wasteland.
Tchinese: 人們談論你時都充滿欽佩。你幾乎在所有事情上都是完美的。幾乎在所有事情上。商家的購買價格降低了[DECEA3]4.5%[-]，銷售價格提高了[DECEA3]18%[-]。探索世界，成為廢土之王。

English: You are the king of the entire wasteland. There is nothing that will surprise or frighten you. Purchase prices from merchants have been reduced by [DECEA3]5%[-], and sale prices have been increased by [DECEA3]20%[-]. You are perfect!
Tchinese: 你是整個廢土的王。沒有什麼會讓你感到驚訝或害怕。商家的購買價格降低了[DECEA3]5%[-]，銷售價格提高了[DECEA3]20%[-]。你很完美！

English: You also need to be able to learn. Developing the skill of learning will allow you to learn faster, and when you master the skills, you will be able to teach others.
Tchinese: 您還需要能夠學習。培養學習技能可以讓你學得更快，當你掌握了這些技能後，你就可以教別人了。

English: Everything is like in school. Only zombies interfere with homework. Your experience gain is increased by [DECEA3]2.5%[-]
Tchinese: 一切都像在學校一樣。只有殭屍會幹擾家庭作業。你的經驗增益增加[DECEA3]2.5%[-]

English: Ah, student life. Classes, library, parties, girls... and zombies. Your experience gain is increased by [DECEA3]5%[-]
Tchinese: 啊，學生生活。班級、圖書館、派對、女孩……還有殭屍。你的經驗增益增加[DECEA3]5%[-]

English: If it weren't for the apocalypse, you would have become a good engineer. Your experience gain is increased by [DECEA3]7.5%[-]
Tchinese: 如果沒有世界末日，你會成為一個優秀的工程師。你的經驗增益增加[DECEA3]7.5%[-]

English: You don't have to read a lot to survive the apocalypse. You can, for example, shoot a lot. Your experience gain is increased by [DECEA3]10%[-]
Tchinese: 你不必讀太多書就能在末世中生存。例如，你可以拍攝很多次。你的經驗增益增加[DECEA3]10%[-]

English: With detailed processing you get more useful resources. The problem with spare parts will solve itself.
Tchinese: 透過詳細的處理，您可以獲得更多有用的資源。備件的問題會自行解決。

English: If you remember how to assemble, then disassembling is easy.\nDisassembly speed and resources received increased by [DECEA3]10%[-]
Tchinese: 如果你記得如何組裝，那麼反彙編就很容易了。 \n反組譯速度和獲得的資源增加[DECEA3]10%[-]

English: Breaking is not building. Taking apart is not assembling.\nDisassembly speed and resources received increased by [DECEA3]20%[-]
Tchinese: 破壞不是建設。拆開不等於組裝。 \n拆解速度和獲得的資源增加[DECEA3]20%[-]

English: It seems like trash, but it also seems like it's not.\nDisassembly speed and resources received increased by [DECEA3]30%[-]. You get an additional [DECEA3]1[-] alloy when dismantling cars.
Tchinese: 它看起來像垃圾，但又似乎不是。 \n反組譯速度和收到的資源增加了 [DECEA3]30%[-]。拆解汽車時您會獲得額外的 [DECEA3]1[-] 合金。

English: Your desire to take everything apart allows you to get more than ordinary workers get.\nDisassembly speed and resources received increased by [DECEA3]40%[-]. You get an additional [DECEA3]1[-] alloy when dismantling cars.
Tchinese: 你想要拆開所有東西的願望讓你得到比普通工人更多的東西。 \n拆解速度和獲得的資源增加[DECEA3]40%[-]。拆解汽車時您會獲得額外的 [DECEA3]1[-] 合金。

English: Assembly line at the factory, almost the same as the dismantling line in the wasteland.\nDisassembly speed and resources received increased by [DECEA3]50%[-]. You get an additional [DECEA3]2[-] alloy when dismantling cars.
Tchinese: 工廠的裝配線，和荒地的拆解線幾乎一樣。 \n拆解速度和獲得的資源增加[DECEA3]50%[-]。拆解汽車時您會獲得額外的 [DECEA3]2[-] 合金。

English: These guys don't have spare parts.\nDisassembly speed and resources received increased by [DECEA3]60%[-]. You get an additional [DECEA3]2[-] alloy when dismantling cars.
Tchinese: 這些傢伙沒有備用零件。 \n拆卸速度和收到的資源增加了[DECEA3]60%[-]。拆解汽車時您會獲得額外的 [DECEA3]2[-] 合金。

English: Don't feed me bread, give me something to figure out.\nDisassembly speed and resources received increased by [DECEA3]70%[-]. You get an additional [DECEA3]3[-] alloy when dismantling cars.
Tchinese: 不要給我麵包，給我一些東西來解決。 \n反組譯速度和收到的資源增加了 [DECEA3]70%[-]。拆解汽車時您會獲得額外的 [DECEA3]3[-] 合金。

English: For those who consider trash to be treasures.\nDisassembly speed and resources received increased by [DECEA3]80%[-]. You get an additional [DECEA3]3[-] alloy when dismantling cars.
Tchinese: 對於那些視垃圾為寶藏的人。 \n反組譯速度和收到的資源增加了 [DECEA3]80%[-]。拆解汽車時您會獲得額外的 [DECEA3]3[-] 合金。

English: You are an expert in dismantling almost anything.\nDisassembly speed and resources received increased by [DECEA3]90%[-]. You get an additional [DECEA3]4[-] alloy when dismantling cars.
Tchinese: 你是拆解幾乎所有東西的專家。 \n拆解速度和收到的資源增加了 [DECEA3]90%[-]。拆解汽車時您會獲得額外的 [DECEA3]4[-] 合金。

English: A super master always knows how to turn trash into treasure. And vice versa.\nDisassembly speed and resources received increased by [DECEA3]100%[-]. You get an additional [DECEA3]4[-] alloy when dismantling cars.
Tchinese: 超級大師總是知道如何變廢為寶。反之亦然。 \n反組譯速度和收到的資源增加了 [DECEA3]100%[-]。拆解汽車時您會獲得額外的 [DECEA3]4[-] 合金。

English: Rabbits are not only valuable fur, but also 1, 10 or even 76.3 kilograms of delicious meat. It all depends on where you found this rabbit. Learn to skillfully handle a knife or tool when cutting up animal carcasses. This will allow you to get more useful resources.
Tchinese: 兔子不只有名貴的皮毛，還有1、10甚至76.3公斤的美味肉品。這完全取決於你在哪裡找到這隻兔子。學習在切割動物屍體時熟練地使用刀或工具。這將使您獲得更多有用的資源。

English: If you cut around the edges, you can make excellent shawarma. Resources obtained when cutting up animal carcasses increased by [DECEA3]10%[-], mutation samples increased by [DECEA3]5%[-].
Tchinese: 如果你把邊緣切掉，你就能做出很棒的沙威瑪。切割動物屍體時所獲得的資源增加[DECEA3]10%[-]，突變樣本增加[DECEA3]5%[-]。

English: Butchering small animals is your main profession. Resources obtained when cutting up animal carcasses increased by [DECEA3]20%[-], mutation samples increased by [DECEA3]10%[-].
Tchinese: 屠宰小動物是你的主要職業。切割動物屍體時所獲得的資源增加[DECEA3]20%[-]，突變樣本增加[DECEA3]10%[-]。

English: With animals it's almost like with fish, only there's more blood. Resources obtained when cutting up animal carcasses increased by [DECEA3]30%[-], mutation samples increased by [DECEA3]15%[-].
Tchinese: 對動物來說，這幾乎就像魚一樣，只是血更多。切割動物屍體時所獲得的資源增加[DECEA3]30%[-]，突變樣本增加[DECEA3]15%[-]。

English: You know very well how to get the maximum amount of meat when cutting up a carcass. Not necessarily animals. Resources obtained when cutting up animal carcasses increased by [DECEA3]40%[-], mutation samples increased by [DECEA3]20%[-].
Tchinese: 您非常清楚如何在切割屍體時獲得最大量的肉。不一定是動物。切割動物屍體時所獲得的資源增加[DECEA3]40%[-]，突變樣本增加[DECEA3]20%[-]。

English: In a slaughterhouse, such specialists are vital. Resources obtained when cutting up animal carcasses increased by [DECEA3]50%[-], mutation samples increased by [DECEA3]25%[-].
Tchinese: 在屠宰場，這樣的專家至關重要。切割動物屍體時所獲得的資源增加[DECEA3]50%[-]，突變樣本增加[DECEA3]25%[-]。

English: A true connoisseur of delicacies. Resources obtained when cutting up animal carcasses increased by [DECEA3]60%[-], mutation samples increased by [DECEA3]30%[-].
Tchinese: 真正的美食鑑賞家。切割動物屍體時所獲得的資源增加[DECEA3]60%[-]，突變樣本增加[DECEA3]30%[-]。

English: Everything piece by piece. Resources obtained when cutting up animal carcasses increased by [DECEA3]70%[-], mutation samples increased by [DECEA3]35%[-].
Tchinese: 一切都是一點一滴的。切割動物屍體時所獲得的資源增加[DECEA3]70%[-]，突變樣本增加[DECEA3]35%[-]。

English: Always wondering what's inside? Resources obtained when cutting up animal carcasses increased by [DECEA3]80%[-], mutation samples increased by [DECEA3]40%[-].
Tchinese: 總是想知道裡面有什麼？切割動物屍體時所獲得的資源增加[DECEA3]80%[-]，突變樣本增加[DECEA3]40%[-]。

English: You like fatter carcasses. Resources obtained when cutting up animal carcasses increased by [DECEA3]90%[-], mutation samples increased by [DECEA3]45%[-].
Tchinese: 你喜歡更肥的屍體。切割動物屍體時所獲得的資源增加[DECEA3]90%[-]，突變樣本增加[DECEA3]45%[-]。

English: The super butcher takes everything from life. What can we say about the carcasses he butchers. Resources obtained when cutting up animal carcasses increased by [DECEA3]100%[-], mutation samples increased by [DECEA3]50%[-].
Tchinese: 超級屠夫奪走了生活中的一切。對於他屠宰的屍體我們能說些什麼呢？切割動物屍體時所獲得的資源增加[DECEA3]100%[-]，突變樣本增加[DECEA3]50%[-]。

English: Good sowing is the key to a good harvest. The teacher sows correctly and then you will have something to collect. Increases the amount of resources collected and gives a chance to get additional seeds when collecting.
Tchinese: 良好的播種是豐收的關鍵。老師播種正確，然後你就會有東西可以收集。增加收集的資源量，並在收集時有機會獲得額外的種子。

English: A garden won't be beautiful without effort.\nWhen harvesting, you get [DECEA3]1[-] extra seed. Reduces the number of plants required to create seedlings and fertilizers at the hydroponic station.
Tchinese: 不付出努力，花園就不會美麗。 \n收穫時，你會獲得 [DECEA3]1[-] 額外種子。減少水耕站培育幼苗和施肥所需的植物數量。

English:
The garden is your second home.
When harvesting, you get [DECEA3]1[-] extra seed and [DECEA3]1[-] extra resource. The chance to find seeds is increased by [DECEA3]10%[-]
You can replant plants bred through normal selection.
Reduces the number of plants and fertilizers required to create seedlings and fertilizers at the hydroponic station.
Tchinese:
花園是你的第二個家。 
收割時，你會獲得 [DECEA3]1[-] 額外種子和 [DECEA3]1[-] 額外資源。找到種子的機會增加[DECEA3]10%[-]
你可以重新種植透過正常選擇培育的植物。 
減少水耕站培育幼苗和肥料所需的植物和肥料數量。

English:
You have mastered the art of farming.
When harvesting, you get [DECEA3]1[-] extra seed and [DECEA3]2[-] extra resources. The chance to find seeds is increased by [DECEA3]20%[-]
You can replant plants bred through normal or advanced selection.
Reduces the number of plants and fertilizers required to create seedlings and fertilizers at the hydroponic station.
Tchinese:
你已經掌握了耕作的藝術。 
收割時，你會獲得 [DECEA3]1[-] 額外種子和 [DECEA3]2[-] 額外資源。找到種子的機會增加[DECEA3]20%[-]
你可以重新種植透過正常或高級選擇培育的植物。 
減少水耕站培育幼苗和肥料所需的植物和肥料數量。

Tchinese: 真正的輕甲鑑賞家可以隨時調整它以適合自己。透過提陞技能，你可以提高機動性和冷卻速度，並減少穿著全套輕甲奔跑時的傷害。

Tchinese: 透過改善你的身體，你將輕鬆克服任何挑戰。您的健康只會增長。

English: Developing perfect breathing increases your stamina.
Tchinese: 培養完美的呼吸可以增強你的耐力。

English: If you eat a lot, it can last you a long time. Increases food reserves.
Tchinese: 如果你吃很多，它可以持續很長時間。增加食物儲備。

English: Skills in organizing corporate events and other activities can be useful even after a nuclear explosion. With this experience, any expedition can proceed more quickly and the chances of its success increase.
Tchinese: 即使在核爆之後，組織公司活動和其他活動的技能也很有用。有了這些經驗，任何探險都可以更快進行，成功的機會也會增加。

English: Attention to detail in expedition organization pays off. Expedition duration is reduced by [DECEA3]10%[-], and the chance of successful completion is increased by [DECEA3]4%[-].
Tchinese: 探險組織中對細節的關注是有回報的。遠徵持續時間減少[DECEA3]10%[-]，成功完成的幾率增加[DECEA3]4%[-]。

English: Good organization means good results. Expedition duration has been reduced by [DECEA3]20%[-], and the chance of successful completion has been increased by [DECEA3]8%[-].
Tchinese: 良好的組織意味著良好的結果。遠徵持續時間減少了[DECEA3]20%[-]，成功完成的幾率增加了[DECEA3]8%[-]。

English: Selecting participants is the foundation for a successful expedition. Expedition duration has been reduced by [DECEA3]30%[-], and the chance of successful completion has been increased by [DECEA3]12%[-].
Tchinese: 選擇參與者是成功探險的基礎。遠徵持續時間減少了[DECEA3]30%[-]，成功完成的幾率增加了[DECEA3]12%[-]。

English: Understanding all aspects of preparing and executing even the most complex expeditions leaves virtually no chance of mission failure. Expedition duration has been reduced by [DECEA3]40%[-], and the chance of successful completion has been increased by [DECEA3]16%[-].
Tchinese: 即使是最複雜的探險，了解準備和執行的各個方面也幾乎不會導致任務失敗。遠徵持續時間減少了[DECEA3]40%[-]，成功完成的幾率增加了[DECEA3]16%[-]。

English: Better preparation is simply impossible. Now everything depends on the best team. Expedition duration has been reduced by [DECEA3]50%[-], and the chance of successful completion has been increased by [DECEA3]20%[-].
Tchinese: 更好的準備是根本不可能的。現在一切都取決於最好的團隊。遠徵持續時間減少了[DECEA3]50%[-]，成功完成的幾率增加了[DECEA3]20%[-]。

English: If you aggressively seek adventure, it will surely find you. Killing minibosses and bosses can attract new enemies.
Tchinese: 如果你積極尋求冒險，它一定會找到你。殺死小首領和首領可以吸引新的敵人。

English: If you find big loot, there may be more nearby. Killing a miniboss has an [DECEA3]8%[-] chance of attracting a new one, and killing a boss has an [DECEA3]4%[-] chance of attracting another one.
Tchinese: 如果您發現大量戰利品，附近可能還有更多。殺死一個小 Boss 有 [DECEA3]8%[-] 的幾率吸引新的，殺死一個 Boss 有 [DECEA3]4%[-] 的幾率吸引另一個。

English: You know how to throw a party even in a contaminated area. Killing a miniboss has an [DECEA3]16%[-] chance of attracting a new one, and killing a boss has an [DECEA3]8%[-] chance of attracting another one.
Tchinese: 即使在受污染的地區，您也知道如何舉辦派對。殺死一個小 Boss 有 [DECEA3]16%[-] 的幾率吸引新的，殺死一個 Boss 有 [DECEA3]8%[-] 的幾率吸引另一個。

English: If you use a wounded enemy as bait, you can find more. Killing a miniboss has an [DECEA3]24%[-] chance of attracting a new one, and killing a boss has an [DECEA3]12%[-] chance of attracting another one.
Tchinese: 如果你使用受傷的敵人作為誘餌，你可以找到更多。殺死一個小 Boss 有 [DECEA3]24%[-] 的幾率吸引新的，殺死一個 Boss 有 [DECEA3]12%[-] 的幾率吸引另一個。

English: A walk is much better when there is plenty of prey. Killing a miniboss has an [DECEA3]32%[-] chance of attracting a new one, and killing a boss has an [DECEA3]16%[-] chance of attracting another one.
Tchinese: 當有足夠的獵物時，步行會更好。殺死一個小 Boss 有 [DECEA3]32%[-] 的幾率吸引新的，殺死一個 Boss 有 [DECEA3]16%[-] 的幾率吸引另一個。

English: You definitely know how to attract the attention of the whole neighborhood. Killing a miniboss has an [DECEA3]40%[-] chance of attracting a new one, and killing a boss has an [DECEA3]20%[-] chance of attracting another one.
Tchinese: 你絕對知道如何吸引整個社區的注意。殺死一個小 Boss 有 [DECEA3]40%[-] 的幾率吸引新的，殺死一個 Boss 有 [DECEA3]20%[-] 的幾率吸引另一個。

Wait until the expedition is completed
Excellent! I'll hand this gear over to the Scav. I think that's enough to begin the mission.

English: The expedition was successfully completed. Here's everything we found.
Tchinese: 此次探險活動圓滿結束。這是我們發現的一切。

English: Unfortunately, the news isn't good. The expedition encountered a horde too large. They barely escaped and failed to secure any loot. Let's hope for better luck next time.
Tchinese: 不幸的是，消息並不好。探險隊遇到了太多的部落。他們勉強逃脫並未能獲得任何戰利品。讓我們期待下次有更好的運氣。

English: Traders in the exclusion zone cannot help with everything. Communication with the outside world will allow you to exchange rare resources and receive unique tasks.
Tchinese: 禁區內的商人無法提供一切協助。與外界的溝通可以讓你交換稀有資源並接受獨特的任務。

English: There is not much smoke, but you can see it from the plane. But be careful, it can attract unnecessary attention.\n\n[DECEA3]Support mission item. Be careful - you need to place smoke signal after activating the mission at the specified point. Can be dismantled for valuable resources.[-]
Tchinese: 煙霧不多，但從飛機上就能看到。但要小心，它可能會引起不必要的注意。 \n\n[DECEA3]支援任務項目。請小心 - 在指定地點啟動任務後，您需要放置煙霧訊號。可以拆卸以獲得寶貴的資源。 [-]

English: If you're exposed to radiation, you need to know how to cleanse your gear to avoid dying. This kit contains everything you need for cleansing and restoration. When equipped, your radiation recovery speed increases by [DECEA3]50%[-] if you've received less than [DECEA3]25%[-] radiation, by [DECEA3]100%[-] if you've received less than [DECEA3]50%[-], by [DECEA3]150%[-] if you've received less than [DECEA3]75%[-], and by [DECEA3]200%[-] at critical radiation levels. This restoration only works if you're not actively exposed to radiation.\n\nInstalled in body armor.
Tchinese: 如果您暴露在輻射下，您需要知道如何清潔您的裝備以避免死亡。該套件包含清潔和修復所需的一切。裝備後，如果您收到的輻射少於[DECEA3]25%[-]，您的輻射恢復速度將增加[DECEA3]50%[-]，如果您收到的輻射少於[DECEA3]50%[-]，您的輻射恢復速度將增加[DECEA3]100%[-]，如果您收到的輻射少於[DECEA3]75%[-]，您的輻射恢復速度將增加[DECEA3]150%[-]，並且[DECEA3]200%[-]處於臨界輻射水平。只有當您未主動暴露於輻射時，此修復體才有效。 \n\n安裝在防彈衣中。

English: The secret of why scientists can spend so long in the most dangerous zones has been revealed. They know how to properly recover from radiation. This kit contains everything necessary for cleansing and recovery. When carried, your radiation recovery speed increases by [DECEA3]200%[-] if you have received less than [DECEA3]25%[-] radiation, by [DECEA3]300%[-] if you've received less than [DECEA3]50%[-], by [DECEA3]400%[-] if you've received less than [DECEA3]75%[-], and by [DECEA3]500%[-] at critical radiation levels. Recovery only works if you are not under active radiation.\n\nInstalled in body armor.
Tchinese: 科學家為何能在最危險的地區待上這麼長時間的秘密已經揭曉。他們知道如何正確地從輻射中恢復。該套件包含清潔和恢復所需的一切。攜帶後，如果您收到的輻射少於[DECEA3]25%[-]，您的輻射恢復速度會增加[DECEA3]200%[-]，如果您收到的輻射少於[DECEA3]50%[-]，您的輻射恢復速度會增加[DECEA3]300%[-]，如果您收到的輻射少於[DECEA3]75%[-]，您的輻射恢復速度會增加[DECEA3]400%[-]，並且[DECEA3]500%[-]處於臨界輻射水平。只有當您未處於主動輻射時，恢復才有效。 \n\n安裝在防彈衣中。

English: This headgear modifier identifies and marks targets within a radius of [DECEA3]80[-] meters. At a distance of [DECEA3]40[-] meters, you will be able to recognize the type of target. English:
Chop down the biggest trees or zombies faster than Paul Bunyan with this great chainsaw that uses gasoline for fuel.

Has rare property [FAFF63]«Unkillable»[-]
Significantly increased durability and reduced consumption during use.

Repair with a Repair Kit.

報廢為電動工具零件。

English:
Light armor does not restrict movement and weighs almost nothing.

Movement speed increased by [DECEA3]10%[-].
Overall heat resistance increased by [DECEA3]10%[-] and cold resistance decreased by [DECEA3]5%[-].

輕甲不限制移動，幾乎沒有重量。

English:
Medium armor is ideal for actively fighting infected enemies.

Ranged weapon damage increased by [DECEA3]10%[-].
Overall temperature resistance increased by [DECEA3]5%[-].

中型護甲非常適合主動對抗受感染的敵人。 

遠程武器傷害增加[DECEA3]10%[-].
整體耐溫性增加[DECEA3]5%[-]。

English:
Heavy armor makes you much more resistant to damage taken. And in melee combat, you deal enhanced blows.

You gain [DECEA3]30[-] health.
Melee weapon damage increased by [DECEA3]10%[-].
Overall cold resistance increased by [DECEA3]10%[-] and heat resistance decreased by [DECEA3]5%[-].
Tchinese:
重甲使你更能抵抗受的傷害。在近戰戰鬥中，你會造成增強的打擊。 

你獲得[DECEA3]30[-]生命值。 
近戰武器傷害增加[DECEA3]10%[-].
整體耐冷性增加[DECEA3]10%[-]，耐熱性減少[DECEA3]5%[-]。

English:
Light Armor
Birds and wasps are your friends. You can find more honey by cutting down trees.

Full Set Bonus: Increases wood harvest.
Tchinese:
輕甲
鳥類和黃蜂是你的朋友。你可以透過砍伐樹木找到更多的蜂蜜。 

全套獎勵：增加木材收成。

English:
Light Armor
With a vest full of pockets, you will have room for everything. Reduces encumbrance.

Full Set Bonus: Increases wood harvest.
Tchinese:
輕甲
擁有裝滿口袋的背心，你將有空間容納所有東西。減少負擔。 

全套獎勵：增加木材收穫。

English:
Light Armor
Forget about calluses. Strong leather holds the ax handle well. Reduces stamina consumption when using axes.

Full Set Bonus: Increases wood harvest.
Tchinese:
輕甲
忘記老繭吧。堅固的皮革可以很好地固定斧柄。減少使用斧頭時的耐力消耗。 

全套獎勵：增加木材收穫。

English:
Light Armor
Comfortable shoes for maintaining balance when swinging axes. Increases damage with axes against blocks.

Full Set Bonus: Increases wood harvest.
Tchinese:
輕甲
舒適的鞋子，用於在擺動軸時保持平衡。增加斧頭對物塊的傷害。 

全套獎勵：增加木材收穫。
伐木工半套裝獎金活躍

English: Professional lumberjack equipment allows you to harvest timber more efficiently.\n\nWood production increased by {cvar(.armorLumberjackFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 專業伐木設備讓您更有效率地採伐木材。 \n\n木材產量增加{cvar(.armorLumberjackFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Light Armor

English:
Light Armor

受到主的祝福，這些線將保護你免受邪惡的侵害。減少傳入傷害。

English:
Light Armor

輕甲
打擊你的敵人。增加對不死生物造成的傷害。

English:
Light Armor
You can't do anything if you're dead. Reduces healing time for abrasions and fractures.

Full Set Bonus: Increases wasteland experience gained and provides resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect.

輕甲
如果你死了你就什麼也做不了。減少擦傷和骨折的癒合時間。

你將對荒地充滿信心。

English: Even with an incomplete Preacher set, you will be filled with faith in the wasteland.\n\nExperience gained is increased by {cvar(.armorSemiPreacherFSBDisplay:0)}% in the wasteland.

Light Armor

Light Armor
Almost a ninja. Less noise and faster movement in stealth.

Light Armor

舒適的手套，可快速使用任何武器。提高裝填速度。

English:
Light Armor
Comfortable shoes for jogging. Increases the speed of stamina regeneration when running.

Tchinese:
輕甲
適合慢跑的舒適鞋。提高跑步時耐力恢復的速度。

Light Armor

輕甲

English:
Light Armor

輕甲
時尚輕質的材料意味著您可以承受任何衝擊。增加對嚴重傷害的抵抗力。

Light Armor

Tchinese:
輕甲

English:
Light Armor
These shoes will not soon become unusable. Increases stamina.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the damage of the Gunslinger ability.
Tchinese:
輕甲
這些鞋子不會很快變得無法使用。增加耐力。

English: Even with an incomplete Enforcer set, pistols are your best friends.\n\nDamage from SMGs and pistols increased by {cvar(.armorSemiEnforcerFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Your best friends are pistols.\n\nGunslinger ability damage increased by {cvar(.armorEnforcerFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 你最好的朋友是手槍。 \n\n槍手技能傷害提高 {cvar(.armorEnforcerFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Medium Armor
Keep the sun out of your eyes and on the prize. Increases the chance to find seeds in loot.

Full Set Bonus: Adds a chance to harvest an extra crop.
Tchinese:
中型裝甲
避免陽光照射到你的眼睛和獎品。增加在戰利品中找到種子的機會。

English:
Medium Armor
Farmers recover faster with food because they know how to get it. Increases the recovery of health and stamina from food, as well as your lifting capacity.

Full Set Bonus: Adds a chance to harvest an extra crop.
Tchinese:
中型護甲
農民透過食物恢復得更快，因為他們知道如何取得食物。增加食物對健康和耐力的恢復，以及你的舉重能力。

English:
Medium Armor
Only a real farmer knows how to harvest quickly. Increases the attack speed of knives and machetes.

中甲
只有真正的農民才知道如何快速收割。提高刀和砍刀的攻擊速度。

English:
Medium Armor
Nothing beats a comfortable pair of boots out in the field. Adds a chance to gain a seed when harvesting.

Full Set Bonus: Adds a chance to harvest an extra crop.
Tchinese:
中型裝甲
在野外沒有什麼比一雙舒適的靴子更好的了。收穫時增加獲得種子的機會。
