English: A real farmer knows how to harvest the crop correctly without damaging it.\n\nMakes it possible to collect an additional {cvar(.armorFarmerFSBDisplay:0)}% of the harvest

English: Even with an incomplete Farmer's kit, you know how to properly harvest crops without damaging them.\n\nGives you the opportunity to additionally harvest {cvar(.armorSemiFarmerFSBDisplay:0)}% of the crop.
Tchinese: 即使農夫工具包不完整，您也知道如何正確收割農作物而不損壞它們。 \n\n 讓您有機會額外收割 {cvar(.armorSemiFarmerFSBDisplay:0)}% 的農作物。

English:
Medium Armor
You always easily adapt to new areas. Increases all experience gained in desert and winter biomes.

Tchinese:
中甲
你總是能輕鬆適應新領域。增加在沙漠和冬季生物群落中獲得的所有經驗。

English:
Medium Armor
You can easily put your face under attack. Increases the number of health points.

Full Set Bonus: Additional experience for killing ferals and radiated zombies.
Tchinese:
中甲
你可以輕鬆地讓你的臉受到攻擊。增加生命值。

English:
Medium Armor
Don't fight back - so what? Increases the attack speed of clubs and sledgehammers.

Tchinese:
中型裝甲
不反擊——那又怎樣？提高棍棒和大槌的攻擊速度。

English:
Medium Armor
Without transportation, it's like having no hands. Reduces vehicle fuel consumption.

Tchinese:
中甲
沒有交通工具，就像沒有雙手一樣。減少車輛燃油消耗。

Tchinese: 喜歡更強大的對手。 \n\n殺死野性和輻射殭屍的經驗增加 {cvar(.armorBikerFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Even with an incomplete Biker set, you are a fan of stronger opponents.\n\nExperience for killing wild and infected zombies increased by {cvar(.armorSemiBikerFSBDisplay:0)}%

Medium Armor

清道夫半套裝獎金活躍

English: Even with an incomplete Scavenger set, you have a keen eye for finding valuable resources that would escape the gaze of others.\n\nYou find loot that is {cvar(.armorSemiScavengerFSBDisplay:0)}% higher in quality
Tchinese: 即使擁有不完整的清道夫套裝，您也能敏銳地尋找能夠逃脫他人目光的寶貴資源。 \n\n您會發現品質高出 {cvar(.armorSemiScavengerFSBDisplay:0)}% 的戰利品

English:
Medium Armor
Rangers are ruthless negotiators, especially while wearing a well crafted hat. Increases bartering.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all damage dealt and provides resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect
Tchinese:
中甲
遊騎兵是無情的談判者，尤其是戴著精心製作的帽子時。增加以物易物貿易。 

全套獎勵：增加造成的所有傷害並提供對 [DECEA3]1[-] 輻射效果的抵抗力

English:
Medium Armor
Nature has taught strength not only of the spirit, but also of the body. Increases the number of health points.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all damage dealt and provides resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect
Tchinese:
中甲
大自然不僅教會了精神的力量，也教會了身體的力量。增加生命值。 

全套獎勵：增加造成的所有傷害並提供對 [DECEA3]1[-] 輻射效果的抵抗力

English:
Medium Armor
These comfortable gloves allow you to quickly handle any weapon. Increases weapon reload speed.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all damage dealt and provides resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect
Tchinese:
中型裝甲
這些舒適的手套讓您可以快速操作任何武器。提高武器裝填速度。 

全套獎勵：增加造成的所有傷害並提供對 [DECEA3]1[-] 輻射效果的抵抗力

English:
Medium Armor
Endurance is the key to successful survival in the wild. Increases stamina.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all damage dealt and provides resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect
Tchinese:
中甲
耐力是野外成功生存的關鍵。增加耐力。 

全套獎勵：增加造成的所有傷害並提供對 [DECEA3]1[-] 輻射效果的抵抗力

English:
The ability to survive in any conditions allows you to deal increased damage with any weapon and in any weather.

All ranged damage increased by {cvar(.armorRangerFSBDisplay:0)}%
Grants resistance to one active radiation effect.
Tchinese:
在任何條件下生存的能力使您可以在任何天氣下使用任何武器造成更大的傷害。 

所有遠程傷害增加 {cvar(.armorRangerFSBDisplay:0)}%
 賦予對一種主動輻射效果的抵抗力。

English: Even with an incomplete Ranger set, you deal increased damage with any weapon and in any weather.\n\nAll ranged damage increased by {cvar(.armorSemiRangerFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 即使使用不完整的遊騎兵套裝，您在任何天氣下使用任何武器都會造成更高的傷害。 \n\n所有遠程傷害增加 {cvar(.armorSemiRangerFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Medium Armor
Hard training and injuries were not in vain. Everything heals on you like it does on a dog.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by automatic weapons.
Tchinese:
中甲
苦練和受傷沒有白費。一切都會像對待狗一樣治癒你。 

全套獎勵：增加自動武器造成的傷害。

English:
Medium Armor
True commandos endure without flinching. Faster critical injury recovery.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by automatic weapons.
Tchinese:
中型裝甲
真正的突擊隊員堅忍不退。更快的重傷恢復。 

全套獎勵：增加自動武器造成的傷害。

English:
Medium Armor
A good shooter disassembles and reassembles his weapon with ease, and has perfected the reloading process. Increases the reload speed of automatic weapons.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by automatic weapons.
Tchinese:
中型裝甲
優秀的射手可以輕鬆拆卸和重新組裝他的武器，並完善重新裝填過程。提高自動武器的裝填速度。 

全套獎勵：增加自動武器造成的傷害。

English:
Medium Armor
These shoes are suitable for the most challenging obstacle courses. Increases safe fall height.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by automatic weapons.
Tchinese:
中型裝甲
這些鞋款適合最具挑戰性的障礙路線。增加安全墜落高度。 

全套獎勵：增加自動武器造成的傷害。
突擊隊半套裝獎勵激活

English: Your weapons are machine guns and submachine guns. You can do wonders with them.\n\nDamage dealt by automatic weapons increased by {cvar(.armorCommandoFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 你的武器是機關槍和衝鋒槍。你可以用它們創造奇蹟。 \n\n自動武器造成的傷害增加 {cvar(.armorCommandoFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Even in an incomplete Commando set, your weapons are machine guns and assault rifles. With them you can work wonders.\n\nDamage dealt by automatic weapons is increased by {cvar(.armorSemiCommandoFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 即使在不完整的突擊隊套裝中，你的武器也是機關槍和突擊步槍。有了它們，你可以創造奇蹟。 \n\n自動武器造成的傷害增加 {cvar(.armorSemiCommandoFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Medium Armor
They'll never see it coming. Deal more damage when sneaking.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by sniper rifles.
Tchinese:
中型裝甲
他們永遠不會看到它的到來。潛行時造成更多傷害。 

全套獎勵：增加狙擊步槍造成的傷害。

English:
Medium Armor
Move unseen, unheard, and unharmed. Increases sneak effectiveness.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by sniper rifles.
Tchinese:
中型護甲
移動時看不見、聽不見、不受傷害。提高潛行效率。 

全套獎勵：增加狙擊步槍造成的傷害。

English:
Medium Armor
Silently - but very quickly. Increases the rate of fire and reload speed of sniper rifles.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by sniper rifles.
Tchinese:
中型裝甲
悄無聲息——但速度非常快。提高狙擊步槍的射速和裝填速度。 

全套獎勵：增加狙擊步槍造成的傷害。

English:
Medium Armor
Silent, but deadly. Sprinting while sneaking makes no extra sound.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by sniper rifles.
Tchinese:
中型裝甲
沉默，但致命。潛行時衝刺不會發出額外的聲音。 

全套獎勵：增加狙擊步槍造成的傷害。

English: The hidden killer can easily find and eliminate his target. You have no equal in this.\n\nDamage dealt by sniper rifles increased by {cvar(.armorAssassinFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 隱藏的殺手可以輕鬆找到並消滅他的目標。你在這方面無與倫比。 \n\n狙擊步槍造成的傷害增加 {cvar(.armorAssassinFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Even with an incomplete set, the assassin can easily find and eliminate his target. You have no equal in this.\n\nDamage dealt by sniper rifles is increased by {cvar(.armorSemiAssassinFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 即使裝備不完整，刺客也可以輕易找到並消滅他的目標。你在這方面無與倫比。 \n\n狙擊步槍造成的傷害增加 {cvar(.armorSemiAssassinFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Heavy Armor
The main thing when you climb into a mine is to remember the way back. Increases experience gained when mining ore.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the amount of ore mined.
Tchinese:
重甲
當你爬進礦坑時最重要的是記住回來的路。增加開採礦石時所獲得的經驗。 

全套獎勵：增加開採的礦石量。

English:
Heavy Armor
You can always quickly repair the tool. That is why it does not break down so often.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the amount of ore mined.
Tchinese:
重甲
你總是可以快速修復工具。這就是為什麼它不會經常損壞的原因。 

全套獎勵：增加開採的礦石量。

English:
Heavy Armor
A chip here, a chip there, and any vein will give in. Increases block damage for mining tools.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the amount of ore mined.
Tchinese:
重甲
這裡有一個缺口，那裡有一個缺口，任何礦脈都會屈服。增加採礦工具的方塊傷害。 

全套獎勵：增加開採的礦石量。

English:
Heavy Armor
With such equipment, stones underfoot are not a problem. Reduces stamina consumption when using a pickaxe.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the amount of ore mined.
Tchinese:
重甲
有了這樣的裝備，腳下的石頭都不是問題。減少使用鎬時的耐力消耗。 

全套獎勵：增加開採的礦石量。

English: An experienced miner knows how to get a little more ore.\n\nThe amount of ore mined has been increased by {cvar(.armorMinerFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 有經驗的礦工知道如何獲得更多的礦石。 \n\n開採的礦石量增加了 {cvar(.armorMinerFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Even with an incomplete Miner set, you know how to mine a little more ore.\n\nThe amount of ore mined has been increased by {cvar(.armorSemiMinerFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 即使礦工套裝不完整，你也知道如何開採更多礦石。 \n\n開採的礦石量增加了 {cvar(.armorSemiMinerFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Heavy Armor
Guarded against the severe conditions of the wasteland, this headgear enables the Nomad to wander further. Reduces food and water consumption.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the damage dealt by shotguns and gives resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect.
Tchinese:
重甲
這款頭盔可以抵禦荒地的惡劣條件，讓遊牧者能夠走得更遠。減少食物和水的消耗。 

全套獎勵：增加霰彈槍造成的傷害並抵抗[DECEA3]1[-]輻射效果。

English:
Heavy Armor
Anything can happen on any journey. The main thing is the ability to quickly recover and move on. Faster critical injury recovery.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the damage done by shotguns and gives resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect.
Tchinese:
重甲
任何旅程中任何事情都可能發生。最重要的是能夠快速恢復並繼續前進。更快的重傷恢復。 

全套獎勵：增加霰彈槍造成的傷害並抵抗[DECEA3]1[-]輻射效果。

English:
Heavy Armor
If you go into a house to spend the night, there is definitely someone there. Increases the rate of fire and reload speed of shotguns.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the damage done by shotguns and gives resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect.
Tchinese:
重甲
如果你進房子過夜，那裡一定有人。提高霰彈槍的射速和裝填速度。 

全套獎勵：增加霰彈槍造成的傷害並抵抗[DECEA3]1[-]輻射效果。

English:
Heavy Armor
When crawling through the mountains, it is better not to look down. Increases safe fall height.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the damage done by shotguns and gives resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect.
Tchinese:
重甲
在山中爬行時，最好不要低頭。增加安全墜落高度。 

全套獎勵：增加霰彈槍造成的傷害並抵抗 [DECEA3]1[-] 輻射效應。

English:
This is the best that can be offered to guests outside the tent.

Damage dealt by shotguns increased by {cvar(.armorNomadFSBDisplay:0)}%
Grants resistance to one active radiation effect.
Tchinese:
這是可以為帳篷外的客人提供的最好的。 

霰彈槍造成的傷害增加 {cvar(.armorNomadFSBDisplay:0)}%
 賦予對一種主動輻射效應的抵抗力。

English: Even without a full set, you know what you can offer to guests outside the tent.\n\nDamage dealt by shotguns increased by {cvar(.armorSemiNomadFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 即使沒有全套，您也知道可以為帳篷外的客人提供什麼。 \n\n霰彈槍造成的傷害增加 {cvar(.armorSemiNomadFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Heavy Armor
You might not be invited on any dates, but you will hone your skills. Increases experience gain.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage from the [DECEA3]«Intelligence»[-] attribute.
Tchinese:
重甲
你可能不會被邀請參加任何約會，但你會磨練你的技能。增加經驗增益。 

全套獎勵：增加 [DECEA3]《智力》[-] 屬性的傷害。

English:
Heavy Armor
Your lack of fashion sense gives you the ability to focus on your inventions. Adds a chance to gain two crafting skill points when reading magazines.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage from the [DECEA3]«Intelligence»[-] attribute.
Tchinese:
重甲
你缺乏時尚感，但你有能力專注於你的發明。閱讀雜誌時有機會獲得兩個製作技能點數。 

全套獎勵：增加[DECEA3]《智力》[-]屬性的傷害。

English:
Heavy Armor
Protect your delicate hands from the cold and become an intellectual badass. Increases attack speed with intellect-based weapons.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage from the [DECEA3]«Intelligence»[-] attribute.
Tchinese:
重甲
保護你嬌嫩的雙手免受寒冷，成為一個知性的壞蛋。提高基於智力的武器的攻擊速度。 

全套獎勵：增加[DECEA3]《智力》[-]屬性的傷害。

English:
Heavy Armor
Those distant school years were not in vain. You definitely learned how to run away. Increases running speed.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage from the [DECEA3]«Intelligence»[-] attribute.
Tchinese:
重甲
那些遙遠的學年沒有白費。你肯定學會如何逃跑。提高跑步速度。 

全套獎勵：增加 [DECEA3]《智力》[-] 屬性的傷害。
書呆子半套裝獎金活躍

English: Robots are not only valuable fur...\n\nDamage from the [DECEA3]«Intelligence»[-] attribute increased by {cvar(.armorNerdFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 機器人不僅是有價值的皮毛...\n\n[DECEA3]《智力》[-]屬性造成的傷害增加{cvar(.armorNerdFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Even in an incomplete Nerd set, robots are not only valuable fur...\n\nDamage dealt by the [DECEA3]«Intelligence»[-] attribute is increased by {cvar(.armorSemiNerdFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 即使在不完整的書呆子套裝中，機器人也不僅僅是有價值的毛皮...\n\n[DECEA3]《智力》[-] 屬性造成的傷害增加 {cvar(.armorSemiNerdFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Heavy Armor
Grandma's ointments work wonders. Increases the speed of healing received.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all melee damage.
Tchinese:
重甲
奶奶的藥膏有奇效。提高收到的治療速度。 

全套獎勵：增加所有近戰傷害。

English:
Heavy Armor
Oops. I didn’t immediately notice that my arm was broken. Increases the recovery rate of critical wounds.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all melee damage.
Tchinese:
重甲
哎呀。我沒有立即註意到我的手臂骨折了。提高嚴重傷害的恢復率。 

全套獎勵：增加所有近戰傷害。

English:
Heavy Armor
Well, come one at a time. There's enough for everyone. Increases melee attack speed.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all melee damage.
Tchinese:
重甲
好吧，一次來一個。每個人都夠了。提高近戰攻擊速度。 

全套獎勵：增加所有近戰傷害。

English:
Heavy Armor
Step right, step left. You easily dodge enemy attacks and spend less stamina.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all melee damage.
Tchinese:
重甲
右步，左步。您可以輕鬆躲避敵人的攻擊並消耗更少的耐力。 

全套獎勵：增加所有近戰傷害。
襲擊者半套裝獎勵活躍

English: You are invincible in close combat.\n\nMelee damage increased by {cvar(.armorRaiderFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 你在近戰中是無敵的。 \n\n近戰傷害增加 {cvar(.armorRaiderFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Even with an incomplete Raider set, you are unbeatable in melee combat.\n\nMelee damage increased by {cvar(.armorSemiRaiderFSBDisplay:0)}%
Tchinese: 即使沒有完整的掠奪者套裝，您在近戰中也是無與倫比的。 \n\n近戰傷害增加 {cvar(.armorSemiRaiderFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: You are moving through dangerous terrain
Tchinese: 您正在穿越危險的地形

English:
With so much trash underfoot, you'd better watch where you step.

Your movement speed is reduced by [DECEA3]25%[-], your jump height is reduced by [DECEA3]25%[-], and your stamina consumption while running is increased by [DECEA3]50%[-]

Warning: When running on dangerous surfaces, you have a [DECEA3]25%[-] chance to puncture your foot

[DECEA3]You need to equip the «Sole Guard»[-] modification to improve your mobility[-]
Tchinese:
腳下有這麼多垃圾，你最好注意你的腳步。 

你的移動速度降低[DECEA3]25%[-]，你的跳躍高度降低[DECEA3]25%[-]，跑步時的體力消耗增加[DECEA3]50%[-]

警告：在危險路面上跑步時，你有[DECEA3]25%[-]的幾率刺穿你的身體腳

[DECEA3]你需要裝備《鞋底防護》[-]改裝來提高你的機動性[-]

English: You are moving through dangerous terrain (PROTECTION)
Tchinese: 您正在穿越危險地形（保護）

English: With so much trash underfoot, it's best to keep your eyes peeled.\n\nEven with protection, your movement speed is reduced by [DECEA3]15%[-]
Tchinese: 腳下垃圾太多，最好擦亮眼睛。 \n\n即使有防護，你的移動速度也會降低[DECEA3]15%[-]

English: You stepped on something sharp and punctured your foot. The wound is not fatal, but it is extremely unpleasant.\n\nYour movement speed is reduced by [DECEA3]25%[-]
Tchinese: 你踩到了尖銳的東西，刺傷了你的腳。傷口並不致命，但極難受。 \n\n你的移動速度降低[DECEA3]25%[-]

English: You are moving through deep snow

Moving through deep snow is not easy, and running is even more so. 

Your walking speed is reduced by [DECEA3]25%[-], running speed by [DECEA3]50%[-], jump height by [DECEA3]25%[-], and stamina consumption when jumping is increased by [DECEA3]25%[-]

[DECEA3]You need to equip the «Snowshoes»[-] modification to increase your mobility[-]
Tchinese:
在厚厚的積雪中行走並不容易，跑步更是如此。 

你的行走速度降低[DECEA3]25%[-]，奔跑速度降低[DECEA3]50%[-]，跳躍高度降低[DECEA3]25%[-]，跳躍時的體力消耗增加[DECEA3]25%[-]

[DECEA3]你需要裝備《雪鞋》[你需要裝備性的改裝]

English: You are moving through deep snow (SNOWSHOES)
Tchinese: 您正在厚厚的積雪中移動（雪鞋）

English: You are moving through deep snow. You have snowshoes, but you still cannot move at full speed.\n\nYour walking speed is reduced by [DECEA3]10%[-], your running speed is reduced by [DECEA3]20%[-], and your jump height is reduced by [DECEA3]10%[-]
Tchinese: 你正穿過厚厚的積雪。你有雪鞋，但你仍然無法全速移動。 \n\n你的行走速度降低[DECEA3]10%[-]，你的跑步速度降低[DECEA3]20%[-]，你的跳躍高度降低[DECEA3]10%[-]

English: You are moving on the sand

Moving on shifting sand is not so easy, and running is even more so. 

Your walking speed is reduced by [DECEA3]15%[-], running speed by [DECEA3]15%[-], jump height by [DECEA3]20%[-], and stamina consumption when jumping is increased by [DECEA3]10%[-]

[DECEA3]You need to equip the «Wide Sole»[-] modification to increase your mobility[-]
Tchinese:
在流沙上行走並不那麼容易，跑步更是如此。 

你的行走速度降低[DECEA3]15%[-]，奔跑速度降低[DECEA3]15%[-]，跳躍高度降低[DECEA3]20%[-]，跳躍時體力消耗增加[DECEA3]10%[-]

[DECEA3]你需要裝備性改裝[你]

English: You are moving on sand (WIDE SOLE)
You are moving across the sand. You have wide soles, but you still cannot move at full speed. \n\nYour walking speed, running speed, and jump height are reduced by [DECEA3]5%[-]
Tchinese: 你正在穿過沙子。你的鞋底很寬，但你仍然無法全速移動。 \n\n你的行走速度、跑步速度和跳躍高度降低[DECEA3]5%[-]

English: You are moving on the uneven ground
Tchinese: 你在不平坦的地面上移動

English:
It's not easy to move around on uneven ground, let alone run. 

Your movement speed is reduced by [DECEA3]15%[-]

[DECEA3]You need to equip any footwear to increase your mobility[-]
Tchinese:
在不平坦的地面上移動都不容易，更不用說跑步了。 

你的移動速度降低[DECEA3]15%[-]

[DECEA3]你需要裝備任何鞋子來增加你的移動能力[-]

English: You are moving on the desert ground

Moving around on desert ground isn't easy, let alone running. 

Your movement speed is reduced by [DECEA3]10%[-] and your jump height is reduced by [DECEA3]15%[-]

[DECEA3]You need to equip the «Wide Sole»[-] modification to increase your mobility[-]
Tchinese:
在沙漠地面上移動並不容易，更不用說跑步了。 

你的移動速度降低[DECEA3]10%[-]，你的跳躍高度降低[DECEA3]15%[-]

[DECEA3]你需要裝備《寬底》[-]改裝來增加你的機動性[-]

English: Gravel makes walking easier and safer.\n\nYour mobility is increased by [DECEA3]5%[-]
Tchinese: 礫石讓行走變得更輕鬆、更安全。 \n\n您的活動能力提升 [DECEA3]5%[-]

English: Walking on smooth concrete is a pleasure.\n\nYour mobility is increased by [DECEA3]10%[-]
Tchinese: 在光滑的混凝土上行走是一種享受。 \n\n你的活動能力提高了 [DECEA3]10%[-]

English: A great asphalt road is important not only when you are using a vehicle.\n\nYour mobility is increased by [DECEA3]25%[-]
Tchinese: 良好的柏油路不僅在您使用車輛時很重要。 \n\n您的機動性提高了 [DECEA3]25%[-]

English: Moving through deep snow is no longer a problem. It significantly increases your mobility in snowy terrain.
Tchinese: 穿過厚厚的積雪不再是問題。它顯著提高了您在雪地中的機動性。

English: Moving across shifting sand is no longer a problem. It significantly increases your mobility on sand and desert ground.
Tchinese: 穿越流沙不再是問題。它顯著提高了您在沙地和沙漠地面上的機動性。

English: Moving across dangerous surfaces is no longer a problem. It significantly increases your mobility on dangerous terrain and fully protects you from punctures.
Tchinese: 穿越危險表面不再是問題。它顯著提高您在危險地形上的機動性，並充分保護您免受刺穿。

English: You have got rid of allergies
You have developed your hand motor skills
Tchinese: 您已經發展了手部運動技能

English: You are less afraid of the dark
You are less afraid of animals
You are less afraid of zombies
You are less afraid of fire
You are less afraid of pain
You are less prone to stress
You survive better in the wasteland
Tchinese: 你在荒地裡生存得更好

English: You are better at handling transport
You work better in a team
Tchinese: 你在團隊中工作得更好
使用輕型近戰武器殺人

English: Spend more time in the forest
Tchinese: 花更多的時間在森林裡

English: Spend more time in dangerous biomes
Tchinese: 在危險的生物群系中花費更多時間
殺死更具攻擊性的動物

English: Spend more time by the fire
Spend more time as a team
Tchinese: 花更多時間作為一個團隊

English: Get behind the wheel more often

Contains items used to start and cancel the [E092FF]Yautja[-] Challenge. This challenge significantly increases gameplay difficulty, so think twice before activating it. All character progression will be reset when it starts. BE CAREFUL! READ THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS BEFORE ACTIVATION!
Tchinese: 包含用於開始和取消 [E092FF]Yautja[-] 挑戰的物品。此挑戰顯著增加了遊戲難度，因此在激活它之前請三思。開始時所有角色進度都會重置。當心！激活前請閱讀條款和條件！

English:
«You have a chance to prove that even the weakest can survive, but it will require far more effort.
Think twice before starting: once the challenge is activated, there is no turning back. All positive personal traits will be reset, and all negative ones will be raised to level 3.
Your task is to survive and reach the maximum level. Your experience and perseverance are your only allies. Good luck in your suffering!»
[DECEA3]- Black Rabbit[-]
Tchinese:
«你有機會證明，即使是最弱的人也能生存，但這需要付出更多的努力。 
開始前三思而後行：挑戰一旦啟動，就沒有回頭路。所有正面的個人特質將被重置，所有負面的個人特質將提升至 3 級。 
你的任務是生存並達到最高等級。你的經驗和毅力是你唯一的盟友。祝你在苦難中好運！ »
[DECEA3]- 黑兔[-]

English: Cancels the seasonal challenge and allows you to redistribute your personal traits. However, canceling the challenge does not restore the progression that was reset when it was activated.
Tchinese: 取消季節性挑戰，讓你重新分配你的個人特質。然而，取消挑戰並不會恢復啟動時重置的進度。
您取消了 Yautja 挑戰

English: You have activated the Yautja challenge
Tchinese: 您已啟動 Yautja 挑戰

English: You've activated the [E092FF]Yautja[-] challenge, and now a brutal journey of survival in extreme conditions awaits you. Complete it and prove that you are the strongest in the wasteland.
Tchinese: 你已經啟動了 [E092FF]Yautja[-] 挑戰，現在在極端條件下的殘酷生存之旅正在等待著你。完成它並證明你是廢土最強的。

English: «You have a chance to prove that even the weakest can survive, but it will require significantly more effort. Think twice before you begin: once the challenge is activated, there is no turning back. All positive personal traits will be reset, and all negative ones will be raised to level 3. Your goal is to survive and reach the maximum level. Your experience and perseverance are your only allies. Good luck in your suffering!» [DECEA3]- Black Rabbit[-]\n\n[FF0000]WARNING! Activating the challenge resets all current character progression. While the challenge is active, personal trait reset items do not work.[-]
Tchinese: 「你有機會證明即使是最弱的人也能生存，但這需要更多的努力。開始之前請三思：挑戰一旦啟動，就沒有回頭路。所有積極的個人特質將被重置，所有消極的個人特質將提升至 3 級。你的目標是生存並達到最高等級。你的經驗和毅力是你唯一的盟友。祝你在苦難中警告你在苦難中！啟動挑戰會重置所有目前角色進度。當挑戰正在進行時，個人特質重置專案不起作用。 [-]

English: [FF0000]WARNING! Activating the challenge resets all current character progression and sets all negative traits to level 3.\nCanceling the challenge does not restore progression. While the challenge is active, personal trait reset items do not work.[-]
Tchinese: [FF0000]警告！啟動挑戰會重置所有目前角色進度，並將所有負面特徵設為 3 級。 \n取消挑戰不會恢復進度。當挑戰正在進行時，個人特質重置專案不起作用。 [-]

English: Activating this item resets the character's personal traits and generates them again.\n\nCharacter generation automatically assigns [DECEA3]4-8[-] positive trait points and [DECEA3]6-14[-] negative trait points. Be careful when resetting. There is no guarantee that each new result will be better than the previous one.
Tchinese: 啟動此項目會重置角色的個人特質並再次生成它們。 \n\n角色生成會自動分配 [DECEA3]4-8[-] 積極特質點和 [DECEA3]6-14[-] 消極特質點。重置時要小心。無法保證每個新結果都會比前一個更好。

English: Activating this item resets all negative character traits to 0.\n\n[DECEA3]Does not work while the Yautja Seasonal Challenge is active.[-]
Tchinese: 啟動此項目會將所有負面角色特徵重設為 0。 \n\n[DECEA3]在 Yautja 季節性挑戰活動期間不起作用。 [-]

English: Activating the item increases the personal quality Genius to level 3.\n\n[DECEA3]Does not work if the Yautja Seasonal Challenge is running.[-]

English: Activating the item increases the personal quality Athletic Build to level 3.\n\n[DECEA3]Does not work if the Yautja Seasonal Challenge is running.[-]

English: Activating the item increases the personal quality Courage to level 3.\n\n[DECEA3]Does not work if the Yautja Seasonal Challenge is running.[-]
Tchinese: 啟動該物品會將個人品質勇氣提升至 3 級。 \n\n[DECEA3]如果 Yautja 季節性挑戰正在運行，則不起作用。 [-]

English: Activating the item increases the personal quality Bodybuilder to level 3.\n\n[DECEA3]Does not work if the Yautja Seasonal Challenge is running.[-]
Tchinese: 啟動該物品可將健美運動員的個人素質提高到 3 級。 \n\n[DECEA3]如果 Yautja 季節性挑戰賽正在運行，則不起作用。 [-]

English: Activating the item increases the personal quality Experienced Hunter to level 3.\n\n[DECEA3]Does not work if the Yautja Seasonal Challenge is running.[-]

English: No skill points are required here. The character's personal traits are generated after using the «Reset Self Traits book». During the game, you can improve positive traits or get rid of negative ones.
Tchinese: 這裡不需要技能點數。角色的個人特質是使用《重置自我特質書》後產生的。在遊戲過程中，你可以改善正面的特質或消除負面的特質。

English: Your character's personal traits have been formed.\n\nYou have gained [5AFF75]{cvar(.PosTraitsCount:0)} positive[-] and [FF2B2B]{cvar(.NegTraitsCount:0)} negative[-] traits points.
Tchinese: 你的角色的個人特質已經形成。 \n\n你已經獲得了 [5AFF75]{cvar(.PosTraitsCount:0)} 正 [-] 和 [FF2B2B]{cvar(.NegTraitsCount:0)} 負 [-] 特質點。

English: [FFB800]Reading[-] books, magazines, or recipes reduces the counter by [DECEA3]1[-].
Tchinese: [FFB800]閱讀[-]書籍、雜誌或食譜會使計數器減少[DECEA3]1[-]。

English: You have mild dementia. All experience you gain is reduced by [DECEA3]10%.[-]\n\n[FFB800]Remaining: {cvar(.BooksReadWorse1:0)}[-]
Tchinese: 您患有輕度癡呆症。你獲得的所有經驗都會減少[DECEA3]10%。 [-]\n\n[FFB800]剩餘：{cvar(.BooksReadWorse1:0)}[-]

English: You are demented. All experience you gain is reduced by [DECEA3]20%.[-]\n\n[FFB800]Remaining: {cvar(.BooksReadWorse2:0)}[-]
Tchinese: 你瘋了。你獲得的所有經驗都會減少[DECEA3]20%。 [-]\n\n[FFB800]剩餘：{cvar(.BooksReadWorse2:0)}[-]

English: You're as dumb as a brick. All experience you gain is reduced by [DECEA3]30%.[-]\n\n[FFB800]Remaining: {cvar(.BooksReadWorse3:0)}[-]
Tchinese: 你真是蠢得像塊磚頭。你獲得的所有經驗都會減少[DECEA3]30%。 [-]\n\n[FFB800]剩餘：{cvar(.BooksReadWorse3:0)}[-]

English: Fullness should be in moderation. It is extremely difficult to survive if excess weight interferes with movement.
Tchinese: 飽足應適度。如果體重過重妨礙了活動，生存就極為困難。

English: You are moderately overweight. While digesting food, your mobility is reduced by [DECEA3]7.5%[-] and stamina consumption is increased by [DECEA3]15%[-]. Also, your jump height is reduced by [DECEA3]10%[-] and the rate at which your food supply is consumed during physical activity is increased.\n\n[FFB800]Remaining: {cvar(.TimerObesity1:0)}[-]
Tchinese: 您中度超重。消化食物時，你的活動能力降低[DECEA3]7.5%[-]，體力消耗增加[DECEA3]15%[-]。此外，你的跳躍高度會降低 [DECEA3]10%[-]，並且身體活動期間食物消耗的速度會增加。 \n\n[FFB800]剩餘：{cvar(.TimerObesity1:0)}[-]

English: You are fat. While digesting food, your mobility is reduced by [DECEA3]15%[-] and stamina consumption is increased by [DECEA3]30%[-]. Also, your jump height is reduced by [DECEA3]20%[-] and the rate at which your food supply is consumed during physical activity is increased.\n\n[FFB800]Remaining: {cvar(.TimerObesity2:0)}[-]
Tchinese: 你很胖。消化食物時，你的活動能力降低[DECEA3]15%[-]，體力消耗增加[DECEA3]30%[-]。此外，你的跳躍高度會降低 [DECEA3]20%[-]，體力活動期間食物消耗的速度會增加。 \n\n[FFB800]剩餘：{cvar(.TimerObesity2:0)}[-]

English: You are a real fatso. While digesting food, your mobility is reduced by [DECEA3]25%[-] and stamina consumption is increased by [DECEA3]50%[-]. Also, your jump height is reduced by [DECEA3]30%[-] and the rate at which your food supply is consumed during physical activity is increased.\n\n[FFB800]Remaining: {cvar(.TimerObesity3:0)}[-]
Tchinese: 你真是個胖子。消化食物時，你的活動能力降低[DECEA3]25%[-]，體力消耗增加[DECEA3]50%[-]。此外，你的跳躍高度會降低 [DECEA3]30%[-]，並且身體活動期間食物消耗的速度會增加。 \n\n[FFB800]剩餘：{cvar(.TimerObesity3:0)}[-]

English: [FFB800]Every second[-] while the food consumption effect is active, the counter decreases by [DECEA3]1[-] It decreases by [DECEA3]2[-] if the character is resting on a comfortable bed at that moment, and by [DECEA3]4[-] during strength training.
Tchinese: [FFB800]每秒[-]，當食物消耗效果啟動時，計數器會減少[DECEA3]1[-]，如果角色當時躺在舒適的床上，則減少[DECEA3]2[-]，在力量訓練期間減少[DECEA3]4[-]。

English: You are underweight. Your total stamina is reduced by [DECEA3]10[-], your water consumption rate is increased by [DECEA3]10%[-], and your mobility while overloaded is reduced by [DECEA3]7.5%[-].\n\n[FFB800]Remaining: {cvar(.TimerDistrophia1:0)}[-]
Tchinese: 你體重不足。你的總耐力減少 [DECEA3]10[-]，你的水消耗率增加 [DECEA3]10%[-]，超載時的移動能力減少 [DECEA3]7.5%[-]。 \n\n[FFB800]剩餘：{cvar(.TimerDistropicia1:0)}[-]

English: You are severely underweight. Your total stamina is reduced by [DECEA3]25[-], your water consumption rate is increased by [DECEA3]20%[-], and your mobility while overloaded is reduced by [DECEA3]15%[-].\n\n[FFB800]Remaining: {cvar(.TimerDistrophia2:0)}[-]
Tchinese: 你的體重嚴重不足。你的總耐力減少 [DECEA3]25[-]，你的水消耗率增加 [DECEA3]20%[-]，超載時的移動能力減少 [DECEA3]15%[-]。 \n\n[FFB800]剩餘：{cvar(.TimerDistropicia2:0)}[-]

English: You look like a skeleton covered in skin. Your total stamina is reduced by [DECEA3]50[-], your water consumption rate is increased by [DECEA3]30%[-], and your mobility while overloaded is reduced by [DECEA3]25%[-].\n\n[FFB800]Remaining: {cvar(.TimerDistrophia3:0)}[-]
Tchinese: 你看起來就像一具被皮膚覆蓋的骷髏。你的總耐力減少 [DECEA3]50[-]，你的水消耗率增加 [DECEA3]30%[-]，超載時的移動能力減少 [DECEA3]25%[-]。 \n\n[FFB800]剩餘：{cvar(.TimerDistropicia3:0)}[-]

English: [FFB800]Every second[-] you decrease the counter by [DECEA3]1[-] if there are more than 7 zombies around you. The counter decreases [DECEA3]4 times[-] faster if you haven't taken damage for [DECEA3]15[-] seconds.
Tchinese: [FFB800]如果你周圍有超過 7 隻殭屍，每秒[-]你就會減少計數器 [DECEA3]1[-]。如果您在 [DECEA3]15[-] 秒內沒有受到傷害，計數器會以 [DECEA3]4 倍 [-] 的速度減少。

English: You can hold back panic when zombies are around you. But fear still overcomes you. Stress resistance consumption when zombies are around is increased by [DECEA3]25%[-]. Depending on the number of zombies around you, damage to them is reduced. If there are less than 4 around you, damage is reduced by [DECEA3]5%[-], if from 4 to 10 - [DECEA3]7.5%[-], if more than 10 - [DECEA3]10%[-].\n\n[FFB800]Remaining: {cvar(.TimerAlarmism1:0)}[-]
Tchinese: 當殭屍在你周圍時，你可以抑制恐慌。但恐懼仍然戰勝了你。殭屍在場時的抗壓消耗增加[DECEA3]25%[-]。根據你周圍殭屍的數量，對它們的傷害會減少。如果你周圍的人數少於 4 個，則傷害減少 [DECEA3]5%[-]，如果從 4 到 10 - [DECEA3]7.5%[-]，如果超過 10 - [DECEA3]10%[-]。 \n\n[FFB800]剩餘：{cvar(.TimerAlarmism1:0)}[-]

English: You try not to panic when there are zombies around you, but it's beyond you. Stress resistance consumption when zombies are around is increased by [DECEA3]50%[-]. Depending on the number of zombies around you, damage to them is reduced. If there are less than 4 around you, damage is reduced by [DECEA3]8%[-], if from 4 to 10 - [DECEA3]12%[-], if more than 10 - [DECEA3]16%[-].\n\n[FFB800]Remaining: {cvar(.TimerAlarmism2:0)}[-]
Tchinese: 當你周圍有殭屍時，你盡量不要驚慌，但這超出了你的能力範圍。殭屍在場時的抗壓消耗增加[DECEA3]50%[-]。根據你周圍殭屍的數量，對它們的傷害會減少。如果你周圍的人數少於 4 個，則傷害減少 [DECEA3]8%[-]，如果從 4 到 10 - [DECEA3]12%[-]，如果超過 10 - [DECEA3]16%[-]。 \n\n[FFB800]剩餘：{cvar(.TimerAlarmism2:0)}[-]

English: You try not to panic when there are zombies around you, but it's beyond you. Stress resistance consumption when zombies are around is increased by [DECEA3]50%[-]. Depending on the number of zombies around you, damage to them is reduced. If there are less than 4 around you, damage is reduced by [DECEA3]10%[-], if from 4 to 10 - [DECEA3]15%[-], if more than 10 - [DECEA3]25%[-].\n\n[FFB800]Remaining: {cvar(.TimerAlarmism3:0)}[-]
Tchinese: 當你周圍有殭屍時，你盡量不要驚慌，但這超出了你的能力範圍。殭屍在場時的抗壓消耗增加[DECEA3]50%[-]。根據你周圍殭屍的數量，對它們的傷害會減少。如果你周圍的人數少於 4 個，則傷害減少 [DECEA3]10%[-]，如果從 4 到 10 - [DECEA3]15%[-]，如果超過 10 - [DECEA3]25%[-]。 \n\n[FFB800]剩餘：{cvar(.TimerAlarmism3:0)}[-]

English: [FFB800]Every second[-] while you're under the effect of vitamins, the counter decreases by [DECEA3]1[-]. Each egg eaten decreases by [DECEA3]50[-]. English:

[FF6666]The Last Hunt, Completion[-]

[DECEA3]Warning! Canceling this quest will break the entire quest chain. Restarting is only possible with the help of an administrator.[-]
Tchinese:
[FF6666]最後的狩獵，完成[-]

[DECEA3]警告！取消這個任務將會破壞整個任務鏈。只有在管理員的幫助下才能重新啟動。 [-]

English: Damn it! You managed to kill all these creatures. The Wild One said that you would come for the reward, but I never believed that you would succeed. In general, choose what you like from this... And get lost quickly.
Tchinese: 該死的！你成功殺死了所有這些生物。野人說你會來領取獎勵，但我從來不相信你會成功。一般來說，從中選擇你喜歡的......然後很快就迷路。

English: It's hard for me to imagine how you managed to survive all of this. In any case, people like you leave hope that we will all survive. The Wild One said that you would come for the reward, but I never believed that you would succeed. In general, I hope you will not let anyone hurt us.
Tchinese: 我很難想像你是如何撐過這一切的。無論如何，像你這樣的人離開時希望我們都能活下來。野人說你會來領取獎勵，但我從來不相信你會成功。總的來說，我希望你不要讓任何人傷害我們。

English: [DECEA3]Better than Just Pipes, Melee[-]\n\n«A good stick can sometimes scare off intruders, especially if it's made of iron. Kill [FF6666]75 zombies[-], and I'll tell you how to get a starting melee weapon.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: [DECEA3]比管道好，近戰[-]\n\n«一根好的棍子有時可以嚇跑入侵者，特別是如果它是鐵製的。殺死[FF6666]75個殭屍[-]，我會告訴你如何獲得起始近戰武器。 » [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: «Light melee weapons may not be the easiest way to stop hordes of crazed zombies, but for single-target combat, they're the best option without the significant stamina drain. A good choice, but certainly not for everyone. Kill [FF6666]50 zombies using any light weapon (knuckles, knives, or batons)[-], and you'll be able to pick up the light [DECEA3]iron[-] melee weapon.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: «輕型近戰武器可能不是阻止成群的瘋狂殭屍的最簡單方法，但對於單目標戰鬥，它們是最好的選擇，而且不會顯著消耗體力。一個不錯的選擇，但肯定不適合所有人。使用任何輕型武器（指節、刀或警棍）殺死[FF6666]50個殭屍[-]，然後你將能夠拿起輕型[DECEA3]鐵[-]近戰武器。 » [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: «Any heavy melee weapon looks menacing, and not just for humans. It can easily stop hordes of bloodthirsty ghouls, but it also requires a fair amount of stamina. A good choice, but certainly an acquired taste. Kill [FF6666]50 zombies using any heavy weapon (spears, clubs, or sledgehammers)[-], and you can pick up a heavy [DECEA3]iron[-] melee weapon.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: 「任何重型近戰武器看起來都很有威脅，而且不僅僅是對人類而言。它可以輕鬆阻止成群的嗜血食屍鬼，但也需要相當的耐力。一個不錯的選擇，而且不僅僅是對人類而言。它可以輕鬆阻止成群的嗜血食屍鬼，但也需要相當的耐力。一個不錯的選擇，但肯定是後天的品味。使用任何重型武器（矛、棍棒或大錘）殺死 [FF6666]50 只殭屍[-]，然後你就可以拿起重型武器[D-3] 狂野武器 [DECEA] 近鐵“

English: [DECEA3]Better than Just Pipes, Ranged[-]\n\n«Before the infection, many kept long-range weapons, but as you can see, it did not help everyone. I hope it will help you more. Kill [FF6666]100 zombies[-], and you can take a long-range weapon for self-defense.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: [DECEA3]比僅僅管道更好，遠程[-]\n\n«在感染之前，許多人保留了遠程武器，但正如你所看到的，它並沒有幫助每個人。我希望它能幫助你更多。殺死[FF6666]100隻殭屍[-]，你可以攜帶遠程武器進行自衛。 » [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: [DECEA3]Almost like in a store, Melee[-]\n\n«You can still find quality steel weapons in collectors' houses. They don't need them anymore, but you might find them useful. Kill [FF6666]150 zombies[-] with any melee weapon, and I'll tell you how to get a steel melee weapon.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: [DECEA3]幾乎就像在商店裡一樣，近戰[-]\n\n«你仍然可以在收藏家中找到優質的鋼製武器。他們不再需要它們，但您可能會發現它們很有用。用任意近戰武器殺死 [FF6666]150 隻殭屍[-]，我會告訴你如何取得鋼製近戰武器。 » [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: «Light melee weapons may not be the easiest way to stop hordes of crazed zombies, but for single-target combat, they're the best option without the significant stamina drain. A good choice, but certainly not for everyone. Kill [FF6666]100 zombies using any light weapon (knuckles, knives, or batons)[-], and you'll be able to pick up the light [DECEA3]steel[-] melee weapon.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: «輕型近戰武器可能不是阻止成群的瘋狂殭屍的最簡單方法，但對於單目標戰鬥，它們是最好的選擇，而且不會顯著消耗體力。一個不錯的選擇，但肯定不適合所有人。使用任何輕型武器（指節、刀或警棍）殺死[FF6666]100個殭屍[-]，然後你將能夠拿起輕型[DECEA3]鋼[-]近戰武器。 » [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: «Any heavy melee weapon looks menacing, and not just for humans. It can easily stop hordes of bloodthirsty ghouls, but it also requires a fair amount of stamina. A good choice, but certainly an acquired taste. Kill [FF6666]100 zombies using any heavy weapon (spears, clubs, or sledgehammers)[-], and you can pick up a heavy [DECEA3]steel[-] melee weapon.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: 「任何重型近戰武器看起來都很有威脅，而且不僅僅是對人類而言。它可以輕鬆阻止成群的嗜血食屍鬼，但也需要相當的耐力。一個不錯的選擇，但肯定是後天的品味。使用任何重型武器（矛、棍棒或大錘）殺死 [FF6666]100 只殭屍[-]，然後你就可以拿起重型 [D-3] 狂野武器[D-3]。

English: [DECEA3]Almost like in the store, Ranged[-]\n\n«You can still find quality weapons in gun shops. Kill [FF6666]250 zombies[-], and I'll tell you how to get quality ranged weapons.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: [DECEA3]幾乎就像在商店裡一樣，遠程[-]\n\n«你仍然可以在槍店找到優質武器。殺死[FF6666]250隻殭屍[-]，我會告訴你如何獲得高品質的遠程武器。 » [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: «So, a Rifle. A reasonable choice, although of course an acquired taste. Kill [FF6666]150 zombies using any rifles except assault rifles[-], and you'll get a Lever Action rifle and a nice bonus from me.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: «那麼，一把步槍。一個合理的選擇，儘管當然是後天的品味。使用突擊步槍之外的任何步槍[-]殺死[FF6666]150個殭屍，你將獲得一把槓桿式步槍和我的一份不錯的獎勵。 » [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: «So, a Shotgun. A reasonable choice, although of course an acquired taste. Kill [FF6666]150 zombies using any shotguns[-], and you'll get a Pump Shotgun and a nice bonus from me.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: «所以，一把霰彈槍。一個合理的選擇，儘管當然是後天的品味。使用任何霰彈槍殺死[FF6666]150個殭屍[-]，你會得到一把泵動霰彈槍和我的一份不錯的獎勵。 » [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: «So, Automatic weapons. A reasonable choice, although of course an acquired taste. Kill [FF6666]150 zombies using any automatic weapons[-], and you'll get a Tactical Assault Rifle and a nice bonus from me.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: «所以，自動武器。一個合理的選擇，儘管當然是後天的品味。使用任何自動武器殺死[FF6666]150個殭屍[-]，你會得到一支戰術突擊步槍和我的一份不錯的獎勵。 » [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: «So, a Crossbow. A reasonable choice, although of course an acquired taste. Kill [FF6666]75 zombies using any bows or crossbows[-], and you'll get an Iron Crossbow and a nice bonus from me.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: «那麼，一張十字弓。一個合理的選擇，儘管當然是後天的品味。使用任何弓或十字弓殺死 [FF6666]75 個殭屍[-]，你會得到一把鐵十字弓和我的一份不錯的獎勵。 » [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: «So, a Magnum. A reasonable choice, although of course an acquired taste. Kill [FF6666]150 zombies using any pistols[-], and you'll get a Magnum and a nice bonus from me.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: «所以，馬格南。一個合理的選擇，儘管當然是後天的品味。使用任何手槍殺死[FF6666]150個殭屍[-]，你會從我這裡得到一個萬能瓶和一個不錯的獎金。 » [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: [DECEA3]Military Might, Ranged[-]\n\n«Yes, warriors don't always help with the horde, but it's stupid not to admit that their guns are powerful. Kill [FF6666]450 zombies[-], and I'll tell you how to get military weapons.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: [DECEA3]軍事力量，遠程[-]\n\n«是的，戰士並不總是幫助部落，但不承認他們的槍很強大是愚蠢的。殺死[FF6666]450個殭屍[-]，我會告訴你如何獲得軍事武器。 » [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: «So, a Rifle. A reasonable choice, although of course an acquired taste. Kill [FF6666]250 zombies using any rifles except assault rifles[-], and you'll get a Sniper Rifle and a nice bonus from me.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: «那麼，一把步槍。一個合理的選擇，儘管當然是後天的品味。使用突擊步槍以外的任何步槍[-]殺死[FF6666]250個殭屍，你將獲得一把狙擊步槍和我的一份不錯的獎勵。 » [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: «So, a Shotgun. A reasonable choice, although of course an acquired taste. Kill [FF6666]250 zombies using any shotguns[-], and you'll get an Auto Shotgun and a nice bonus from me.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: «所以，一把霰彈槍。一個合理的選擇，儘管當然是後天的品味。使用任意霰彈槍殺死 [FF6666]250 隻殭屍[-]，你將獲得一把自動霰彈槍和我的一份不錯的獎勵。 » [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: «So, Pistols. A reasonable choice, although of course an acquired taste. Kill [FF6666]250 zombies using any pistols[-], and you'll get an SMG-5 or Desert Vulture, your choice.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]

English: [DECEA3]Reliable Modifications[-]\n\n«Any weapon can always be enhanced with good modifications, and when they are still reliable in use, the weapon feels completely different. Kill [FF6666]750 zombies[-], and I will tell you how to get improved modification for melee or ranged weapons, your choice.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: [DECEA3]可靠的改裝[-]\n\n«任何武器總是可以透過良好的改裝來增強，當它們仍然可靠使用時，武器的感覺完全不同。殺死[FF6666]750個殭屍[-]，我會告訴你如何獲得近戰或遠程武器的改進改裝，你的選擇。 [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: «So, a modification for a melee weapon. A reasonable choice, although certainly an acquired taste. Kill [FF6666]500 zombies using any melee weapon[-], and you'll receive a [DECEA3]Improved[-] modification for that weapon.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: «所以，近戰武器的修改。一個合理的選擇，儘管肯定是後天的品味。使用任何近戰武器殺死 [FF6666]500 隻殭屍[-]，你將獲得該武器的 [DECEA3]改進[-] 修改。 » [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

Tchinese: «所以，遠程武器的修改。一個合理的選擇，儘管肯定是後天的品味。使用任何遠程武器殺死[FF6666]500個殭屍[-]，你將獲得該武器的[DECEA3]改進[-]修改。 » [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: [DECEA3]Unique Modifications[-]\n\n«Any weapon can always be enhanced with good modifications, and with unique modifications, any weapon is much more powerful. Tchinese: [DECEA3]獨特的修改[-]\n\n«任何武器都可以透過良好的修改來增強，並且透過獨特的修改，任何武器都會變得更加強大。殺死[FF6666]1500個殭屍[-]，我會告訴你如何獲得近戰或遠程武器的獨特修改，你的選擇。 » [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: «So, melee weapon mods. A reasonable choice, though certainly an acquired taste. Kill [FF6666]1000 zombis using any melee weapon[-], and you'll receive [DECEA3]Unique[-] mod for that weapon.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: «所以，近戰武器模組。一個合理的選擇，儘管肯定是後天的品味。使用任何近戰武器[-]殺死[FF6666]1000個殭屍，你將獲得該武器的[DECEA3]獨特[-]模組。 » [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: «So, ranged weapon mods. A reasonable choice, though certainly an acquired taste. Kill [FF6666]1000 zombis using any ranged weapon[-], and you'll receive [FFB800]Unique[-] mod for that weapon.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: «所以，遠程武器模組。一個合理的選擇，儘管肯定是後天的品味。使用任何遠程武器[-]殺死[FF6666]1000個殭屍，你將獲得該武器的[FFB800]獨特[-]模組。 » [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: [DECEA3]The Last Hunt, The Beginning[-]\n\n«To dominate the wasteland, you need more than just guns; you need to develop skills to kill bigger creatures. Kill [FF6666]50 minibosses[-] and you'll get several legendary parts.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: [DECEA3]最後的狩獵，開始[-]\n\n«要統治荒地，你需要的不僅僅是槍；你需要培養殺死更大生物的技能。殺死 [FF6666]50 個小頭目 [-]，你將獲得幾個傳奇零件。 » [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: [DECEA3]The Last Hunt, Completion[-]\n\n«Sometimes it's better not to know what creatures may be lurking in the wasteland at night. But if you learn how to kill them, I'll be truly delighted. Kill [FF6666]25 bosses[-], and you'll get some legendary parts, and I'll also upgrade some of your skills.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese: [DECEA3]最後的狩獵，完成[-]\n\n«有時最好不要知道夜間荒地裡潛伏著哪些生物。但如果你學會如何殺死它們，我會非常高興。殺死[FF6666]25個boss[-]，你會得到一些傳奇零件，我也會升級你的一些技能。 » [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: Inspect the wound and remove the bone
Inspect the wound and remove the bone

[FF6666]Chapter 1. Self-healing[-]
You woke up and found a piece of paper with a message next to you. You don't remember who left it or when. Here's the first part of the message:

«If you woke up and are reading this, then you're not that easy to kill. I found you yesterday before sunset, but there was no way to help. Judging by the external object sticking out of your leg, I wasn't sure you'd survive until morning. But if you were able to, I left a couple of bandages next to you if you try to get that thing out...» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese:
[FF6666]第一章.自我修復[-]
你醒來，發現旁邊有一張紙，上面寫著一則訊息。您不記得是誰或何時留下的。這是消息的第一部分：

«如果你醒來並正在閱讀本文，那麼你就沒有那麼容易被殺死。我昨天日落前找到了你，但沒有辦法幫助你。從你腿上伸出的外部物體來看，我不確定你能活到早上。但如果你能的話，我在你旁邊留了幾條繃帶，如果你想把那東西拿出來的話…》 [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: Look around and kill the offender
Look around and kill the offender

[FF6666]Chapter 2. The Offender[-]
Here's the second part of the message:

«When I was examining you, I heard some movement nearby, I'm not sure that this creature will abandon its prey. However, it apparently doesn't have the strength to attack. In any case, you have some time to recover. Try to patch yourself up before looking for her...» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Tchinese:
[FF6666]第二章罪犯[-]
這是消息的第二部分：

«當我檢查你時，我聽到附近有動靜，我不確定這個生物會放棄它的獵物。不過，它顯然沒有攻擊的力量。無論如何，你都有一些時間來恢復。在尋找她之前嘗試先修補一下自己...» [DECEA3]- 狂野[-]

English: [FF6666]Chapter 12. The Last Hunt (Start)[-]\n\n«I admit, you managed to surprise even me with your pressure. Keep up the good work and this hole will become at least a little calmer. Finally, I suggest we arrange a real hunt for everything that moves... or doesn't move but wants to move. Kill 2000 zombies and I'll give you a truly unique reward. Good luck in your hunt!» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]

English:
[FF7E2F]Chapter 1. Hut[-]

«If you want to survive here, you'll need a roof over your head. I'm not sure you have any experience in construction, but right now we need everyone who doesn't bite. I think I can help you.
Build yourself a new wooden home and come to me. I'll return some of the resources and pick up a new tool for construction.» [DECEA3]- da Vinci[-]
Tchinese:
[FF7E2F]第一章. 小屋[-]

«如果你想在這裡生存，你需要一個屋頂。我不確定你有沒有建築的經驗，但現在我們需要每個不咬人的人。我想我可以幫助你。 
給你自己建造一個新的木屋然後來找我。我會歸還一些資源並挑選一個新的建造工具。 」 [DECEA3]-達文西[-]

English:
[FF7E2F]Chapter 2. Strong walls[-]

«You have potential as a builder. A wooden house is good, but stronger creatures can easily deal with it. I think it's time to improve your home.
Improve your walls with cobblestones, and strengthen your doors with iron, and come to me. I'll return some of the resources and pick up a new tool and equipment for construction.» [DECEA3]- da Vinci[-]
Tchinese:
[FF7E2F]第 2 章。堅固的城牆[-]

«你有成為建造者的潛力。木屋雖好，但實力較強的生物也能輕鬆應付。我認為是時候改善你的家了。 
用鵝卵石改善你的牆壁，用鐵加強你的門，然後來找我。我將歸還一些資源併購買新的施工工具和設備。 」 [DECEA3]-達文西[-]

English:
[FF7E2F]Chapter 3. Bunker[-]

«Now that's a different matter. Now you can create a real bunker. Concrete walls are much stronger than stone ones and it's time to use them.
Improve your walls with concrete, and strengthen your doors with steel, and come to me. I'll return some of the resources and pick up new tools and equipment for construction.» [DECEA3]- da Vinci[-]
Tchinese:
[FF7E2F]第 3 章。碉堡[-]

«現在這是另一回事了。現在您可以創建一個真正的掩體。混凝土牆比石頭牆堅固得多，是時候使用它們了。 
用混凝土改良你的牆，用鋼加固你的門，然後來找我。我將歸還一些資源並獲取新的施工工具和設備。 » [DECEA3]-達文西[-]

English:
[FF7E2F]Chapter 4. Bomb shelter[-]

«Well, in such a house you won't be afraid of anything... except the horde, of course. It's time to use more durable materials. In addition to durability, steel is an excellent protection against explosions.
Upgrade your walls with steel and install electric doors and hatches, and come to me. I'll return some of the resources and select the best tool and equipment for construction.
After the upgrade, you can stock up on popcorn and watch any hordes from the roof.» [DECEA3]- da Vinci[-]
Tchinese:
[FF7E2F]第 4 章。防空洞[-]

«好吧，在這樣的房子裡你不會害怕任何東西......當然，除了部落。是時候使用更耐用的材料了。除了耐用性之外，鋼材還能提供優異的防爆保護。 
用鋼材升級牆壁並安裝電動門和艙口，然後來找我。我會歸還一些資源，並選擇最好的工具和設備來建造。 
升級後，你可以儲備爆米花，並在屋頂上觀看成群的人群。 」 [DECEA3]-達文西[-]

English: Quest to find a supply cache from surviving settlers\n\n[DECEA3]Warning! This quest may be deadly. Prepare thoroughly before attempting it.[-]
Tchinese: 尋求從倖存的定居者那裡找到補給緩存\n\n[DECEA3]警告！這個任務可能是致命的。嘗試之前請做好充分準備。 [-]

English: Fulfil the conditions of the quest
Set up communication with the outside world

By the way, while you were gone I remembered something...
Recently, one of our scouts went to check a supply cache nearby and never came back. They say there was an infected beast running around nearby, or a dog, or a wolf, who knows. But we didn't check ourselves, as you can see there weren't many people anyway. In any case, if you're going that way, check it out, you might need the supplies yourself, but we don't need these creatures so close.
But I'll tell you right away that it's better to stock up on weapons and stakes - the more the better! These creatures have either eaten or maimed a lot of good guys. But the risk is worth it.

[DECEA3]Attention, a difficult task for the initial stage of the game. Be careful![-]
Tchinese:
順便說一下，當你離開的時候我想起了一件事... 
最近，我們的一名偵察兵去檢查附近的補給緩存，然後就再也沒有回來。他們說附近有一隻受感染的野獸在跑來跑去，或是一隻狗，或是一隻狼，誰知道呢。但我們沒有去檢查，你可以看到，反正人也不多。無論如何，如果你要走那條路，請檢查一下，你自己可能需要補給，但我們不需要這些生物離得那麼近。 
但我會立即告訴你，最好儲備武器和木樁——越多越好！這些生物要嘛吃掉要嘛殘害了很多好人。但這個風險是值得的。 

[DECEA3]注意，對於遊戲的初始階段來說是一項艱鉅的任務。當心！ [-]

English:
[FFB800]Chapter 1. Communication with the Outside World[-]

«Greetings, survivor. The settlers reported that you somehow managed to survive. That's great, extra hands wouldn't hurt, and even more so, extra heads. For now, settle in here and try to survive. Once you figure out what's what, it would be nice to establish communication.
I don't like playing with a broken phone, and it's much easier to communicate with a smart stalker directly. In general, figure out how to create a Radio Station and install it. When everything is ready, you can find out my frequency from any merchant. Contact me and I'll tell you how we can help each other.
And yes... nice to meet you» [DECEA3]- Adel[-]
Tchinese:
[FFB800]第一章 與外界的交流[-]

«你好，倖存者。定居者報告說你設法活了下來。太好了，多出雙手不會有什麼壞處，更何況多出一顆頭。現在，先在這裡定居並努力生存。一旦你弄清楚是什麼，建立溝通就很好了。 
我不喜歡玩壞手機，直接與聰明的跟蹤者溝通要容易得多。一般來說，弄清楚如何創建一個廣播電台並安裝它。一切準備就緒後，你就可以從任何商家查到我的頻率。聯絡我，我會告訴你我們如何互相幫助。 
是的...很高興見到你» [DECEA3]- Adel[-]

When everything is ready, you can find out my frequency from any merchant. Contact me and I'll tell you how we can help each other.

Warning! Canceling this quest will break the entire quest chain. Restarting is only possible with the help of an administrator.[-]
Tchinese:
[FFB800]第一章 與外界的交流[-]

«你好，倖存者。定居者報告說你設法活了下來。太好了，多出雙手不會有什麼壞處，更何況多出一顆頭。現在，先在這裡定居並努力生存。一旦你弄清楚是什麼，建立溝通就很好了。 
我不喜歡玩壞手機，直接與聰明的跟蹤者溝通要容易得多。一般來說，弄清楚如何創建一個廣播電台並安裝它。一切準備就緒後，你就可以從任何商家查到我的頻率。聯絡我，我會告訴你我們如何互相幫助。 
是的...很高興見到你» [DECEA3]- Adel

警告！取消這個任務將會破壞整個任務鏈。只有在管理員的幫助下才能重新啟動。 [-]

English:
[FFB800]Chapter 2. Communication with the Outside World[-]

«I'm glad you've managed to get used to it and not 'lose' your head, not everyone can do that. We'll organize support for those who still remain in the Quarantine Zone. Not as often as we'd like, but still. If you help us, we'll help you. Collect 10 boxes of resources to support other settlements, and we'll send you valuable alloys. I'm sure you won't be able to create such materials on your own. But they may be useful to you for upgrades or creating something worthwhile.
When you're ready, use the Radio Station to send the support package and receive a small case of experimental alloys.» [DECEA3]- Adel[-]
Tchinese:
[FFB800]第二章. 與外界的溝通[-]

«我很高興你已經習慣了，並且沒有「失去」頭腦，不是每個人都能做到這一點。我們將為那些仍留在隔離區的人組織支持。雖然不像我們希望的那麼頻繁，但仍然如此。如果你幫助我們，我們就會幫助你。收集 10 箱資源來支持其他定居點，我們將向您發送有價值的合金。我確信您無法自行創建此類材料。但它們可能對您升級或創造有價值的東西有用。 
準備好後，使用廣播電台發送支援包並收到一小箱實驗合金。 » [DECEA3]-阿德爾[-]

English:
[FFB800]Chapter 3. Quality tool[-]

«Colleagues reported that the exchange of goods went without incident. I also sent you an upgrade scheme for your tool. We will both need it. Don't waste the alloys we sent you yet. They will come in handy for creating the modification. If you need more for your projects, just collect support boxes and exchange them for the amount you need. We can always find a use for your resources.
Now let's get down to business. Use the scheme I sent you and create the modification. These blades need to be installed on the weapon you use to butcher animals. I hope you learned to hunt?» [DECEA3]- Adel[-]
Tchinese:
[FFB800]第 3 章. 品質工具[-]

«同事報告說，貨物交換順利進行。我還向您發送了您的工具的升級方案。我們都需要它。不要浪費我們寄給你的合金。它們將在創建修改時派上用場。如果您的專案需要更多，只需收集支援箱並將其兌換成您需要的數量即可。我們總能找到您的資源的用途。 
現在我們開始談正事吧。使用我發送給您的方案並建立修改。這些刀片需要安裝在您用來屠宰動物的武器上。我希望你學會了打獵？ 」 [DECEA3]-阿德爾[-]

English: [FFB800]Chapter 4. The hunt has just begun[-]\n\n«Great, now we have everything we need to start collecting samples. Our scientists are constantly researching the virus that brought us all here. But there are few ordinary infected. As far as I know, the virus has mutated significantly after hitting the cities. But the zombies have only become much stronger. If we learn to kill these creatures without using a tactical charge, it can greatly help us in our research. Kill radioactive and elite zombies and collect mutation samples from them. I don't think you can get samples with a regular knife, so use a tool with a surgical blade. Yes, it's disgusting, but there is no other way out. Be careful with the samples, the virus is not critically active there, but there is radiation. It's better not to keep them in your equipment, use transport or a drone.» [DECEA3]- Adel[-]
Tchinese: [FFB800]第 4 章。狩獵才剛開始[-]\n\n«太好了，現在我們已經擁有開始收集樣本所需的一切。我們的科學家正在不斷研究將我們帶到這裡的病毒。但普通感染者很少。據我了解，病毒進入城市後已發生明顯變異。但殭屍只會變得更強大。如果我們學會在不使用戰術衝鋒的情況下殺死這些生物，它可以極大地幫助我們的研究。殺死放射性殭屍和精英殭屍並從中收集變異樣本。我認為您無法使用普通刀獲取樣本，因此請使用帶有手術刀片的工具。是的，這很噁心，但沒有其他出路。小心樣本，那裡的病毒並不活躍，但有輻射。最好不要將它們放在您的設備中，使用運輸工具或無人機。 」 [DECEA3]-阿德爾[-]

English:
[FFB800]Chapter 5. Best Ammo[-]

«We managed to collect the initial samples. The guys from the lab are ready to exchange them for experimental ammunition. Contact them by radio to request an exchange. You can exchange the found samples for any caliber you are interested in.
Make a request and get a small case of 7.62 mm experimental ammunition.» [DECEA3]- Adel[-]

[FFB800]第 5 章。最佳彈藥[-]

«我們設法收集了初始樣本。實驗室的人準備用它們換實驗彈藥。透過無線電聯繫他們請求交換。您可以將找到的樣品換成您感興趣的任何口徑。

English:
[FFB800]Chapter 6. A wasteland is a wasteland[-]

«You turned out to be a really tough nut to crack. The headquarters even thinks you're immortal. In any case, no one has ever managed to reduce the population of these creatures to such an extent.
I suggest you go into the wasteland and see what's going on there. I'll warn you right away, it's not an easy walk. The average level of radiation exposure is recorded there, and at night or during rain it rises even higher.
You can't do without good protection there. Try to find Nomad equipment, it will increase your chances of survival.» [DECEA3]- Adel[-]
Tchinese:
[FFB800]第六章荒地就是荒地[-]

«你真是個難啃的骨頭。總部甚至認為你是不朽的。無論如何，從來沒有人能夠將這些生物的數量減少到如此程度。 
我建議你去荒地看看那裡發生了什麼事。我會立即警告你，這不是一件容易的事。那裡記錄了輻射暴露的平均水平，在夜間或下雨期間，輻射暴露水平甚至更高。 
那裡沒有良好的保護是不可能的。試著找到Nomad裝備，它將增加你的生存機會。 » [DECEA3]-阿德爾[-]

English:
[FFB800]Chapter 7. There's No Such Thing as Too Much Protection[-]

«Great, now you have good equipment. But the radiation in those parts is really deadly.
You need to find or create radiation shields. They provide much stronger protection. In addition, I heard that the Zone has learned to create the medication Anti-Rad, which is also an indispensable thing if you want to survive. Anyway, when you get all this, contact me, I'll tell you what to do next.» [DECEA3]- Adel[-]
Tchinese:
[FFB800]第7章。保護不嫌多[-]

«太好了，現在你有很好的裝備了。但這些部位的輻射確實是致命的。 
你需要找到或建立輻射防護罩。它們提供更強大的保護。另外，聽說Zone已經學會了製造抗輻射藥物，想要活下去，這也是不可或缺的東西。不管怎樣，當你得到這一切後，請聯絡我，我會告訴你下一步該怎麼做。 」 [DECEA3]-阿德爾[-]

English: [FFB800]Chapter 8. Bad Pets[-]\n\n«I'll get straight to the point. We've been receiving reports from various parts of the Zone that huge mutated animals have started appearing at night. I think it's time for you to start hunting them. I'm sure you'll be able to collect many more samples from these creatures. From reports of encounters with such pets, we know that they don't travel alone. Prepare well before you go looking for them.» [DECEA3]- Adel[-]
Tchinese: [FFB800]第 8 章。壞寵物[-]\n\n«我開門見山。我們已經收到來自該區域各個地區的報告，稱巨大的變異動物開始在夜間出現。我想你是時候開始狩獵它們了。我相信您將能夠從這些生物收集更多樣本。從與此類寵物相遇的報告中，我們知道它們不會單獨旅行。在尋找他們之前請做好充分準備。 」 [DECEA3]-阿德爾[-]

English:
[FFB800]Chapter 9. Big Ones[-]

«I think you're ready to go now. ...Take some matches, a mug and a flashlight (Joke)
So, as we know, the increased radiation level caused an abnormal mutation of everyone who lives there. It's an extremely dangerous idea to climb there at night, but most of the unexplored anomalies appear there at night.
You need to kill and collect samples from three anomalies known to us. Everything you find there is yours. I'm sure there is something to profit from, considering that most of the survivors in the zone avoid this territory.
I really hope for your abilities.» [DECEA3]- Adel[-]
Tchinese:
[FFB800]第 9 章。大人物[-]

«我想你現在已經準備好了。 ……帶上一些火柴、一個杯子和一個手電筒（笑話）
因此，正如我們所知，輻射水平的增加導致了居住在那裡的每個人的異常突變。晚上爬到那裡是一個極其危險的想法，但大多數未探索的異常現像都是在夜間出現的。 
你需要殺死我們已知的三個異常現象並收集樣本。你在那裡找到的一切都是你的。考慮到該區域的大多數倖存者都避開了這個領域，我確信可以從中獲利。 
我真的希望你有能力。 」 [DECEA3]-阿德爾[-]

English: [FFB800]Chapter 10. Big threat[-]\n\n«You are simply a hero. How you managed to survive after all this, for me personally, remains a mystery. In any case, your merits are undeniable and very soon we will be able to secure the Quarantine Zone as much as possible. Of course, clearing the entire zone requires a lot of time and effort. But now there is one last task for you. We are hearing rumors about the appearance of huge creatures - Carriers. Kill one of them and we will be able to understand a lot about what is happening with the virus now.» [DECEA3]- Adel[-]

English:
[FFB800]Chapter 10. Big threat[-]

«You are simply a hero. How you managed to survive after all this, for me personally, remains a mystery. In any case, your merits are undeniable and very soon we will be able to secure the Quarantine Zone as much as possible. Of course, clearing the entire zone requires a lot of time and effort. English: You are protected from light radiation
Not the best — but better than nothing.\n\nProtects against exposure to weak radiation.

English: You are protected from average levels of radiation

English: Now you can see what’s out there in the wasteland. The main thing is not to die from those who are there.\n\nProtects against exposure to medium levels of radiation.

English: You are exposed to weak radiation

English:
You are exposed to weak radiation. Nothing serious, but be careful - it can kill.
You also lose [FFB800]3 HP[-] every [DECEA3]6 seconds.[-]

You receive radiation that leads to radiation sickness.
Tchinese:
您暴露在微弱的輻射下。沒什麼嚴重的，但要小心 - 它會致命。 
每 [DECEA3]6 秒你也會失去 [FFB800]3 HP[-]。 [-]

你受到的輻射會導致輻射病。

English: You are exposed to active radiation

You are under the influence of active radiation - try to get away from it.
You also lose [FFB800]3 HP[-] every [DECEA3]3 seconds.[-]

You receive [FFB800]2x[-] more irradiation.
Tchinese:
你受到主動輻射的影響 - 嘗試遠離它。 
每 [DECEA3]3 秒你也會損失 [FFB800]3 HP[-]。 [-]

你受到的輻射增加 [FFB800]2x[-]。

English:
This is a critical level of active radiation. If you don't take action, we'll have to say goodbye.
You also lose [FFB800]9 HP[-] every [DECEA3]3 seconds.[-]

You receive [FFB800]5 times[-] more irradiation.
Tchinese:
這是活性輻射的臨界水平。如果你不採取行動，我們就只能說再見了。 
每 [DECEA3]3 秒你還會損失 [FFB800]9 HP[-]。 [-]

你會受到 [FFB800]5 倍[-] 倍的照射。

English:
Radiation sickness is a dangerous thing. In time it will kill you. Thank God it's still in its early stages.
Your health gradually deteriorates, and you [FFB800]lose 10% of your damage resistance.[-]

[DECEA3]Recovery is possible only in the absence of active radiation.[-]
Tchinese:
放射病是一件危險的事。到時候它就會殺了你。感謝上帝，它仍處於早期階段。 
你的健康狀況逐漸惡化，並且你[FFB800]失去了 10% 的傷害抵抗力。 [-]

[DECEA3]只有在沒有主動輻射的情況下才有可能恢復。 [-]

English: Radiation sickness has developed to the active stage
Tchinese: 放射病已發展至活動期

English:
Well, we waited! Radiation sickness has entered the active phase. Now you feel much worse.
You lose [FFB800]30%[-] damage resistance, [FFB800]15%[-] mobility, and your [DECEA3]weapons[-] and [DECEA3]armor[-] break down [FFB800]25%[-] faster. Stamina reduced by [FFB800]50[-], and health by [FFB800]25[-]

[DECEA3]Recovery is possible only in the absence of active radiation.[-]
Tchinese:
好吧，我們等了！放射病已進入活躍期。現在你感覺更糟了。 
你失去了 [FFB800]30%[-] 傷害抗性，[FFB800]15%[-] 機動性，並且你的 [DECEA3]武器[-]和 [DECEA3]護甲[-]分解速度 [FFB800]25%[-] 更快。耐力減少 [FFB800]50[-]，生命值減少 [FFB800]25[-]

[DECEA3]只有在沒有主動輻射的情況下才有可能恢復。 [-]

English: [FFB800]The level of radiation received is critical[-]

Madame Curie is resting! You have reached a critical level of radiation. Your health is critical and you may die soon.
You lose [FFB800]50%[-] damage resistance, [FFB800]30%[-] mobility, and your [DECEA3]weapons[-] and [DECEA3]armor[-] break down [FFB800]50%[-] faster. Stamina reduced by [FFB800]100[-], and health by [FFB800]50[-]

[DECEA3]Recovery is possible only in the absence of active radiation.[-]
Tchinese:
居禮夫人休息了！您的輻射已達到臨界水平。你的健康狀況很危急，你可能很快就會死去。 
你會失去 [FFB800]50%[-] 傷害抗性、[FFB800]30%[-] 移動力，並且你的 [DECEA3] 武器 [-] 和 [DECEA3] 護甲 [-] 分解速度會加快 [FFB800]50%[-]。耐力減少 [FFB800]100[-]，生命值減少 [FFB800]50[-]

[DECEA3]只有在沒有主動輻射的情況下才有可能恢復。 [-]

English:
The radiation is not strong, so consider yourself lucky.
You still lose [FFB800]10%[-] from damage resistance.

Over time, your body will cope and repair itself. Increasing protection from active radiation will speed up the process. Also, a good shower won't hurt - being in water speeds up recovery.
Tchinese:
輻射並不強，所以你覺得自己很幸運。 
你仍然會因傷害抗性而損失[FFB800]10%[-]。 

隨著時間的推移，你的身體會自行應對和修復。加強對主動輻射的防護將加速此過程。此外，好好洗個澡也沒什麼壞處——泡在水裡可以加速恢復。

Tchinese:
你當時正處於死亡邊緣。在你恢復理智之前，盡量不要把頭伸到任何地方。 
你仍然會失去 [FFB800]50%[-] 傷害抗性、[FFB800]30%[-] 移動力，並且你的 [DECEA3] 武器 [-] 和 [DECEA3] 護甲 [-] 分解速度 [FFB800]50%[-] 更快。耐力減少 [FFB800]100[-]，生命值減少 [FFB800]50[-]

隨著時間的推移，你的身體會自行應對和修復。加強對主動輻射的防護將加速此過程。此外，好好洗個澡也沒什麼壞處——泡在水裡可以加速恢復。

English:
You have a mild heat stroke. You need to cool down.
Stamina pool is reduced by [FFB800]10[-]
Stamina consumption is increased by [FFB800]10%[-]
Your hands are failing you — weapon spread and recoil are slightly increased.

Indoors and in water, the rate of effect accumulation is reduced.
[DECEA3]Recovery is only possible when there is no heat.[-]
Tchinese:
您患有輕度中暑。你需要冷靜下來。 
體力池減少[FFB800]10[-]
體力消耗增加[FFB800]10%[-]
你的手不太好－武器擴散和後座力略有增加。 

室內和水中，效果累積率降低。 
[DECEA3]只有在沒有熱量的情況下才能恢復。 [-]

English:
You have a moderate heat stroke. You need to cool down.
Stamina pool is reduced by [FFB800]30[-]
Stamina consumption is increased by [FFB800]20%[-]
Your hands are failing you — weapon spread and recoil are noticeably increased.
[FFB800]Fainting is possible[-]

Indoors and in water, the rate of effect accumulation is reduced.
[DECEA3]Recovery is only possible when there is no heat.[-]
Tchinese:
您患有中度中暑。你需要冷靜下來。 
體力池減少[FFB800]30[-]
體力消耗增加[FFB800]20%[-]
你的手已經不行了－武器擴散和後座力明顯增加。 
[FFB800]可能會暈倒[-]

在室內和水中，效果累積率會降低。 
[DECEA3]只能恢復當沒有熱量時。 [-]

English:
You have a critical heat stroke. You urgently need to cool down.
Stamina pool is reduced by [FFB800]60[-]
Stamina consumption is increased by [FFB800]40%[-]
Your hands are failing you — weapon spread and recoil are significantly increased.
[FFB800]Fainting is possible.[-]

Indoors and in water, the rate of effect accumulation is reduced.
[DECEA3]Recovery is only possible when there is no heat.[-]
Tchinese:
您患有嚴重中暑。你迫切需要冷卻。 
體力池減少[FFB800]60[-]
體力消耗增加[FFB800]40%[-]
你的雙手已經失效了－武器擴散和後座力顯著增加。 
[FFB800]可能會暈倒。 [-]

在室內和水中，效果累積率降低。 
[DECEA3]恢復為只有在沒有熱量的情況下才有可能。 [-]

Tchinese: 您正在從輕度中暑中恢復過來

Weapon reload speed and melee attack speed are reduced by [FFB800]10%[-]
Mobility is reduced by [FFB800]10%[-]

English: Look intimidating and get a better deal from traders. Also boosts strength!\n\nThe [DECEA3]Better Barter[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 看起來令人生畏，並從交易者那裡獲得更好的交易。還可以增強力量！ \n\n[DECEA3]更好的以物易物[-]技能可以提高改裝的品質。

English: Reload faster.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Armor[-] crafting skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 重裝速度更快。 \n\n[DECEA3]Armor[-] 製作技能提升了改裝的品質。

English: Increases magazine capacity for pump shotguns.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Boomstick[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 增加泵式霰彈槍的彈匣容量。 \n\n[DECEA3]Boomstick[-] 技能提升改裝品質。

English: This large drum magazine increases the ammo capacity on machine guns, but is a little slower to reload.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Machine Gunner[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 這種大型彈鼓增加了機槍的彈藥容量，但裝填速度稍慢。 \n\n[DECEA3]機槍手[-]技能提升了改裝的品質。

English: Increases magazine capacity.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Gunslinger[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 增加彈匣容量。 \n\n[DECEA3]Gunslinger[-] 技能提升改裝品質。

English: Arrows and Bolts fly quicker and further with this modification.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Archery[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 透過此修改，箭和螺栓飛得更快更遠。 \n\n[DECEA3]射箭[-] 技能提升了修改的品質。

English: An arrow rest improves the accuracy of a bow.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Archery[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 箭台提高了弓的準確性。 \n\n[DECEA3]射箭[-] 技能提升了修改的品質。

English: Temporarily disables the regeneration ability of Radiated, Charged, and Infernal zombies.\n\nThe [DECEA3]The Huntsman[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 暫時禁用輻射、帶電和地獄殭屍的再生能力。 \n\n[DECEA3]獵人[-]技能發展改造品質。

English: Do more damage to all animals.\n\nThe [DECEA3]The Huntsman[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 對所有動物造成更多傷害。 \n\n[DECEA3]獵人[-]技能可提升改造的品質。

English: Has a chance to cause a Bleeding Wound on a regular attack.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Deep Cuts[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 普通攻擊有幾率造成流血傷口。 \n\n[DECEA3]深切[-]技能提升改造品質。

English:
Has a chance to cause bleeding damage with primary attacks.
Can be installed in clubs.

The [DECEA3]Pummel Pete[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese:
主要攻擊有幾率造成流血傷害。 
可以安裝在俱樂部中。 

[DECEA3]Pummel Pete[-]技能發展改造品質。

English:
Each successive hit lowers enemies armor rating.
Can be installed in clubs.

The [DECEA3]Pummel Pete[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese:
每次連續打擊都會降低敵人的護甲等級。 
可以安裝在俱樂部中。 

[DECEA3]Pummel Pete[-]技能提升改造品質。

English:
Has a chance to knock down opponents.
Can be installed in clubs.

The [DECEA3]Pummel Pete[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese:
有機會擊倒對手。 
可以安裝在俱樂部中。 

[DECEA3]Pummel Pete[-]技能培養改裝品質。

English:
A modification for all melee weapons and tools.
Adds a chance to stun and slow victims.

Knives and machetes do not have a head that can be weighted.

The [DECEA3]Grand Slam[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese:
所有近戰武器和工具的修改。 
增加暈眩和減緩受害者的機會。 

刀和砍刀沒有可以加重的頭部。 

[DECEA3]大滿貫[-]技能發展修改的品質。

English:
A melee item can triple as a light source, set enemies on fire, and used as a source of heat.

Can be installed in melee tools and weapons that have a long shaft or blade.

The [DECEA3]Advanced Engineering[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese:
近戰物品可以作為光源的三重，使敵人著火，並用作熱源。 

可以安裝在長軸或刀片的近戰工具和武器中。 

[DECEA3]高階工程[-]技能開發改裝品質。

English: This blade modification increases block damage and lowers degradation.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Advanced Engineering[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 這種刀片修改增加了方塊損壞並降低了退化。 \n\n[DECEA3]高階工程[-]技能提升了修改的品質。

English: Does more damage against dirt.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Miner 69'er[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 對污垢造成更多傷害。 \n\n[DECEA3]Miner 69'er[-] 技能可提升改造品質。

English: Does more damage against stone.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Miner 69'er[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 對石頭造成更多傷害。 \n\n[DECEA3]Miner 69'er[-] 技能可提升改造品質。

English: Does more damage against iron.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Miner 69'er[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 對鐵造成更多傷害。 \n\n[DECEA3]Miner 69'er[-] 技能可提升改造品質。

English: Does more damage against wood.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Miner 69'er[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 對木材造成更多傷害。 \n\n[DECEA3]Miner 69'er[-] 技能可提升改造品質。

English: Deal more damage to blocks, but less damage to enemies.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Miner 69'er[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 對物塊造成更多傷害，但對敵人造成較少傷害。 \n\n[DECEA3]Miner 69'er[-] 技能可提升改造品質。

English: Decreases melee stamina usage and increases weapon handling of bows.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Mother Lode[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 減少近戰耐力的使用並增加弓的武器操控性。 \n\n[DECEA3]Mother Lode[-] 技能提升改裝品質。

English: This modification lowers degradation for melee weapons, tools, and bows.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Mother Lode[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 此修改降低了近戰武器、工具和弓的退化。 \n\n[DECEA3]Mother Lode[-] 技能提高了修改的品質。

English: When below 50% health, regenerate health over time.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Mother Lode[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 當生命值低於 50% 時，隨著時間的推移會恢復生命值。 \n\n[DECEA3]Mother Lode[-] 技能可提高改造的品質。

English: Moderately increases tank size for chainsaws and augers.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Mother Lode[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 適度增加電鋸和螺旋鑽的水箱尺寸。 \n\n[DECEA3]母礦脈[-]技能提升改裝品質。

English: Greatly increases tank size for chainsaws and augers.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Mother Lode[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 大大增加了鏈鋸和螺旋鑽的水箱尺寸。 \n\n[DECEA3]母礦脈[-]技能提升了改造的品質。

English: Any hand tool or bladed weapon degrades slower with this modification.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Advanced Engineering[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 透過此修改，任何手動工具或刀片武器的降解速度都會變慢。 \n\n[DECEA3]高階工程[-]技能可提高修改的品質。

English: Increase your vehicle's fuel storage with this mod.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Grease Monkey[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 使用此模組增加車輛的燃油儲存量。 \n\n[DECEA3]油猴[-] 技能可提高改裝品質。

English: Vehicles consume less fuel.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Grease Monkey[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Tchinese: 車輛消耗更少的燃料。 \n\n[DECEA3]油猴[-]技能培養改裝品質。

English: A tool that can be installed in the forge to allow increased airflow and faster smelting speeds.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Advanced Engineering[-] skill develops the quality of item.
Tchinese: 一種可以安裝在鍛造廠中以增加氣流和更快熔煉速度的工具。 \n\n[DECEA3]高階工程[-]技能可提升物品的品質。

English: A tool that can be installed in a forge. It increases the crafting speed of that forge.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Advanced Engineering[-] skill develops the quality of item.
Tchinese: 可以安裝在鍛造廠中的工具。它提高了該鍛造廠的製作速度。 \n\n[DECEA3]高階工程[-]技能提升了物品的品質。

English: A cooking utensil used in the campfire to unlock recipes.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Master Chef[-] skill develops the quality of item.
Tchinese: 營火中用於解鎖食譜的烹飪用具。 \n\n[DECEA3]主廚[-]技能可提升物品的品質。

English: A cooking utensil used in the campfire to unlock recipes.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Master Chef[-] skill develops the quality of item.
Tchinese: 營火中用於解鎖食譜的烹飪用具。 \n\n[DECEA3]主廚[-]技能可提升物品的品質。
